    <item>
      <title>Central Maui Soil and Water Conservation District Board Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77028/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 77 Ho'okele Street, Suite 202, Kahului, Hawaii 96732&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/22&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 16.0pt; line-height: 120%; mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;Central Maui Soil and Water Conservation District Board Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P2" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; line-height: 120%; mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;Friday, April 22, 2026, at 9:00 AM&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P3" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 120%; mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P4" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;Please attend the in-person meeting to be held at the NRCS/SWCD Kahului Field Office located at:&lt;strong&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P5" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;77 Ho&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;okele St, Suite 202, Kahului, HI.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P6" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;If you are unable to attend in-person, you may attend via Zoom&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P7" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;Meeting ID&lt;strong&gt;: 839 9094 1280&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P8" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;em&gt;Passcode&lt;/em&gt;: 389867&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P9" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;Via the Web&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P10" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;https://us02web.zoom.us/j/83990941280?pwd=g33cfBi2SXebrnKdme0GJvzOS2Rhar.1&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P11" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 120%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;Or Dial&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P12" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;+1 669 900 6833&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P13" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P14" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P15" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 120%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 120%; mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P16" class="MsoNoSpacing" style="text-align: justify;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;Written and Oral Testimony&lt;/u&gt;: &lt;/strong&gt;Written testimony can be submitted by interested persons in advance of the meeting and may be mailed or delivered to 77 Ho&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;okele St., Suite 202, Kahului, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96732, prior to the meeting. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;It may also be emailed to &lt;a href="mailto:MauiSWCDs@gmail.com"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;MauiSWCDs@gmail.com&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Please note that public testimony on issues not on the agenda will be for consideration for the Board&amp;rsquo;s agenda at the next meeting. For live/oral testimony, each person will be limited to three minutes per agenda item.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P17" class="MsoNoSpacing" style="text-align: justify;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P18" class="MsoNoSpacing" style="text-align: justify;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;Special Accommodations Request&lt;/u&gt;: &lt;/strong&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, request by telephone 808-214-1742 and/or email &lt;a href="mailto:MauiSWCDs@gmail.com"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;MauiSWCDs@gmail.com&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt; preferably by Monday, April 20, 2026. If a response is received after Wednesday, April 1, 2026, we will try to obtain auxiliary aid/service or accommodation, but we cannot guarantee that the request will be fulfilled.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate formats such as large print, Braille, or electronic copy.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P19" class="MsoNoSpacing" style="text-align: justify;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P20" class="MsoNoSpacing" style="text-align: justify;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;Executive Session&lt;/u&gt;:&lt;a name="_Hlk105057641"&gt;&lt;/a&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk105057641;"&gt;Please be advised that the Central Maui Soil and Water Conservation District Board may go into Executive Session pursuant to Hawaii Revised Statutes (HRS), Section 92-5(a)(4).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P21" class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P22L1" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;I.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Meeting Call to Order&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P23" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;II.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Roll Call&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P24" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Secretary&amp;rsquo;s Meeting Minutes Approval&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P25" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Treasurer&amp;rsquo;s Report&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P26" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;V.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;District Business Updates&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P27" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Staff &amp;ndash; New HACD Conservation Specialist&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P28" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Outreach &amp;ndash; Upcoming&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P29" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;c.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Emergency Watershed Protection Program (EWPP) Updates&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P30" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;d.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;National Association of Conservation Districts (NACD) &amp;ndash; Laulima Community Conservation EQIP-Cost Share Pilot Program&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P31" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;e.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Grading and Grubbing&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P32" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;f.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Board Terms&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P33" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VI.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;USDA-Natural Resources Conservation Service: District Conservationist Updates, Jason Hew&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P34" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Approval of Farm Bill Conservation Plans&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P35" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;CTA plan approval&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P36" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;c.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;MOU&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P37" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Public Comment and Written Testimony&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P38" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VIII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Proposed Dates for the Next Meeting&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p id="P39" class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IX.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Meeting Adjournment&lt;/p&gt;</description>

    <item>
      <title>LAND USE COMMISSION MEETING - Canceled on 04/20/2026 08:02 AM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77001/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 75-5660 Palani Road, Kailua-Kona, HI 96740&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/22&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:30 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;See attached agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 13 Apr 2026 21:48:35 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77001/details.html?t=1776708165965</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-13T21:48:35Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Policy Advisory Board for Elder Affairs</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77016/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 250 S. Hotel Street, Ste 410, Honolulu, HI 96813 and Via Zoom&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/22&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Please see attachment.&lt;/p&gt;</description>

    <item>
      <title>Statewide Independent Living Council State Plan for Independent Living Committee Meeting - Canceled on 04/22/2026 10:33 AM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77024/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Hub Coworking Hawaii, Board Room, 1050 Queen St, #100, Honolulu, HI. 96814&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/22 - 2026/04/22&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Time: 11:00 am - 12:00 pm&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Location (Zoom): https://zoom.us/j/99801684080?pwd=YZxGyHZYzaKB7XdmfOXk6u320vkxFj.1&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Location (Phone): Dial 1-253-205-0468, then enter Meeting ID: 998 0168 4080, then Passcode: 146533&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;For Automated Dialing: 12532050468,,99801684080#,,,,*146533# US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Location (In Person): Hub Coworking Hawaii 1050 Queen St #100&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Agenda&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 5pt; margin-bottom: 3pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;1.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Call to Order&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 5pt; margin-bottom: 3pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;2.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Roll Call and Introductions&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 5pt; margin-bottom: 3pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;3.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Review of Administration for Community Living (ACL) Federal Requirements for a State Plan for Independent Living (SPIL) Amendment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 5pt; margin-bottom: 3pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;4.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Discussion of Possible State Plan for Independent Living (SPIL) Amendments for Committee Consideration&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 3pt; margin-bottom: 2pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;a.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Resource Plan:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; Possible adjustments for Statewide Independent Living Council (SILC) Executive Director hire, council member conference travel, community activities, and neighbor island meeting facilitation.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 3pt; margin-bottom: 2pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;b.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;New Staff Position&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;: Possible Outreach Coordinator to collaborate with the community and&amp;nbsp; with Centers for Independent Living (CILs).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 3pt; margin-bottom: 2pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;c.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Objective 1.4, Indicators 1.4.1 through 1.4.4&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;: Possible changes to consumer referral paths to Centers for Independent Living (CILs), Centers for Independent Living (CIL) resource reporting by county, and quarterly Independent Living Reporting (ILR) requirements.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 3pt; margin-bottom: 2pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;d.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Objective 2.2, Indicator 2.2.1:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; Possible change of State Plan for Independent Living (SPIL)&amp;nbsp; Committee and Centers for Independent Living (CILs) joint meeting frequency from quarterly to annually.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 5pt; margin-bottom: 3pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;5.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Discussion of Public Comment Process for Proposed Amendments&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; margin-top: 4pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Initial discussion of the required public comment period for State Plan for Independent Living (SPIL) amendments, including notice timeline, testimony methods, outreach to underserved communities, and comment review process.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 5pt; margin-bottom: 3pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;6.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Public Comment on Non-Agenda Items&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; margin-top: 4pt; margin-bottom: 4pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;The public may speak on matters not on this agenda. The Committee may not deliberate or act on non-agenda items at this meeting. Matters raised will be considered for a future agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span id="docs-internal-guid-2411cf61-7fff-d262-428d-17f6c2bd834a"&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 24pt; text-indent: -16pt; margin-top: 5pt; margin-bottom: 3pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 16pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;7.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #333333; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 00:08:34 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77024/details.html?t=1776890000364</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-17T00:08:34Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Regular Meeting of the Human Resources Committee of the Board of Trustees of the Employees' Retirement System of the State of Hawaii</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77025/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: City Financial Tower, 201 Merchant Street, Suite 1200, Honolulu, Hawaii  96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/22&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 02:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoTitle" style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt;NOTICE OF REGULAR MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 6.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt;"&gt;AGENCY:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt;"&gt;Human Resources Committee of the Board of Trustees of the&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt; text-indent: 0.5in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; Employees&amp;rsquo; Retirement System of the State of Hawaii&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;DATE:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Wednesday, April 22, 2026, 2:00 p.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;PLACE:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;City Financial Tower, 201 Merchant Street, Suite 1200, Honolulu, Hawaii&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in; tab-stops: 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk98833151"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;The meeting will be conducted pursuant to HRS &amp;sect;92-3.7, under which Members of the Human Resources Committee of the Board of Trustees and members of the public may participate via interactive conference technology or in person at the meeting place stated above.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in; tab-stops: 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Members of the public may also attend the meeting by teleconference, either audio or video, at the following link or phone number:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #0070c0;"&gt;&lt;a title="Meeting join" href="https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/275702078517721?p=p00PbxJ8PtL3ywgqyr"&gt;https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/275702078517721?p=p00PbxJ8PtL3ywgqyr&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; color: #4472c4;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Or join by entering meeting ID:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #0070c0;"&gt;275 702 078 517 721&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #4472c4;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;Passcode:&lt;span style="color: #4472c4;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;W9r5De9o&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Members of the public may provide testimony in person or by teleconference.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Individuals testifying at the meeting are requested to limit their testimony to three (3) minutes or an amount of time otherwise designated by the Chairperson.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in; tab-stops: 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Or &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="tel:+1%20808-829-4853,,509311998#" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;&lt;span style="color: windowtext; text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt;+&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; color: #4472c4; text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt;1 808-829-4853&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt; United States, Honolulu (Toll)&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt; text-indent: -1in;"&gt;Conference ID:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt; text-indent: -1in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt; text-indent: -1in; color: #0070c0;"&gt;354 086 874#&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in; tab-stops: 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;In the event audiovisual communication cannot be maintained with participating Trustees and quorum is lost, the meeting shall be automatically recessed for up to 30 minutes, during which time, an attempt to restore audiovisual communication will be made.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;If such attempt is unsuccessful, all Trustees, members of the public, staff and other interested individuals may continue to participate in the meeting via telephone using the above-listed telephone and conference ID numbers, whereby audio-only communication will be established for all participants and the meeting will continue.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;If reconvening the meeting is not possible because neither audiovisual nor audio-only communication can be re-established, the meeting will be terminated.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2 style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;QUORUM/CALL TO ORDER&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;PUBLIC COMMENT&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk48115519"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk41554810"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk48115519;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Members of the public may provide in-person testimony at the meeting or, alternatively, may submit written testimony in advance on these agenda items via e-mail or postal mail with receipt recommended by 4:30 p.m. on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, in order to ensure it is distributed in time for consideration.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Please address written testimony if by e-mail to:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dale.kanae@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk41554810;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk48115519;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;dale.kanae@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk41554810;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk48115519;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt; or by postal mail to:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Employees&amp;rsquo; Retirement System of the State of Hawaii, Human Resources Committee, 201 Merchant Street, Suite 1400, Honolulu, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96813.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;NEW BUSINESS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .25in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Review the Activities and Timeline of the Human Resources Committee.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .25in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Discuss the Compensation Plan for HRS Chapter 76 Exempt Positions of the Executive Director, Chief Investment Officer, Deputy Chief Investment Officer, and Investment Officers of the Employees&amp;rsquo; Retirement System.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Pursuant to HRS &amp;sect;92-5(a)(4), the Committee may enter into Executive Session to consult with the Committee&amp;rsquo;s attorneys on questions and issues pertaining to the Committee&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities with respect to these matters.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;APPROVAL OF MINUTES&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt; &amp;ndash; April 8, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;u style="text-underline: double;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;APPROVAL OF EXECUTIVE SESSION MINUTES&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt; &amp;ndash; April 8, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Pursuant to HRS &amp;sect;92-5(a)(2) and (4), the Committee may enter into Executive Session to consider the hire, evaluation, dismissal, or discipline of an officer or employee, where consideration of matters affecting privacy will be involved, and to consult with the Committee&amp;rsquo;s attorneys on questions and issues pertaining to the Committee&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities with respect to these matters.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 27.0pt;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;EXECUTIVE SESSION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .25in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Executive Session, pursuant to HRS&amp;sect; 92-5(a)(2) and (4), to consider the evaluation of and accompanying compensation recommendations for HRS Chapter 76 exempt Deputy Chief Investment Officer and Investment Officers of the Employees&amp;rsquo; Retirement System, where matters affecting privacy will be involved, and to consult with the Committee&amp;rsquo;s attorneys on questions and issues pertaining to the Committee&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities; appropriate action.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .25in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk161644958"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Executive Session, pursuant to HRS&amp;sect; 92-5(a)(2) and (4), to consider the evaluation of and accompanying compensation recommendation for HRS Chapter 76 exempt Chief Investment Officer of the Employees&amp;rsquo; Retirement System, where matters affecting privacy will be involved, and to consult with the Committee&amp;rsquo;s attorneys on questions and issues pertaining to the Committee&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities; appropriate action.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .25in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Executive Session, pursuant to HRS&amp;sect; 92-5(a)(2) and (4), to consider the evaluation of and accompanying compensation recommendation for HRS Chapter 76 exempt Executive Director of the Employees&amp;rsquo; Retirement System, where matters affecting privacy will be involved, and to consult with the Committee&amp;rsquo;s attorneys on questions and issues pertaining to the Committee&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities; appropriate action.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;ADJOURNMENT&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in .5in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;If you require auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact &lt;br /&gt;Dale Kehau Kanae at (808) 586-1706 or &lt;a href="mailto:dale.kanae@hawaii.gov"&gt;dale.kanae@hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt; as soon as possible, preferably by Friday, April 17, 2026, and the ERS will try to obtain the auxiliary aid/service or accommodation, but cannot guarantee that the request will be fulfilled.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in .5in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in .5in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Upon request, this notice can be made available in large print.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 00:57:34 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77025/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-17T00:57:34Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 9:00 a.m. - Updated on 03/06/2026 02:39 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76683/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also live streamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/23&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration-line: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;THURSDAY, APRIL 23, 2026 &amp;ndash; 9:00 A.M.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;NO. SCWC-22-0000362&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;LESTER SUMERA, Respondent/Plaintiff-Appellant, vs. STEVEN GOO, individually and in his official capacity as operations manager, supervisor and safety manager, Petitioner/Defendant/Appellee, and ROYAL HAWAIIAN MOVERS, Defendant-Appellee, and GLEN SALVADOR, Defendant.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;br /&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;"&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;417 South King Street&lt;br /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The oral argument will also be live streamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;div class="event-body" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #25638d; background: transparent; transition: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: bold;" href="mailto:adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov"&gt;adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;or complete the &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #25638d; background: transparent; transition: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: bold;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/ada-accommodation-request-form-2"&gt;Disability Accommodation Request Form&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Thu, 19 Feb 2026 03:05:14 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76683/details.html?t=1772843944000</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-02-19T03:05:14Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>AGENDA FOR MEETING ON HAWAII DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION LAND MATTERS</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77020/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 869 Punchbowl Street, 1st Floor Media Center&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/23&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; border-image: initial; text-align: center; border: medium none currentcolor;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;AGENDA FOR MEETING ON &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; border-image: initial; text-align: center; border: medium none currentcolor;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;HAWAII DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION LAND MATTERS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; border-image: initial; text-align: center; border: medium none currentcolor;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;NOTICE OF PUBLIC MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;Thursday, April 23, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;9:00 a.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 2.0in; text-indent: .5in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;Webinar ID&lt;span style="color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;940 7001 3205&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 2.0in; text-indent: .5in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%; color: black;"&gt;Meeting pass&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;code&lt;span style="color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;852348&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: none; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;Written Testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: none; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;Email written testimony to:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt; or mail to:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;869 Punchbowl Street, Room 500, Honolulu, Hawaii 96813.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Written testimonies may be posted on the Hawaii Department of Transportation website; remove any personal information prior to submitting unless you want it to be shared publicly.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;We encourage submittal of written testimony in advance of the meeting to allow for a timely review.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Late written testimony will be distributed to the presiding officer as soon as practicable, but we cannot ensure the presiding officer will receive it in sufficient time to review, prior to decision-making. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: none; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;Oral Testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: none; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;In-person:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;869 Punchbowl Street, 1&lt;sup&gt;st&lt;/sup&gt; floor Media Center, Honolulu, Hawaii 96813.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: none; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;Remote:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;Send your request to provide remote testimony to:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt; with your name, email address, and the agenda item you wish to testify on.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Once your request has been received, you will receive a confirmation email with pertinent information.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;You may testify without signing up in advance.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;We ask that you identify yourself and any affiliation before speaking, but you can choose not to do so.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: none; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;By Telephone:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;On the day of the meeting at the start of the agenda item you wish to testify on, dial +1-669-444-9171 (Zoom); input the meeting ID: 940 7001 3205 and follow the prompts. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%; color: black;"&gt;All testimony, whether written or oral, should be related to an item that is on the agenda.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Each individual is given two (2) minutes to testify.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%; color: black;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please call &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;(808) 587-2390, or email at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;,&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%; color: black;"&gt;as soon as possible. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;Upon request, this agenda and other materials are available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Hard copies of meeting packets (agenda, minutes, and submittals) are available for public and can be made available for pickup at our office at 869 Punchbowl Street, Room 500, Honolulu, Hawaii 96813 between Monday &amp;ndash; Friday from 8:00 a.m. &amp;ndash; 4:30 p.m., except holidays.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Hard copies can also be mailed as requested, please send a request to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;, or call (808) 587-2390.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Be sure to include your name, mailing address, and the meeting date in your request.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Digital format copies can be sent out through email and fax, upon request.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;NOTE:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Agenda Items may be taken out of order.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 0in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;A. CALL TO ORDER&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;li class="MsoBodyText"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;ISSUANCE OF A REVOCABLE PERMIT TO MARINE SPILL RESPONSE CORPORATION FOR CONTAINER STORAGE OF SPILL RESPONSE GEAR, SITUATED AT PIER 2, NAWILIWILI HARBOR, KAUAI, TAX MAP KEY NO. (4) 3-2-004:034 (PORTION), GOVERNOR&amp;rsquo;S EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 1332.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoBodyText"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;ISSUANCE OF A REVOCABLE PERMIT TO MARINE SPILL RESPONSE CORPORATION FOR CONTAINER STORAGE OF SPILL RESPONSE GEAR, SITUATED AT PIER 2, HILO HARBOR, HAWAII, TAX MAP KEY NO. (3) 2-1-009:007 (PORTION), GOVERNOR&amp;rsquo;S EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 3962.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoBodyText"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif;"&gt;ISSUANCE OF A REVOCABLE PERMIT TO MARINE SPILL RESPONSE CORPORATION FOR SUPPORT VESSEL MOORAGE, SITUATED AT THE RADIO BAY PIER, HILO HARBOR, HAWAII, TAX MAP KEY NO. (3) 2-1-009:007 (PORTION), GOVERNOR&amp;rsquo;S EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 3962.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;E. ADJOURNMENT&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%; color: black;"&gt;Meeting material is available online at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://hidot.hawaii.gov/administration/land-matters/"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;https://hidot.hawaii.gov/administration/land-matters/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;.&lt;span style="color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;For further information, email &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;DOTLandMatters@Hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="line-height: 115%;"&gt;. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'times new roman', times, serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
