    <item>
      <title>Small Business Regulatory Review Board Meeting - Updated on 04/13/2026 10:47 AM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76998/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 250 South Hotel Street No. 1 Capitol District Building Room 436 Honolulu, HI 96813 &amp; via Zoom (link on agenda)&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/23&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Thursday, April 23, 2026 &lt;span style="mso-char-type: symbol; mso-symbol-font-family: Wingdings;"&gt;&amp;laquo;&lt;/span&gt; 10:00 a.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;250 South Hotel Street&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;No. 1 Capitol District Building&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Room 436 Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="margin-left: 39.75pt; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-weight: normal; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"&gt;As authorized under Act 220, Session Laws of Hawaii 2021, and Section 92-3.7 Hawaii Revised Statutes (HRS), the public can participate in the meeting either:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="margin-left: 39.75pt; text-indent: -0.25in; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: black;"&gt;By attending the in-person meeting at:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="margin-left: 39.75pt; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; font-weight: normal;"&gt;250 S. Hotel Street, Room 436, Honolulu HI; or&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="margin-left: 39.75pt; text-indent: -0.25in; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Via Video-audio livestream or via Telephone - to join the Video-audio livestream meeting&lt;span style="font-weight: normal;"&gt;, go to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;a href="https://us06web.zoom.us/j/88400776199?pwd=4wAvlu4jf7kz65ioBZWDXgpG4KlKJ8.1"&gt;https://us06web.zoom.us/j/88400776199?pwd=4wAvlu4jf7kz65ioBZWDXgpG4KlKJ8.1&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 39.75pt; text-indent: -0.25in; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="color: windowtext; text-decoration: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; text-decoration: none;"&gt;To Join via&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; text-decoration: none;"&gt; &lt;strong&gt;Telephone: Dial 1-669-900-6833 with&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 39.75pt; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; text-decoration: none;"&gt;Meeting ID 883 5814 0200 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="color: windowtext; text-decoration: none;"&gt;Passcode &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;066739&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 39.75pt; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"&gt;When the Chairperson asks for public testimony during the meeting, you may indicate that you want to provide oral testimony by using the raise hand function or, if calling in by telephone, entering &lt;strong&gt;*&lt;/strong&gt; and &lt;strong&gt;9&lt;/strong&gt; on your phone keypad.&amp;nbsp; When recognized by the Chairperson, you will be unmuted.&amp;nbsp; If you call in by phone, you can unmute and mute yourself by pressing &lt;strong&gt;*&lt;/strong&gt; and &lt;strong&gt;6&lt;/strong&gt; on your keypad.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="margin-left: 21.75pt; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span class="lrzxr"&gt;&lt;span style="font-weight: normal;"&gt;Members of the public may also submit written testimony via e-mail to: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:DBEDT.sbrrb.info@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-weight: normal;"&gt;DBEDT.sbrrb.info@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;span style="color: windowtext; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;"&gt; or mailed to SBRRB, No. 1 Capitol District Building, &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="DocumentHeading" style="margin-left: 21.75pt; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;span style="color: windowtext; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;"&gt;250 S. Hotel Street, Room 506, Honolulu, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96813, or P.O. Box 2359, Honolulu, HI 96804. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="lrzxr"&gt;&lt;span style="font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;span style="color: windowtext; font-weight: normal; text-decoration: none;"&gt;The Board requests that written testimony be received by Wednesday, April 22, 2026, so it may be distributed to Board members prior to the meeting.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Testimony received after that time will be distributed to the Board members at the meeting. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="lrzxr"&gt;&lt;span style="font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 21.75pt; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"&gt;Copies of the Board Packet will be available on-line for review at: &lt;u&gt;Agendas &amp;amp; Minutes &amp;ndash; Small Business Regulatory Review Board (hawaii.gov)&lt;/u&gt; and in-person at 250 South Hotel Street, Room 506, Honolulu, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96813 during regular business hours. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;An electronic draft of the minutes for this meeting will also be made available at the same location when completed.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 21.75pt; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;The Board may go into Executive Session under Section 92-5 (a)(4), HRS to Consult with the Board&amp;rsquo;s Attorney on Questions and Issues Concerning the Board&amp;rsquo;s Powers, Duties, Immunities, Privileges and Liabilities.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="text-align: left; text-indent: -30.5pt; mso-text-indent-alt: -17.75pt; line-height: normal; mso-list: l6 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: .5in; margin: 0in 7.9pt .0001pt 30.5pt;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;I.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Call to Order&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="text-align: left; text-indent: -30.5pt; mso-text-indent-alt: -17.75pt; line-height: normal; mso-list: l6 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: .5in; margin: 0in 7.9pt .0001pt 30.5pt;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;II.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Approval of March 19, 2026 Meeting Minutes&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="text-align: left; text-indent: -30.5pt; mso-text-indent-alt: -17.75pt; line-height: normal; mso-list: l6 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: .5in; margin: 0in 7.9pt .0001pt 30.5pt;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;III.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Old Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-align: left; text-indent: -0.25in; margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 53.3pt; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Discussion and Action on the Small Business Statement After Public Hearing and Proposed Amendments for Hawaii Administrative Rules (HAR) Title 12 Chapter 229, &lt;strong&gt;General, Administrative, and Legal Provisions&lt;/strong&gt; promulgated by Department of Labor and Industrial Relations &amp;ndash; &lt;em&gt;Exhibit 1&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;em style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="margin-right: 7.9pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: -0.5in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Regulation for Review&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-align: left; text-indent: -0.25in; margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 0.75in; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Re-Discussion and Action on the Small Business Impact Statement Before and After Public Hearing for HAR Title 13 Chapter 146-6, &lt;strong&gt;Fees&lt;/strong&gt;, promulgated by Department of Land and Natural Resources &amp;ndash; &lt;em&gt;Exhibit 2&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="margin-right: 7.9pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: -0.5in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;V.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Administrative Matters&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2 style="text-indent: -0.25in; margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 53.25pt; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Update on the Board&amp;rsquo;s Upcoming Advocacy Activities and Programs in accordance with the Board&amp;rsquo;s Powers under Section 201M-5, Hawaii Revised Statutes (HRS)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2 style="text-indent: -0.25in; margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 71.25pt; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Simplifying Permitting for Enhanced Economic Development (SPEED) Task Force&amp;rsquo;s most recent meeting pursuant to Act 133 to identify actions taken challenges encountered, and legislative measures necessary to facilitate, expediate, and coordinate state and intergovernmental permit processes; and appropriates funds&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2 style="text-indent: -0.25in; margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 71.25pt; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Becker Communications Inc., regarding the Board&amp;rsquo;s Small Business Outreach&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2 style="text-indent: -0.25in; margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 71.25pt; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Presentations to Industry Associations&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2 style="text-align: justify; text-indent: -0.25in; margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 71.25pt; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;4.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Staff&amp;rsquo;s Small Business Outreach&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 30.75pt; text-indent: -30.75pt; line-height: normal;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;VI.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Legislative Matters&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 53.25pt; text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;A.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Discussion and Update on the following legislative matters:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 71.3pt; text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;1.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;House Bill 1964 HD1 Relating to the State Building Code Council&lt;/strong&gt; &amp;ndash; Requires the State Building Code Council to provide annual training to state and county permitting agency employees.&amp;nbsp; Appropriates funds for the training, subject to a matching requirement from the counties.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 71.3pt; text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;2.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;House Bill 1967 HD1 Relating to Permitting&lt;/strong&gt; &amp;ndash; Requires the Department of Business, Economic Development, and Tourism to develop a permitting workforce pipeline in partnership with the University of Hawaii and community colleges and coordinate with state and county permitting agencies on certain tasks related to classification levels, salary and benefits, hiring and responsibilities of employees.&amp;nbsp; Appropriates funds.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 71.3pt; text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;3.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;House Bill 2606 HD2 Relating to Off-Site Construction&lt;/strong&gt; &amp;ndash; Establishes a working group within the State Building Code Council to develop proposals for an off-site construction program.&amp;nbsp; Appropriates funds.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 71.3pt; text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;4.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Governor&amp;rsquo;s Message 612&lt;/strong&gt; Submitted for Consideration and Confirmation to the Small Business Regulatory Review Board, Gubernatorial Nominee, &lt;strong&gt;Leelen Park&lt;/strong&gt;, for a term to expire June 30, 2029&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 71.3pt; text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;5.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Governor&amp;rsquo;s Message 613 &lt;/strong&gt;Submitted for Consideration and Confirmation to the Small Business Regulatory Review Board, Gubernatorial Nominee, &lt;strong&gt;Cynthia Hobson&lt;/strong&gt;, for a term to expire June 30, 2029&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 71.3pt; text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;6.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Governor&amp;rsquo;s Message &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"&gt;Submitted for Consideration and Confirmation to the Small Business Regulatory Review Board, Gubernatorial Nominee, &lt;strong&gt;Denver Coon&lt;/strong&gt;, for a term to expire June 30, 2032&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 30.95pt; text-indent: -30.95pt; line-height: normal;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;VII.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Next Meeting:&lt;span style="font-weight: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; Thursday, May 21, 2026 at 10:00 a.m., held via Zoom and at 250 South Hotel Street &amp;ndash; No. 1 Capitol District Building, Conference Rm 436, Honolulu, HI&amp;nbsp; 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="margin: 0in 7.9pt 0.0001pt 30.95pt; text-indent: -30.95pt; line-height: normal;" align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;VIII.&lt;span style="font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-variant-position: normal; font-variant-emoji: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact Jet&amp;rsquo;aime Ariola at 808 798-0737 and jetaime.k.ariola@hawaii.gov as soon as possible, preferably at least three (3) working days prior to the meeting.&amp;nbsp; Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled.&amp;nbsp; Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 13 Apr 2026 20:41:18 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76998/details.html?t=1776113279878</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-13T20:41:18Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>STATEWIDE ELECTIONS ACCESSIBILITY NEEDS ADVISORY COMMITTEE MEETING</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77022/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Department of Land and Natural Resources Boardroom Kalanimoku Building 1151 Punchbowl Street, Room 132 Honolulu, HI 96813  or via Video Conference or Telephone*&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/23&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;NOTICE OF STATEWIDE ELECTIONS ACCESSIBILITY&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;NEEDS ADVISORY COMMITTEE MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;div align="center"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table class="MsoTableGrid" style="border-collapse: collapse; border: none; mso-yfti-tbllook: 1184; mso-padding-alt: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; mso-border-insideh: none; mso-border-insidev: none;" border="0" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 0; mso-yfti-firstrow: yes;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;Date:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;Thursday, April 23, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 1;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;Time:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;10:00 AM&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 2; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;Place:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;Department of Land and Natural Resources Boardroom&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;or via Video Conference or Telephone*&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 3;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;*Pursuant to Section 92-3.7, Hawaii Revised Statutes, the Statewide Elections Accessibility Needs Advisory Committee will be meeting remotely using interactive conference technology. The public may view the video and audio of the meeting through the video conferencing link below.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;+1 646 558 8656 US (New York) &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;+1 301 715 8592 US (Washington DC) &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;+1 305 224 1968 US &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;+1 309 205 3325 US&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Meeting ID:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt; 842 2453 3790&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;If audiovisual communication cannot be maintained with all participating Committee Members and the quorum is lost, the meeting shall be automatically recessed for up to thirty (30) minutes to allow staff to attempt to restore communication. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;If audiovisual communication with all participating Committee Members can be restored, the meeting will be reconvened. If, however, audiovisual communication cannot be restored, then the meeting may be reconvened with audio-only communication using the above-listed telephone number. Any non-confidential visual aids brought to the meeting by Committee Members or as part of a scheduled presentation will be made publicly available on the Statewide Elections Accessibility Needs Advisory Committee website within fifteen (15) minutes after audio-only communication is restored. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;If it is not possible to reconvene the meeting within thirty (30) minutes after an interruption of communication and the Committee Members have not provided reasonable notice to the public as to how the meeting will be continued at an alternative date and time, then the meeting shall be automatically terminated.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;MEETING INFORMATION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Public Testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Individuals may submit testimony in advance of the meeting via email to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:elections@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;elections@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt; or by mail addressed to the Statewide Elections Accessibility Needs Advisory Committee, c/o Office of Elections, 802 Lehua Avenue, Pearl City, Hawaii 96782. Individuals may provide oral testimony at the meeting via the above-listed video conferencing link or by calling the above-listed telephone number.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Public testimony on agenda items may be presented when the relevant agenda items are called and will be limited to three (3) minutes each. The Committee agenda and meeting materials for this meeting are also made available at the Statewide Elections Accessibility Needs Advisory Committee website at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://elections.hawaii.gov/about-us/boards-and-commissions/elections-accessibility-needs-advisory-committee/"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;https://elections.hawaii.gov/about-us/boards-and-commissions/elections-accessibility-needs-advisory-committee/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;emsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;For Further Assistance&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact the Office of Elections at 808-453-8683, 1-800-442-8683 from the neighbor islands, or email &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:elections@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;elections@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break; page-break-before: always;" clear="all" /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; letter-spacing: 2.0pt;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;I.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Call to order&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; tab-stops: 293.25pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;II.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Roll call and determination of a quorum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Approval of written minutes from the February 18, 2026 meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Review of Report on Accessibility Impact of Voting by Mail&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;V.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Presentation on voting in Hawaii by Office of Elections&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VI.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Discussion and decision making on appointing a new Committee Chair&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Discuss and schedule statewide 2026 accessible voting outreach events and plan for 2027&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VIII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Set meeting schedule through the end of 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IX.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Pursuant to HRS &amp;sect; 92-5(a)(4), the Committee may enter into executive session to consult with the Committee&amp;rsquo;s attorney on questions and issues pertaining to the Committee&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities, if appropriate.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Thu, 16 Apr 2026 19:46:42 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77022/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-16T19:46:42Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 10:30 a.m. - Updated on 03/06/2026 02:38 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76724/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: The oral argument will be held remotely and will be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/23&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:30 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;TUESDAY, APRIL 23, 2026 &amp;ndash; 10:30 A.M.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;NO. SCWC-22-0000687&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;NO. SCWC-22-0000687 GERARDO DENNIS PATRICKSON, BENIGNO TORRES HERNANDEZ, FERNANDO JIMENEZ ARIAS, ELIAS ESPINOSA MERELO,&amp;nbsp; ALIRIO MANUEL MENDEZ, CARLOS HUMBERTO RIVERA, individually and on behalf of others similarly situated,&amp;nbsp; Respondents/Plaintiffs-Appellants, vs. DOW CHEMICAL COMPANY and DEL MONTE FRESH PRODUCE N.A., INC., Petitioners/Defendants-Appellees, and DOLE FOOD COMPANY, INC., DOLE FRESH FRUIT COMPANY, SHELL OIL COMPANY, OCCIDENTAL CHEMICAL CORPORATION (individually and as successor to Occidental Chemical Company and Occidental Chemical Agricultural Products, Inc. Hooker Chemical and Plastics, Occidental Chemical Company of Texas, and Best Fertilizer Company), STANDARD FRUIT COMPANY, STANDARD FRUIT AND STEAMSHIP COMPANY, DEL MONTE FRESH PRODUCE (HAWAII) INC. (previously incorrectly named as Del Monte Fresh Produce Hawaii, Inc.), Respondents/Defendants-Appellees, and DOLE FOOD COMPANY, INC., Respondent/Third-Party Plaintiff-Appellee, vs. DEAD SEA BROMINE CO., LTD. and BROMINE COMPOUNDS, LIMITED, Respondents/Third-Party Defendants-Appellees.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The above-captioned consolidated cases have been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;br /&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;br /&gt;417 South King Street&lt;br /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The oral argument will also be live streamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #25638d; background: transparent; transition: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: bold;" href="mailto:adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov"&gt;adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;or complete the &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #25638d; background: transparent; transition: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: bold;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/ada-accommodation-request-form-2"&gt;Disability Accommodation Request Form&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Thu, 26 Feb 2026 21:07:42 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76724/details.html?t=1772843902000</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-02-26T21:07:42Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>State Neurotrauma Advisory Board - Updated on 04/08/2026 01:32 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76913/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: See Below&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/23 - 2026/04/23&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 01:30 PM - 04:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;div class="WordSection1"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;!-- [if gte mso 9]&gt;&lt;xml&gt;&#xD;

  DrawAspect="Content" ObjectID="_1837160232"&gt;&#xD;
