&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;GOVERNOR OF HAWAI&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;I&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;KE KIA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;ĀINA O KA MOKU&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;ĀINA &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;O HAWAI&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;I&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: right;" align="right"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;KENNETH S. FINK, M.D., MGA, MPH&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: right;" align="right"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;DIRECTOR OF HEALTH&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: right;" align="right"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;KA LUNA HO&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;OKELE&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;STATE OF HAWAI&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;I&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;KA &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk121129734"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;OIHANA OLAKINO&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;P. O. BOX 3378&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;HONOLULU, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96801-3378&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !mso]--&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table width="100%" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&#xD;
&lt;div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 18.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;In reply, please refer to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 18.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;File:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 6.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;!-- [if !mso]--&gt;&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk28671665"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;NEUROTRAUMA ADVISORY BOARD&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1&gt;MEETING AGENDA&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;April 23, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;1:30 p.m. &amp;ndash; 4 p.m.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;The Neurotrauma Advisory Board will be meeting remotely using interactive conference technology. The public is welcome to participate as follows.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Public In-Person Meeting Location &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;3627 Kilauea Avenue, (4th floor) Conference room in Suite 411,&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96816&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Participate Virtually via Zoom &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Click on the link below or copy and paste it into your browser window: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://zoom.us/j/575890360"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;https://zoom.us/j/575890360&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; and enter Meeting ID: 575890360&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;To join by phone &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Dial 1(346) 248-7799 and enter Meeting ID: 575890360# or&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Dial 1(669) 900-6833 and enter Meeting ID: 575890360#&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Public Testimony &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Oral Testimony &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;- Members of the public may testify on each agenda item before the Neurotrauma Advisory Board deliberates on the same. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Written Testimony &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;- To ensure the public as well as its committee members receive such testimony in a timely manner, written testimony should be submitted 48 hours prior to the scheduled meeting date and time. Any written testimony submitted after such time will be distributed to the members and the public at the meeting. Written testimony may be submitted by one of the methods listed below: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo3; margin: 6.0pt 0in 6.0pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;By email to: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:ntrauma@doh.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;ntrauma@doh.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo3; margin: 6.0pt 0in 6.0pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;By U.S. Postal Mail: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo3; margin: 6.0pt 0in 6.0pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Developmental Disabilities Division, Community Resources Branch&lt;br /&gt;Neurotrauma Program, 3627 Kilauea Avenue #411, Honolulu, HI 96816&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo3; margin: 6.0pt 0in 6.0pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;By facsimile to: (808) 733-9841&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2&gt;AGENDA&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;I.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Call to Order, Public Notice, Quorum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -36.7pt; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.35pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 36.7pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;II.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Statement from Public and Written Testimonies Submitted &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Approval of Meeting Minutes of February 26, 2025&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Old Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .75in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Update Neurotrauma Strategic Plan Fiscal Year 2025-2030 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk226445049"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk226445086"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226445049;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Discuss potential agencies with which to partner for senior education, rural health, and brain health&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226445086;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226445049;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;National Association of State Head Injury Administrators/Brain Injury Association of America March 2026 conference highlights&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .75in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226445086;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226445049;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;University of Hawaii College of Education &amp;ndash; status of BrainSpace contract to update videos on best practices when someone is suspected or confirmed for a concussion&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226445049;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Status of Olelo update to Hawaii Concussion Awareness Management Program (HCAMP) BrainSpace concussion videos&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Launch date of updated HCAMP BrainSpace concussion videos&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;V.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;New Business - none &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;VI.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Open Forum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: list 1.0in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Neurotrauma news and announcements from across the state&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -22.3pt; mso-list: l0 level3 lfo1; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 76.3pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Questions and comments from people in attendance on Neurotrauma Strategic Plan Fiscal Year 2025-2030 and/or University of Hawaii College of Education &amp;ndash; status of BrainSpace contract&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -22.3pt; mso-list: l0 level3 lfo1; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 76.3pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;News and announcements from people in attendance on the works of their organization, past, present, future related to neurotrauma&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: list 1.0in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Public comment on issues not on the agenda for consideration at the next meeting. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;VII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Next Neurotrauma Advisory Board Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Date:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;June 25, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Time:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;1:30 pm to 4:00 pm&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Location:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Diamond Head Health Center &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: .5in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;3627 Kilauea Avenue, (4th floor) Conference room in 411&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: .5in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96816&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: .5in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;and &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 67.7pt; text-indent: 40.3pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;Zoom &amp;ndash; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://zoom.us/j/575890360"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%; color: blue;"&gt;https://zoom.us/j/575890360&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; text-indent: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;VIII. Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: 40.3pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact Michele Tong at (808) 733-2152 and &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:michele.tong@doh.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;michele.tong@doh.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;The board packet will be posted on the DOH Neurotrauma Program&amp;rsquo;s website at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://health.hawaii.gov/nt/"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;https://health.hawaii.gov/nt/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; at least three business days before the meeting. Written testimony will also be posted on the Neurotrauma Program website as it is received. You can also find links to minutes, agendas, and meeting materials for past Neurotrauma Advisory Board meetings on the Neurotrauma Program website.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 01 Apr 2026 23:11:26 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76913/details.html?t=1775691127557</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-01T23:11:26Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 2 p.m. - Updated on 04/13/2026 04:23 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76659/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: The oral argument will be held remotely and will be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/23&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 02:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;" data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody"&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Thursday, 04/23/2026, 2 p.m.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&lt;strong data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody"&gt;No. SCWC-25-0000525 (Consolidated with SCWC-25-0000526, SCWC-25-0000527, and SCWC-25-0000528)&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&lt;span style="color: #242424; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"&gt;IN THE MATTER OF THE TAX APPEAL OF PM &amp;amp; AM RESEARCH, INC., Petitioner/Appellant-Appellant, vs. STATE OF HAWAI&amp;lsquo;I, Respondent/Appellee-Appellee&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;" data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody"&gt;The above-captioned&amp;nbsp;&lt;strong&gt;consolidated&lt;/strong&gt;&amp;nbsp;cases have been set for oral argument on the merits at:&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;" data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;br /&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2&lt;sup&gt;nd&lt;/sup&gt;&amp;nbsp;Floor&lt;br /&gt;417 South King Street&lt;br /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&lt;strong style="color: #242424; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts&amp;nbsp;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="color: #242424; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/ subject to &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo&amp;rsquo;s programming availability.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&lt;a style="border: 0px; font: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; color: #467886;" title="Original URL: https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule. Click or tap if you trust this link." href="https://gcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.courts.state.hi.us%2Fcourts%2Foral_arguments%2Foral_arguments_schedule&amp;amp;data=05%7C02%7CRichard.D.Catungal%40courts.hawaii.gov%7C127497416c174db18c7e08de6b561828%7C3f369bd64c534c1596eefc84b0851f6f%7C0%7C0%7C639066214684910411%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;amp;sdata=ja7%2BaOkdjFWMiP59%2FkWjCh08AIMrIFMkw6NMlaxObDA%3D&amp;amp;reserved=0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" data-auth="NotApplicable" data-linkindex="3"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="x_MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif; color: #242424; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to&amp;nbsp;&lt;a style="border: 0px; font: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; color: #467886;" title="mailto:adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov" href="mailto:adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov" data-linkindex="4"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&amp;nbsp;or complete the &amp;nbsp;&lt;a style="border: 0px; font: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; color: #467886;" title="Original URL: https://www.courts.state.hi.us/ada-accommodation-request-form-2. Click or tap if you trust this link." href="https://gcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.courts.state.hi.us%2Fada-accommodation-request-form-2&amp;amp;data=05%7C02%7CRichard.D.Catungal%40courts.hawaii.gov%7C127497416c174db18c7e08de6b561828%7C3f369bd64c534c1596eefc84b0851f6f%7C0%7C0%7C639066214684926833%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;amp;sdata=6B1zJ7D8mZcR3GyqVAeE4xBjyzy9ASedr4TQ0DnyoEU%3D&amp;amp;reserved=0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" data-auth="NotApplicable" data-linkindex="5"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Disability Accommodation Request Form&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 14 Feb 2026 00:30:53 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76659/details.html?t=1776133425657</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-02-14T00:30:53Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Statewide Independent Living Council Executive Committee Meeting</title>

      <description>Location: Hub Coworking Hawaii, Board Room, 1050 Queen St, #100, Honolulu, HI. 96814&lt;br/&gt;

&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"&gt;&lt;span id="docs-internal-guid-8cc4e5a7-7fff-df50-f708-ea71bfc9eb2c"&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: -27pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 27pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;1.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Call to Order&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: -27pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 27pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;2.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Roll Call &amp;amp; Establishment of Quorum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: -27pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 27pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;3.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Approval of Today&amp;rsquo;s Agenda&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: -27pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; padding: 0pt 0pt 0pt 27pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;4.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Planning for May Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-left: 72pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;a.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Discussion and decision on agenda items for May monthly meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;5.&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; Planning for June Quarterly Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.3800027272727273; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;a. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Discussion and decision on location of June meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;&lt;span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

The Committee may not deliberate or act on non-agenda items at this meeting. Matters raised will be considered for a futur&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Roboto,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;e agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;table class="MsoTableGrid" style="border-collapse: collapse; mso-table-layout-alt: fixed; border: none; mso-border-alt: solid windowtext 3.0pt; mso-yfti-tbllook: 1184; mso-padding-alt: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; mso-border-insideh: 3.0pt solid windowtext; mso-border-insidev: 3.0pt solid windowtext;" border="1" width="695" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 0; mso-yfti-firstrow: yes; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes; height: 110.5pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 521.15pt; border: solid windowtext 3.0pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 110.5pt;" valign="top" width="695"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Century Gothic',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mission and Vision&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;The HTSB envisions a highly esteemed Hawaiʻi public education system with rigorous professional teacher standards that foster student success. Our mission is to collaboratively set high teacher licensing and credentialing standards to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Provide every child in Hawaiʻi with qualified teachers.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Promote professionalism and teaching excellence.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Build public confidence in the teaching profession.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Provide more accountability to the public.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10pt; text-indent: -15pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 2.35pt; text-align: center; tab-stops: 166.25pt;" align="center"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;

&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;* &lt;u&gt;WRITTEN TESTIMONY:&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;The Hawaiʻi Teacher Standards Board (HTSB) welcomes public testimony on agenda items. Written testimony submitted and received at least 48 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: 4.5pt;"&gt;hours prior to the meeting will be posted on the Board&amp;rsquo;s website. Testimony sent to any other email address or testimony submitted after the meeting &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;start time, up to 24 hours after the meeting, will be processed as late testimony and will be posted after the meeting. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Persons interested in submitting written public testimony shall &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #222222; background: white;"&gt;submit testimony by one of the following methods&lt;strong&gt;:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Email to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:htsb@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: blue;"&gt;htsb@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt; as an attachment or written directly in your email message (please do not provide links to testimony)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;FAX to 808-586-2606&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Mail to HTSB, 650 Iwilei Road, Suite 268, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 0in 7.5pt 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk160732104"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt;"&gt;All testimony is permanently posted publicly on the HTSB&amp;rsquo;s website and referenced in the Board meeting minutes. Consider this when including personal information (including email addresses, phone numbers, names, and pictures) in your testimony.&amp;nbsp; If you want your personal information redacted, or omitted, submit your testimony as an attachment and include "NO PERSONAL INFORMATION" in the subject line.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -4.5pt; background: white; margin: 0in 0in 7.5pt 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Indicate the following information on written testimony:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Include "Testimony" in the subject line;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Name (or unique identifier) with position/title and organization, if applicable;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Meeting (name of committee or General Business meeting);&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Agenda item; and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Position (support, oppose, or comment)&lt;/span&gt;​&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;ONLINE TESTIMONY: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide online testimony via Zoom must be logged in to Zoom using the same name they used to sign up for testimony. Testifiers shall use the Chat Box to provide their name and agenda item(s) they are testifying on. Testifiers will be called on and unmuted to give their testimony at the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;appropriate&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;time&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in the agenda. Testimony must be related to an item that is on the agenda. Each individual is allotted five minutes, or an amount of time otherwise designated by the Chairperson, to provide testimony to the Board and/or committee.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Y&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; background: white;"&gt;ou may use a unique identifier (i.e., an alias) instead of your real name to maintain anonymity, but on the day of the meeting you&amp;nbsp;must&amp;nbsp;log into Zoom with the&amp;nbsp;same identifier&amp;nbsp;you used to sign up for testimony or you will not be unmuted. If you are testifying in-person, you must answer when your unique identifier is called.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;MEETING MATERIALS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; To reduce costs, electronic materials are posted on the HTSB website,&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="file:///C:/Users/Kellianne/Downloads/%20https:/www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org%20"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; &lt;strong&gt;https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #444444;"&gt;. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;The Board packet is available for inspection in the Board's office. For those who wish to have copies, the HTSB office will make copies of such materials at a cost of $0.25 per sheet, payable by check to HTSB.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;VIRTUAL MEETINGS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; Virtual meeting Zoom links can be found on the top of all agendas. Agendas can be found on the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/apps/pages/index.jsp?uREC_ID=4404111&amp;amp;type=d&amp;amp;pREC_ID=2643473"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;HTSB website&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;PUBLIC MEETING LOCATION:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;650 Iwilei Road, Suite 158, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;strong&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;(Dole Cannery).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;ACCOMMODATIONS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: #202020;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid, service, or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact the Board&amp;rsquo;s office at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:htsb@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;htsb@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: #202020;"&gt; or (808) 784-5580 as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible will give staff additional time to try to fulfill your request. Staff will try to fulfill all requests but cannot guarantee fulfillment.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;PARKING:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l4 level1 lfo2; background: white; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Free parking: Dole Cannery Open-Air Parking Lot &amp;ndash; Free parking is available in the parking lot directly behind the Dole Cannery and adjacent to the Costco parking lot. The lot entry is from Alakawa Street.&amp;nbsp; There is no charge for parking in this free lot (2-hour limit).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l4 level1 lfo2; background: white; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Pay parking: Dole Cannery Parking Structure &amp;ndash; Pay parking is available in the parking structure across Iwilei Road above the Regal Cinema theaters. The entrance is on Pacific Street.&amp;nbsp; You will pay for your parking when you exit the garage.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mailing List:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="http://eepurl.com/h7tW3j"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Sign-up&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;to receive HTSB meeting agendas. Agendas are posted six calendar days in advance of the Board meetings.&lt;strong&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 01:40:35 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77035/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-18T01:40:35Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Special Education Advisory Council (SEAC) Virtual Meeting - Updated on 04/14/2026 05:45 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77017/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Disability and Communication Access Board, 1010 Richards Street, Room 118, Honolulu, HI  96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24 - 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM - 12:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 23.7pt 0.0001pt 2.4pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Special&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.75pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Education&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.8pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Advisory&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Council&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;(SEAC)&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 0.85pt 0in 0.0001pt 1.75pt; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&amp;nbsp;April 24, 2026&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.85pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;9:00&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;a.m.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&amp;ndash;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;12:00&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt;p.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 10.2pt 1.55pt 0.0001pt 13.5pt; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 16.48px;"&gt;The&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Special&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Education&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.85pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Advisory&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Council&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;will&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.25pt;"&gt; r&lt;strong&gt;emotely&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt; using interactive conference technology.&amp;nbsp; The public is welcome to participate as follows:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 10.2pt 135.5pt 0.0001pt 13.5pt; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 16.48px;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;Public&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.7pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;In-Person&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.7pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Location&lt;/u&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;Kamamalu Building&lt;br /&gt;1010 Richards Street, Room 118&lt;br /&gt;Honolulu, HI&amp;nbsp; 96813&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 1.4pt 0in 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 12.7pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Participate&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.8pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Virtually&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;via&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt;Zoom&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 13.5pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Click on the link below or copy and paste it into your browser window:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;a style="color: blue;" href="https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85712059829"&gt;https://us02web.zoom.us/j/85712059829&lt;/a&gt; and enter Meeting ID: 857 1205 9829&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 13.8pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 12.7pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 13.8pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Join&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;by&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt;phone&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Dial (&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;253) 215-8782 and enter Meeting ID:&amp;nbsp; 857 1205 9829&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 12.7pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 13.8pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;u&gt;Public&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.7pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Testimony/Input&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;from&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt;Public&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 0.15pt 5.35pt 0.0001pt 12.7pt; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="color: #212529;"&gt;Members of the public may present comment or testimony during Council meetings on each agenda item prior to any deliberation by the Council.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Members of the public are also welcome to provide written or verbal testimony/comments on any subject related to the delivery of special education services during the agenda item &amp;ldquo;Input from the Public.&amp;rdquo;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Public input is limited to 3-5 minutes per agenda item unless the individual has a communication disability that requires more time.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Any person who needs additional&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;time&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;present&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;or&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;comments&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;is&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;encouraged&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;contact&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;SEAC&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;office&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;advance of the meeting.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;This rule shall be placed at the beginning of all Council meetings.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 0.25pt 0in 0in; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 0in 5.35pt 0.0001pt 12.05pt; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Written&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimony/comments&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&amp;ndash;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #212529;"&gt;There is no deadline for submission of testimony, however, to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;ensure&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;public&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;as&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;well&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;as&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;SEAC&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;members&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;can&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;review&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimony prior to the meeting, written testimony is requested no later than 9:00 a.m. one business day prior to the scheduled meeting date&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;and&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;time.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Written testimony may be submitted by one of the methods listed below:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 7.9pt 0in 0.0001pt 13.5pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 22px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 24px; color: #212529;"&gt;By&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;email&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="color: blue;" href="mailto:spin@doh.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt;spin@doh.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 13.5pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;By U.S. Postal Mail: SEAC Chair, 1010 Richards Street, Room 118, Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 13.5pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 13.5pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;By facsimile&lt;span style="color: #212529; letter-spacing: -0.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #212529;"&gt;to:&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;(808) 586-&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt;8129&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 13.5pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; color: #212529; letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;11:15 a.m.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; H.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Priority-Setting&amp;nbsp; Related to the Development of Micro-Learning and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Members will review suggestions offered in small group discussions at&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; the February meeting and select a topic/platform for a SEAC project.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;11:30 a.m.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; I.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Review of Minutes from the February 13, 2026 SEAC Meeting*&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
