&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;11:45 a.m.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; K.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Legislative Committee Report by Susan Rocco&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Members be updated on the following legislation selected by members&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; for action that is still moving through the Legislature:&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 126.45pt; text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="color: blue;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1888&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;HB1888 HD3 SD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;ndash; &lt;strong&gt;Relating to the Safety of Educational Workers&lt;/strong&gt;.&amp;nbsp; Part I: Requires the Department of Education and public charter schools to take certain steps to report incidents of harassment and implement procedures for handling harassment of educational workers, including sports officials. Authorizes the Attorney General to assist educational workers who have been subject to harassment or intentional bodily injury in obtaining a temporary restraining order. Part II: Clarifies that a sports official includes a school or league administrator. Clarifies that a sports official's duties cover sports events at public schools and private schools. Makes intentional bodily injury of an educational worker or a sports official engaged in the lawful discharge of their duties a class B felony. Part III: Elevates &lt;/span&gt;the &lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;penalty for harassment of educational workers to a misdemeanor.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 126.45pt; text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="color: blue;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1891&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;HB1891 HD1 SD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt; - &lt;strong&gt;Relating to Education.&amp;nbsp; &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="color: #212529;"&gt;Requires the Department of Education to implement dyslexia sensitive linguistically appropriate universal screenings and evidence-based interventions, offer professional development on structured literacy and evidenced-based interventions, and support pre-teacher programs in training candidates in structured literacy instruction&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 126.45pt; text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="color: blue;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1894&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;HB1894 HD1 SD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; color: #212529;"&gt; - &lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Relating to Education.&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; color: #212529;"&gt;Requires the Department of Education to include the instruction of braille and provision of braille instructional materials under certain circumstances; provide braille literacy support services; provide comprehensive information about braille literacy services, assistive technology devices, and assistive technology services, including educational programming options; and participate in the development of section 504 plans and individualized education programs.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0.4pt 4.5pt 0.0001pt 126.45pt; text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;4.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="color: blue;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=2296&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;HB2296&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; HD1 SD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; color: blue; letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;ndash;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Relating&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;School&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Meals.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;Reduces&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;amount&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the Department of Education is required to charge for school meals to all students enrolled in department schools from half to not less than one-quarter of the cost of preparing the meal.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;12:00 p.m.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; L.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;*Action required.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact SEAC at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="color: blue;" href="mailto:spin@doh.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;spin@doh.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt; or (808) 586-8126 (V/T) as soon as possible.&amp;nbsp; Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;The agenda and meeting materials for this meeting are available for inspection in the SPIN office located at 1010 Richards Street, Room 118, Honolulu, HI 96813 and on SEAC&amp;rsquo;s website:&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="color: blue;" href="https://seac-hawaii.org/agendas"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;https://seac-hawaii.org/agendas&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;SEAC meetings utilize the Leading by Convening process developed by the IDEA Partnership.&amp;nbsp; As we discuss agenda items, the following questions are considered:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 0.5in; text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 16.8667px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 18.4px;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 18.4px;"&gt;Who cares about this issue and why?&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 0.5in; text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 16.8667px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 18.4px;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 18.4px;"&gt;What work is already underway?&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 0.5in; text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 16.8667px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 18.4px;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 18.4px;"&gt;What shared work can inform and unite us?&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 0.5in; text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; line-height: 16.8667px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 18.4px;"&gt;4.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; line-height: 18.4px;"&gt;How can we deepen our connection?&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;If the remote connection (via Zoom) is lost due to connectivity issues or temporarily halted due to procedures to block an attempted Zoom bombing, the meeting will be recessed for up to 20 minutes to restore communication.&amp;nbsp; Individuals attending the meeting are asked to attempt to rejoin the meeting using the same meeting link.&amp;nbsp; If the meeting is unable to reconvene within 20 minutes, the meeting will be automatically terminated.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 15 Apr 2026 03:31:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77017/details.html?t=1776224704945</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-15T03:31:00Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Endangered Species Recovery Committee Public Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77023/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 1151 Punchbowl St, Honolulu, HI 96813 Kalanimoku Building RM #325&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;See agenda attached.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Thu, 16 Apr 2026 20:27:28 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77023/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-16T20:27:28Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Real Estate Commission Meeting - Updated on 04/17/2026 08:08 AM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77029/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Queen Liliuokalani Conference Room, King Kalakaua Building, 335 Merchant Street, 1st Floor, Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoTitle" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; REAL ESTATE COMMISSION MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Professional and Vocational Licensing Division&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;State of Hawaii&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;a href="http://www.hawaii.gov/hirec"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;www.hawaii.gov/hirec&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; text-indent: 1.5in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; text-indent: 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Date:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Friday, April 24, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; text-indent: 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Time:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;9:00 a.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Place:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Queen Liliuokalani Conference Room&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;King Kalakaua Building&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;335 Merchant Street, First Floor&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Agenda: Posted on the State electronic calendar as required by HRS section 92-7(b).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;If you wish to submit written testimony on any agenda item, please email your testimony to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; color: #0562c1;"&gt;hirec@dcca.hawaii.gov &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;or by hard copy mail to: Attn: Real Estate Commission, 335 Merchant Street, Room 333, Honolulu, HI 96813. We request submission of testimony at least 24 hours prior to the meeting to ensure that it can be distributed to the Board members.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Members of the public may attend the meeting in person at 335 Merchant Street, in the Queen Liliuokalani Conference Room. Subject to the availability of &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo personnel, members of the public may also view the meeting by internet live streaming at &lt;a href="https://olelo.org/tune-in/channels/"&gt;https://olelo.org/tune-in/channels/&lt;/a&gt;, and by televised live broadcast on &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo TV (scheduled for channel 49, but subject to change).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;The Commission may move into Executive Session to consider and evaluate personal information relating to individuals applying for licensure in accordance with Section 92-5(a)(1), HRS, and/or to consult with the Commission&amp;rsquo;s attorney on questions and issues pertaining to the Commission&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities in accordance with Section 92-5(a)(4), HRS.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; tab-stops: -1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Call to Order, Public Notice, Quorum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in; tab-stops: 157.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;2.&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;Chair's Report&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Executive Officer's Report&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: -1.0in; margin: 0in 9.9pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;The Commission shall afford all interested persons an opportunity to submit data, views, or arguments, in writing, on any agenda item and shall provide all interested parties an opportunity to present oral testimony on any agenda item subject to the conditions set forth in Section 16-99-83, HAR.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;The Commission may remove any person or persons, who willfully disrupt a meeting to prevent and compromise the conduct of the meeting in accordance with Section 92-3, HRS.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: -1.0in; margin: 0in 9.9pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;b.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Minutes of Previous Meeting &amp;ndash; March 27, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; margin: 0in 9.9pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;d.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;In the Matter of the Real Estate Broker Entity License of Cadmus Properties Corporation and the Real Estate Broker&amp;rsquo;s License of Caesar Paet: REC 2024-155-L; Settlement Agreement Prior to Filing of Petition for Disciplinary Action and Commission&amp;rsquo;s Final Order&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;8.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Next Meeting:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Friday, April 24, 2026, 9:00 a.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Queen Liliuokalani Conference Room&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;King Kalakaua Building&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;335 Merchant Street, First Floor&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;9.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: .2in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Miles Ino, Executive Officer, at (844) 808-3222, Ext. #1, then #8 or at &lt;a href="mailto:hirec@dcca.hawaii.gov"&gt;hirec@dcca.hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;, &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;as soon as possible, preferably within two (2) business days of the meeting.&amp;nbsp; If a response is received after that date, we will try to obtain the auxiliary aid/service or accommodation, but we cannot guarantee that the request will be fulfilled.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate formats such as large print, Braille, or electronic copy.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 18:06:19 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77029/details.html?t=1776449325124</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-17T18:06:19Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>04-24-2026 Board of Land and Natural Resources - Updated on 04/17/2026 10:23 AM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77030/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 1151 Punchbowl St., Room 132, Honolulu, Hawaii 96813, via ZOOM and Live Stream&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 2.75in; margin: 0in 5.0pt .0001pt 2.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;DATE:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;April 24, 2026 &lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 2.75in; margin: 0in 5.0pt .0001pt 2.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt;TIME:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="haw" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;9:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;00&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="haw" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt; a.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 2.75in; margin: 0in 5.0pt .0001pt 2.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt;PLACE:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; DLNR Boardroom, Kalanimoku Bldg.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 5pt 0.0001pt 2in; padding-left: 80px;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;1151&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Punchbowl&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Street,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;1&lt;sup&gt;st&lt;/sup&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Floor / &lt;/span&gt;&amp;amp; Online&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;via&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Zoom&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 2.75in; margin: 0in 5.0pt .0001pt 2.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;ID: 858 1057 7939&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 2.75in; margin: 0in 5.0pt .0001pt 2.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;ZOOM LINK:&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://us06web.zoom.us/j/85810577939"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;https://us06web.zoom.us/j/85810577939&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 2.75in; margin: 0in 5.0pt .0001pt 2.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;LIVE STREAM:&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.youtube.com/live/9iOK3hrLrCQ"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;https://www.youtube.com/live/9iOK3hrLrCQ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 2.75in; margin: 0in 5.0pt .0001pt 2.0in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 5.0pt; tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;This agenda and the listed submittals will be provided in the Board Packet. This meeting will be held using interactive conference technology under section 92-3.7, Hawaii Revised Statutes (HRS).&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Board members, staff,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;applicants,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testifiers, and the public&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;can&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;choose&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;participate&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;person,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; online&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;via&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Zoom,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;or&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;by telephone. The&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;public&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;may also&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;view&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the live&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;via&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;its&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;live&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;stream&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;at:&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.youtube.com/live/9iOK3hrLrCQ"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;https://www.youtube.com/live/9iOK3hrLrCQ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 5.0pt; tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;To&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Provide&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Written&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-no-proof: yes;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 5.0pt; tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;We encourage interested persons to submit written testimony in advance of the meeting, which will be distributed to Board members prior to the meeting and allow a timely review. Please submit written testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;via&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;email&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:blnr.testimony@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;blnr.testimony@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;. Written&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimonies&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;can also be mailed to: &lt;u&gt;P.O. Box 621, Honolulu, Hawaii 96809&lt;/u&gt;. Written testimonies may be posted upon the Board of Land and Natural Resources meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;website;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;as&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;a&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;precaution,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;please&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;mindful&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;with&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;any&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;personal information&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;prior&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;submitting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;unless&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;you&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;intend&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;it&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;shared&lt;/u&gt;.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 1.75pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Late&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;written&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;will&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;retained&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;as part of the record and distributed to Board members as soon as practicable, but we cannot ensure the Board will receive it in sufficient time to review, prior to decision-making.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 5.0pt; tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;To&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Provide&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;In-Person&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Oral&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Testimony (masks are highly encouraged)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 5.0pt; tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Attend&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in-person&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;at: 1151&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Punchbowl&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;St.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Room&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;132&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;(Kalanimoku&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Building),&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Honolulu,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Hawaii.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 5.0pt; tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;To Provide Testimony by Telephone&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;On&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt; the day of&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the meeting at the start of&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the agenda item you wish&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to testify&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;on,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;dial &lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;1-719-359-4580&lt;/span&gt; (Zoom);&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;input&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;ID:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;858 1057 7939 &lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt;and follow the prompts.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 5.0pt; tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;To Provide Video/Zoom Testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 5.0pt; tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Please send your request in a timely manner to: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:blnr.testimony@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;blnr.testimony@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt; with your information, email address, and the agenda item you wish to testify on. Once your request has been received, you will receive a confirmation email with pertinent information. You may testify without signing up in advance.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;We&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;kindly&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;ask&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;that&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;all&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;oral/video testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;limited&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;not&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;more&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;than&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;two (2) &lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;minutes. We ask that you identify yourself and any affiliation before speaking, but you can choose not to do so.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact, BLNR Secretary, at 808.587.0404 or &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:blnr.testimony@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;blnr.testimony@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt; as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. Upon request, this agenda and other materials are available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-font-width: 105%; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;The Board may go into Executive Session pursuant to section 92-5(a)(4), HRS, in order to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;consult with its attorney on questions and issues pertaining&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to the Board's&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.85pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;powers, duties,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.9pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;privileges, immunities,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-font-width: 105%;"&gt;and&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;liabilities.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;In some of the matters before the Board, a person may wish to request a contested case hearing.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;If&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;such a request is made before the Board's decision, then the Board will consider the request first -&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;before considering the merits of the item before it.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 3.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;A person who wants a contested case may also&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;wait until the Board decides the issue, then request the contested case after the decision but before the close of the board meeting.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;It is up to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;you.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Any request must also be made in writing within ten calendar days.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 3.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;If no request for contested case is made,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-font-width: 95%;"&gt;the Board&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .95pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;will&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;make&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;a&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;decision.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.8pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;The&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Department&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;will&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;treat&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .85pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;decision&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 1.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;as&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;final&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;and&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;proceed&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .8pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;accordingly.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: 9.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;NOTE:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Agenda Items may be taken out of order.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;MINUTES&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;Approval of March 27, 2026 Meeting Minutes.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;DIVISION OF FORESTRY AND WILDLIFE&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;Request the approval of a competitive sealed proposal for a solicitation and to delegate authority to the Chairperson to award and execute a contract to manage Nā Ala Hele Trail Crews on O&amp;lsquo;ahu and Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Island.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;D.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;LAND DIVISION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Informational Briefing on the County of Maui, Department of the East Maui Water Authority&amp;rsquo;s Operational Capacity and Planning Related to the East Maui Irrigation System, Koolau Forest Reserve, Island of Maui, Hawaiʻi; Tax Map Keys: (2) 1-1-001:004 and 050; 1-1-002: 002 (por.); 1-2-004:005 and 007; 2-9-014:001, 005, 011, 012 and 017.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

S-4330, Michael T. and Janis Y. Nakashima, Lessees, and S4359, Michael Nakashima, Lessee; Hilo Industrial Development, Waiakea, South Hilo, Hawaii, Tax Map Key: (3) 2-2-037:122 &amp;amp; 088 respectively.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Approval to Commence Condemnation Proceedings to Acquire Private Land Identified as Tax Map Key (1) 7-4-001:025, for the Division of Conservation and Resource Enforcement for Substation Purposes, Located in Wahiawa, Hawaii.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

Nonaka, Permittees, Hanapepe Valley, Waimea, Kauai, Tax Map Keys: (4)1-9-001:002 and 1-9-002:002.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

Andrade, Permittee, Kalaheo, Koloa, Kauai, Tax Map Key: (4) 2-3-007:013.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;6.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Set Aside of Lands to the Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity, Pursuant to Act 90, Session Laws of Hawaii 2003, for Agriculture Purposes, Encumbered by Revocable Permit No. S-7712, Jeannett Virginia Martins, Permittee, Kawaihau, Kapaa, Kauai, Tax Map Key: (4) 6-005:010.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;7.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Grant of Perpetual, Non-Exclusive Easement to Humuhumu Services, LLC and Starfish Infrastructure, Inc. for Submarine Communication Cable Purposes on State Submerged Lands; Issuance of Immediate Construction and Management Right-of-Entry Permit; off Kapolei, Ewa, Oahu, Tax Map Key: (1) 9-1-026: seaward of 027.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;8.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Issuance of Right-of-Entry Permit to Hawaii Explosive &amp;amp; Pyrotechnics Inc. for Aerial Fireworks Display at Duke Kahanamoku Beach Every Friday from June 5, 2026, through May 28, 2027, Waikiki, Honolulu, Oahu, Tax Map Key: (1) 2-3-037: portion of 021. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;F.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;DIVISION OF AQUATIC RESOURCES&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Request for Authorization and Approval to Issue a Papahānaumokuākea Permit to Mr. James Morioka, Papahānaumokuākea Marine Debris Project (PMDP), for Access to State Waters to Survey and Remove Marine Debris and Disentangle Marine Life as Needed.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Request for Authorization and Approval to Issue a Papahānaumokuākea Native Hawaiian Practices Permit to Pelika Andrade, Nā Maka Onaona and the University of Hawai&amp;lsquo;i at Mānoa, for Access to State Waters to use Traditional Ecological Knowledge to Conduct Intertidal Surveys and Monitoring.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;H.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;ADMIN&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;Amend prior Board action of January 9, 2026, Item H-2, Request to Conduct Two (2) Public Hearings on the Island of Oahu Regarding Eurus Energy America LLC&amp;rsquo;s Application to Directly Lease State Lands for the Construction and Operation of a Renewable Hydrogen Generation Facility, Honouliuli, Ewa, Oahu, Tax Map Key: (1) 9-1-031:001; Lot 12022, Map 888, Land Court Application No. 1069; Certificate of Title No. 498,504.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;Amend Prior Board Action of November 14, 2025, Item H-1, Authorize the Withdrawal of Approximately 100.7 Acres from Governor&amp;rsquo;s Executive Order No. 4584 to the Department of Agriculture &amp;amp; Biosecurity (formerly known as the Department of Agriculture) for Agriculture Purposes, Honouliuli, Ewa, Oahu, Tax Map Key: (1) 9-1-031:001; Lot 12022, Map 888, Land Court Application No. 1069; Certificate of Title No. 498,504.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;The purpose of this amendment is to change the name of the applicant from Eurus Energy America LLC to EE EWA LLC and correct a typographical error.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;I.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;HISTORIC PRESERVATION DIVISION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;Approval of Mālama Kanakilua, Hoʻoponopono o Mākena, and Pele Defense Fund&amp;rsquo;s Petition for Rulemaking Filed on March 25, 2026.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;Pursuant to Hawaii Revised Statutes &amp;sect;92-5(a) (4) the Board may go into Executive Session to consult with its attorney on questions and issues pertaining to the Board&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, immunities and liabilities.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: .25in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;K.&lt;span style="color: black;"&gt; &lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;OFFICE OF CONSERVATION AND COASTAL LANDS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;INTENTIONALLY LEFT BLANK&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Conservation District Use Application (CDUA) OA-3992 by Humuhumu Services, LLC and Starfish Infrastructure, Inc. for the Oʻahu Subsea Cable Project located on submerged lands offshore of Barbers Point Beach Park, Honouliuli, ʻEwa, Oʻahu, Tax Map Key (TMK) parcel (1) 9-1-026:027.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;M.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;OTHERS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -0.25in; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Cancel Governor&amp;rsquo;s Executive Order No. 3887 and Reset Aside to the Department of Human Services for Public Housing Purposes; Delegate of Authority to the Director of Human Services to Issue Term, Up to 65 years, Non-Exclusive Easements and Associated Right-of-Entry Permits for Infrastructure Purposes at Kauhale Project at Waimanalo, Koolaupoko, Oahu; TMK (1) 4-1-013:010.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Delegation of Authority to the Director of Human Services to Issue Term, Non-Exclusive Easements, Up to 65 Years, and Associated Right-of-Entry Permits for the Provision of Infrastructure at Kauhale Project at Kahauiki, Honolulu, Oahu, Tax Map Key: (1) 1-1-006:003.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>

    <item>

A&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;physical meeting location will be open to the public for those who wish to provide oral testimony or observe the meeting in person at: Office of Hawaiian Affairs, 560 N. Nimitz Hwy., Suite 200, Honolulu, HI 96817.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: -.5in; tab-stops: 455.85pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk190435914"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 45.0pt; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;I.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Call to Order&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 45.0pt; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;II.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;New Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Request for approval to waive the following agenda items&amp;mdash;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: #242424;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;2026 Legislative Session and Rapid Response Approval testimony submittal Updates; 2026 Federal and County Level Legislative Proposals Affecting Native Hawaiians Update; bill position Matrices 1-10, including OHA Position on Governor's Messages for State Board and Commissions Confirmation; and 2026 Honolulu Charter Commission: OHA Position on Charter Amendment Proposals&amp;mdash;from the Committee on Beneficiary Advocacy and Empowerment (BAE) to the Board of Trustees, pursuant to the Office of Hawaiian Affairs Board of Trustees Bylaws (September 4, 2025), Article VIII, Section M.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;Administration Update- &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Legislative Session and Rapid Response Approval Testimony&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Submittal Updates-No deliberation or decision-making &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;Administration Update- &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Federal and County Level Legislative Proposals Affecting Native Hawaiians- No deliberation or decision-making&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;D.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;OHA Positions on 2026 Legislative Bills &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
