&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;4. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Legislature: OHA Position on Bills &amp;amp; Measures Affecting Natural Resources and Native Hawaiian Traditional &amp;amp; Customary Practices - &lt;strong&gt;Matrix 4 &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;5. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Legislature: OHA Position on Bills &amp;amp; Measures Affecting Native Hawaiian Housing - &lt;strong&gt;Matrix 5 &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;6. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Legislature: OHA Position on Bills &amp;amp; Measures Affecting Native Hawaiian Health -&lt;strong&gt;Matrix 6 &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;7. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Legislature: OHA Position on Bills &amp;amp; Measures Affecting Native Hawaiian Education -&lt;strong&gt;Matrix 7 &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;8. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Legislature: OHA Position on Bills &amp;amp; Measures Affecting Native Hawaiian Economic Stability - &lt;strong&gt;Matrix 8 &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;9. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Legislature: OHA Position on Bills &amp;amp; Measures Affecting Hawaiʻi Revised Statutes Chapter 6E (Iwi kupuna and historic preservation) &amp;ndash; &lt;strong&gt;Matrix 9 &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;10. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;2026 Legislature: OHA Position on Governor&amp;rsquo;s Messages for State Board and Commissions Confirmation- &lt;strong&gt;Matrix 10&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;E. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;2026 Honolulu Charter Commission: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;OHA Position on Charter Amendment Proposals&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 45.0pt; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Executive Session&amp;sect; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 49.5pt; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Aptos;"&gt;The BAE Committee anticipates convening in an executive meeting pursuant to HRS &amp;sect; 92- 5(a)(4) to receive updated information, consult with its legal counsel, and take any necessary action regarding the Committee's powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities with respect to Public Land Trusts bills identified in "2026 Legislature: OHA Position on Bills &amp;amp; Measures Affecting the Public Land Trust - Matrix 3."&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 49.5pt; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Approval of Executive Session Minutes&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 63.0pt; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level4 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;December 18, 2025&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 63.0pt; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level4 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;March 19, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 45.0pt; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Announcements&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNoSpacing" style="margin-left: 45.0pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: -.5in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk190435914;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both; mso-bidi-font-style: italic; mso-no-proof: yes;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;V.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Adjournment &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both; mso-no-proof: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both; mso-no-proof: yes;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact Keola Fong at (808) 626-5484 or by email at keolaf@oha.org as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;In the event that the livestream public broadcast is interrupted and cannot be restored, the meeting may continue as audio-only through the phone number and Webinar ID provided at the beginning of this agenda. Meeting recordings will be made available on OHA&amp;rsquo;s website https://www.oha.org/about/leadership/board-of-trustees/ as soon as practicable after the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;Public Testimony will be called for each agenda item and must be limited to matters listed on the meeting agenda. Community Concerns and Celebrations is not limited to matters listed on the meeting agenda. Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Revised Statutes, Chapter 92, prohibits Board members from discussing or taking action on matters not listed on the meeting agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;The board packet will be available for the public to inspect at OHA&amp;rsquo;s main office located at 560 N. Nimitz Hwy., Suite 200, Honolulu, HI 96817, no later than three full business days before the meeting. The board packet will also be made available on OHA&amp;rsquo;s website, https://www.oha.org/bot as soon as practicable thereafter.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;&amp;sect; Notice: This portion of the meeting will be closed pursuant to HRS &amp;sect; 92-5.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;Testimony can be provided to the Board of Trustees either as: (1) written testimony or (2) live, oral testimony online, by telephone, or at the physical meeting location during the remote meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;(1)&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Persons wishing to provide written testimony on items listed on the agenda should submit testimony via email to botmeetings@oha.org or via postal mail to Office of Hawaiian Affairs, Attn: Board of Trustees Meeting Testimony, 560 N. Nimitz Hwy., Suite 200, Honolulu, HI 96817. Testimony is requested to be received at least twenty-four hours prior to the scheduled meeting to allow board members with sufficient time to review the testimony before the meeting. All written testimony will be posted on OHA&amp;rsquo;s meeting website. Please omit or redact any personal information (e.g., name, email address, phone number, home address, or materials) that you do not want to be disclosed publicly online.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;(2)&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Persons wishing to provide oral testimony online during the remote meeting, please click on the link below: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://zoom.us/j/95901831017"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;https://zoom.us/j/95901831017&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;To provide oral testimony online, you will need:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;(1)&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;a computer or mobile device to connect to the remote meeting;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;(2)&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;internet access; and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;(3)&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;a microphone to provide oral testimony.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide oral testimony by telephone during the remote meeting may dial the phone number listed at the beginning of this agenda and enter the corresponding Webinar ID. Telephone participants will be able to provide oral testimony during the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide oral testimony at the physical meeting location can sign up the day of the meeting at the physical meeting location.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;If you willfully disrupt the meeting, support staff will remove you from the Zoom meeting. You can continue to view the remainder of the meeting on the livestream or by telephone, as provided at the beginning of this agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;Oral testimony online, by telephone or at a physical meeting location will be limited to five (5) minutes. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 21:26:43 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77031/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-17T21:26:43Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>HTSB Legislative Committee Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77036/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 650 Iwilei Road, Suite 158, Honolulu, HI 96817 and Zoom Virtual Meeting (See Agenda)&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table class="MsoNormalTable" style="margin-left: 8.15pt; border-collapse: collapse; border-image: initial; width: 57.6636%; height: 462px; border: medium none currentcolor;" border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 232.35pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-hansi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-no-proof: yes;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if gte vml 1]&gt;&lt;v:shapetype&#xD;

&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="text-align: center; margin: 0in 191.8pt .0001pt 194.85pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;10:00 AM&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin: .5pt 0in .0001pt 0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.5pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-hansi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin: 0.05pt 0in 0.0001pt 0.5in; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -70.05pt;"&gt;Telephone: 808-784-5580 &amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; FAX: 808-586-2606&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;tr style="height: 92px;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 0%; border-width: medium 3pt 3pt; border-style: none solid solid; border-color: currentcolor black black; border-image: initial; padding: 0in; height: 92px;" colspan="3" valign="top" width="686"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mission and Vision&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;The HTSB envisions a highly esteemed Hawaiʻi public education system with rigorous professional teacher standards that foster student success. Our mission is to collaboratively set high teacher licensing and credentialing standards to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Provide every child in Hawaiʻi with qualified teachers.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Promote professionalism and teaching excellence.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Build public confidence in the teaching profession. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 16.35pt; text-indent: -16.35pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo6;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;Provide more accountability to the public.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="height: 155px;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 0%; border-width: medium 1pt 3pt 3pt; border-style: none solid solid; border-color: currentcolor black black; padding: 0in; height: 155px;" valign="top" width="71"&gt;&#xD;

&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo7; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/4787dd04/80eb260a/bff7d562fa4a47c887690ad3d61f6273?_=NBI%2025-45%202026%20Legislative%20PIG%27s%20Work%20Completion.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;NBI 25-45&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; color: red;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;Completion of the 2026 Legislative Permitted Interaction Group&amp;rsquo;s Work&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: -4.7pt; text-indent: 4.7pt;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 0%; border-width: medium 3pt 3pt medium; border-style: none solid solid none; border-color: currentcolor black black currentcolor; padding: 0in; height: 155px;" valign="top" width="68"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt; line-height: 9.55pt; mso-line-height-rule: exactly;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Raymond&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: .4pt 0in .0001pt 0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 3.5pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-hansi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;* &lt;u&gt;WRITTEN TESTIMONY:&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: 4.5pt;"&gt;The Hawaiʻi Teacher Standards Board (HTSB) welcomes public testimony on agenda items. Written testimony submitted and received at least 48 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;hours prior to the meeting will be posted on the Board&amp;rsquo;s website. Testimony sent to any other email address or testimony submitted after the meeting &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: 4.5pt;"&gt;start time, up to 24 hours after the meeting, will be processed as late testimony and will be posted after the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Persons interested in submitting written public testimony shall &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #222222; background: white;"&gt;submit testimony by one of the following methods&lt;strong&gt;:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Email to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:htsb@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: blue;"&gt;htsb@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt; as an attachment or written directly in your email message (please do not provide links to testimony)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;FAX to 808-586-2606&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Mail to HTSB, 650 Iwilei Road, Suite 268, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 0in 7.5pt 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk160732104"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt;"&gt;All testimony is permanently posted publicly on the HTSB&amp;rsquo;s website and referenced in the Board meeting minutes. Consider this when including personal information (including email addresses, phone numbers, names, and pictures) in your testimony.&amp;nbsp; If you want your personal information redacted, or omitted, submit your testimony as an attachment and include "NO PERSONAL INFORMATION" in the subject line.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -4.5pt; background: white; margin: 0in 0in 7.5pt 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Indicate the following information on written testimony:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Include "Testimony" in the subject line;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Name (or unique identifier) with position/title and organization, if applicable;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Meeting (name of committee or General Business meeting);&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Agenda item; and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Position (support, oppose, or comment)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Raleway; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; background: white;"&gt;​&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;ONLINE TESTIMONY:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide online testimony via Zoom must be logged in to Zoom using the same name they used to sign up for testimony. Testifiers shall use the Chat Box to provide their name and agenda item(s) they are testifying on. Testifiers will be called on and unmuted to give their testimony at the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;appropriate&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;time&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in the agenda. Testimony must be related to an item that is on the agenda. Each individual is allotted five minutes, or an amount of time otherwise designated by the Chairperson, to provide testimony to the Board and/or committee.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; background: white;"&gt;You may use a unique identifier (i.e., an alias) instead of your real name to maintain anonymity, but on the day of the meeting you&amp;nbsp;must&amp;nbsp;log into Zoom with the&amp;nbsp;same identifier&amp;nbsp;you used to sign up for testimony or you will not be unmuted. If you are testifying in-person, you must answer when your unique identifier is called.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;MEETING MATERIALS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; To reduce costs, electronic materials are posted on the HTSB website,&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: blue;"&gt;https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #444444;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;The Board packet is available for inspection in the Board's office. For those who wish to have copies, the HTSB office will make copies of such materials at a cost of $0.25 per sheet, payable by check to HTSB.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;VIRTUAL MEETINGS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; Virtual meeting Zoom links can be found on the top of all agendas. Agendas can be found on the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/apps/pages/index.jsp?uREC_ID=4404111&amp;amp;type=d&amp;amp;pREC_ID=2643473"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;HTSB website&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;PUBLIC MEETING LOCATION:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;650 Iwilei Road, Suite 158, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;strong&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;(Dole Cannery).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;ACCOMMODATIONS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: #202020;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid, service, or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact the Board&amp;rsquo;s office at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:htsb@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;htsb@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: #202020;"&gt; or (808) 784-5580 as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible will give staff additional time to try to fulfill your request. Staff will try to fulfill all requests but cannot guarantee fulfillment.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;PARKING:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l4 level1 lfo1; background: white; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Free parking: Dole Cannery Open-Air Parking Lot &amp;ndash; Free parking is available in the parking lot directly behind the Dole Cannery and adjacent to the Costco parking lot. The lot entry is from Alakawa Street.&amp;nbsp; There is no charge for parking in this free lot (2-hour limit).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l4 level1 lfo1; background: white; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Pay parking: Dole Cannery Parking Structure &amp;ndash; Pay parking is available in the parking structure across Iwilei Road above the Regal Cinema theaters. The entrance is on Pacific Street.&amp;nbsp; You will pay for your parking when you exit the garage.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mailing List:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="http://eepurl.com/h7tW3j"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Sign-up&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt; to receive HTSB meeting agendas. Agendas are posted six calendar days in advance of the Board meetings.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 01:47:33 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77036/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-18T01:47:33Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>HBGN Board Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77043/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 235 S. Beretania St, Honolulu, HI, 6th floor conference room&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24 - 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p style="text-align: center;"&gt;HAWAIʻI BOARD ON GEOGRAPHIC NAMES (HBGN) &lt;br /&gt;Notice of Meeting and Agenda &lt;br /&gt;235 S. Beretania Street &lt;br /&gt;6th floor Conference Room &lt;br /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813 &lt;br /&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;br /&gt;Friday, April 24, 2026 &lt;br /&gt;10:00 a.m. &lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/em&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;The Hawaiʻi Board on Geographic Names (HBGN) meetings utilize a Zoom webinar format. Remote attendees will not be able to speak, ask questions, show their video, or use screen share unless recognized by the Chair. &lt;/em&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/em&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;If you&amp;rsquo;re attending remotely and you have questions or would like to provide comments during the meeting, please use the Zoom Raise Hand function to notify the Chair that you would like to speak. When the Chair recognizes you, the meeting facilitator will unmute your microphone. If you prefer or don&amp;rsquo;t have a microphone, you may ask your questions or make comments using the Zoom Q&amp;amp;A function. &lt;/em&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/em&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;As authorized under Act 220, Session Laws of Hawaiʻi 2021, this meeting will be held with Board Members, Staff, and Agencies participating in-person at the above location or via Zoom online meeting venue. &lt;/em&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt; &lt;br /&gt;Zoom webinar information: &lt;br /&gt;URL: https://bit.ly/hbgn_20260424 &lt;br /&gt;or dial: (669) 900 6833 [audio only] &lt;br /&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;br /&gt;Webinar ID: 847 4121 0335 &lt;br /&gt;Passcode: 700178 &lt;br /&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;A G E N D A&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;1.&lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Call to Order&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;2.&lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Review and approval of meeting minutes for February 13, 2026 &lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;The Board will review/amend the minutes from the previous meeting and will vote on whether or not to approve them at this time. [Action item]&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;3.&lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Public comments. &lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;Participants may provide comments about issues not on the agenda for possible inclusion on a future agenda. [Not an action item]&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;4.&lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Announcements. &lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;Participants may share information not requiring Board discussion, action, or decision making. [Not an action item]&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;5.&lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Follow up on the renaming of Sand Island, Oʻahu to Mauiliola. &lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;Board members will identify next steps in effecting a name change for the State Park on Mauliola and any other actions that may be needed. [Action Item]&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;6.&lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Identify agenda items for next meeting. &lt;br /&gt;&lt;em&gt;Board members will identify next items to be included on the agenda for the next meeting.. [Action Item]&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;7.&lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Adjourn&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Meeting Materials:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;br /&gt;Meeting materials will be available in advance of the meeting on HBGN&amp;rsquo;s website (https://planning.hawaii.gov/gis/hbgn/hbgn-meeting-materials).&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Zoom meeting information:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;br /&gt;To participate via the Zoom link provided, you will need a computer or mobile device with internet access, and a microphone (recommended). You will be muted during the meeting unless you have been recognized by the Chair and are testifying or actively participating in a discussion. You may also access the Zoom meeting by phone only by using the dial-in phone number, meeting ID, and meeting passcode information provided at the top of this agenda.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;If connection is lost, the meeting may reconvene when either audiovisual communication or audio-only communication is established within thirty minutes.&amp;nbsp; The public may access the reconvened meeting by clicking the link again.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;If it is not possible to reconvene the meeting within 30 minutes after an interruption, then check HBGN&amp;rsquo;s website (https://planning.hawaii.gov/gis/hbgn) for information as to whether the meeting will be continued to an alternative date and time, or the meeting may be terminated.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Information about submitting and providing testimony:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;br /&gt;Written testimony may be submitted on any agenda item:&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;by email: &lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;arthur.j.buto@hawaii.gov or&amp;nbsp; &lt;br /&gt;by postal mail:&lt;span style="white-space: pre;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Office of Planning and Sustainable Development&amp;nbsp; &lt;br /&gt;ATTN: Hawaiʻi Board on Geographic Names &lt;br /&gt;P.O. Box 2359 &lt;br /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96804-2359&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Written testimony should include the word &amp;ldquo;testimony&amp;rdquo; with the agenda item number and description in the Subject line, and should be received no later than &lt;strong&gt;Tuesday, April 21, 4:30 p.m&lt;/strong&gt;., in order to be included in the meeting packet. Testimony received after that time will be distributed at the meeting and posted on the website but may not be included in the meeting packet.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Members of the public may also provide oral testimony and participate in discussions for any agenda item during the meeting. If attending in person, please indicate that you wish to speak by raising your hand.&amp;nbsp; When appropriate, the Chair will recognize you and you may present your testimony. If attending virtually, please indicate that you wish to speak by using the RAISE HAND function in Zoom, or if calling in by telephone, entering * and 9 on your phone keypad.&amp;nbsp; When appropriate, the Chair will recognize you and you will be unmuted.&amp;nbsp; When testifying, you will be asked to identify yourself and the organization that you represent, if any.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Information about attending the meeting in person:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Persons may attend the meeting in person at:&amp;nbsp; Leiopapa A Kamehameha, 235 S. Beretania Street, 6th Floor, Conference Room, Honolulu, HI 96813.&amp;nbsp; Visitors will be asked to present a government issued picture ID and sign in at the security desk in the lobby.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Information about auxiliary aids: &lt;br /&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact Arthur Buto at (808) 587-2894 or by email at arthur.j.buto@hawaii.gov as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible will allow adequate time to fulfill your request.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate formats such as large print, Braille, or electronic copy.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 10:23:41 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77043/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-18T10:23:41Z</dc:date>

&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 0; mso-yfti-firstrow: yes; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes; height: 109.5pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 521.15pt; border: solid windowtext 3.0pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 109.5pt;" valign="top" width="695"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Century Gothic',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mission and Vision&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;The HTSB envisions a highly esteemed Hawaiʻi public education system with rigorous professional teacher standards that foster student success. Our mission is to collaboratively set high teacher licensing and credentialing standards to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Provide every child in Hawaiʻi with qualified teachers.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Promote professionalism and teaching excellence.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Build public confidence in the teaching profession.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Provide more accountability to the public.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="text-indent: -70.05pt; line-height: 25.3pt; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; tab-stops: 288.4pt; margin: .75pt 35.75pt .0001pt 124.45pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 18.25pt; text-indent: -13.75pt; mso-list: l4 level1 lfo5;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Action/Discussion &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="mso-add-space: auto; line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo6; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other; margin: 0in 0in 10.0pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/124e050e/7742c1a9/6e425c1621a849a68dce785950fa9efa?_=NBI%2025-26%20%20License%20Affirmation%20for%2003-13-2026.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;NBI 25-26&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;License Affirmation (December 2025 and January 2026)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo6; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/4787dd04/9858500c/b0dac5beb60148e680726aa9fdf93959?_=NBI%2025-36%20%20License%20Affirmation%20for%2004-24-2026.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;NBI 25-36&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;License Affirmation (February 2026 and March 2026)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo6; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/3ad35a61/6230d491/813d1d53c87d42e298d21b34b6a745f0?_=NBI%2025-27%20CTE%20Standard%20Limited%20License.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;NBI 25-27&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Standard Limited CTE Licensure Criteria to Meet Act 151 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo6; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;D.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/a48ebab4/ba3081a1/fd308bf5e4da4ccfafc5c17b9880e094?_=NBI%2025-22%20Revised%20Policy%20on%20Hawaiian%20Permit%20FINAL%20Edited.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;NBI 25-22 Revised&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Policy on Hawaiian Permit Requirements, Program Responsibilities, and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt;"&gt;Review&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo6; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;E.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/3ad35a61/4350d497/b4685b54e97548f0a52bba6f8dc8b68d?_=NBI%2025-43%20Adoption%20Elem%20Ed%20Math%20Spec%20K-6%20Lic%20Field.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;NBI 25-43&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; color: red;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Adoption of Elementary Education: Math Specialist K-6 Licensure Field&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo6; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;F.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/ef2857e6/3e3a0c5d/22cfc06e8cb04e50b1afa7f564b998f7?_=NBI%2025-44%20Adoption%20Elem%20Ed%20Math%20Spec%20Praxis.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;NBI 25-44&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; color: red;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Adoption of Praxis Licensure Exam for Elementary Education: Math Specialist (5037)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -13.5pt; mso-list: l4 level1 lfo5; margin: 3.0pt 0in 0in 18.25pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: .75in; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 3.0pt; border-right: solid black 3.0pt; mso-border-top-alt: solid black .75pt; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .75pt; padding: 0in 0in 0in 0in; height: 144.6pt;" valign="top" width="72"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 0in; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Soares&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: .4pt 0in .0001pt 0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 3.5pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-hansi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;* &lt;u&gt;WRITTEN TESTIMONY:&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: 4.5pt;"&gt;The Hawaiʻi Teacher Standards Board (HTSB) welcomes public testimony on agenda items. Written testimony submitted and received at least 48 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: 4.5pt;"&gt;hours prior to the meeting will be posted on the Board&amp;rsquo;s website. Testimony sent to any other email address or testimony submitted after the meeting &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: 4.5pt;"&gt;start time, up to 24 hours after the meeting, will be processed as late testimony and will be posted after the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: 4.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: 4.5pt; font-size: 8pt;"&gt;Persons interested in submitting written public testimony shall &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: 4.5pt; font-size: 8pt; color: #222222; background: white;"&gt;submit testimony by one of the following methods&lt;strong&gt;:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Email to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:htsb@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: blue;"&gt;htsb@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt; as an attachment or written directly in your email message (please do not provide links to testimony)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;FAX to 808-586-2606&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Mail to HTSB, 650 Iwilei Road, Suite 268, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 0in 7.5pt 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk160732104"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt;"&gt;All testimony is permanently posted publicly on the HTSB&amp;rsquo;s website and referenced in the Board meeting minutes. Consider this when including personal information (including email addresses, phone numbers, names, and pictures) in your testimony.&amp;nbsp; If you want your personal information redacted, or omitted, submit your testimony as an attachment and include "NO PERSONAL INFORMATION" in the subject line.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -4.5pt; background: white; margin: 0in 0in 7.5pt 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Indicate the following information on written testimony:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Include "Testimony" in the subject line;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Name (or unique identifier) with position/title and organization, if applicable;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Meeting (name of committee or General Business meeting);&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Agenda item; and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Position (support, oppose, or comment)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Raleway; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; background: white;"&gt;​&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;ONLINE TESTIMONY:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide online testimony via Zoom must be logged in to Zoom using the same name they used to sign up for testimony. Testifiers shall use the Chat Box to provide their name and agenda item(s) they are testifying on. Testifiers will be called on and unmuted to give their testimony at the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;appropriate&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;time&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in the agenda. Testimony must be related to an item that is on the agenda. Each individual is allotted five minutes, or an amount of time otherwise designated by the Chairperson, to provide testimony to the Board and/or committee.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Y&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; background: white;"&gt;ou may use a unique identifier (i.e., an alias) instead of your real name to maintain anonymity, but on the day of the meeting you&amp;nbsp;must&amp;nbsp;log into Zoom with the&amp;nbsp;same identifier&amp;nbsp;you used to sign up for testimony or you will not be unmuted. If you are testifying in-person, you must answer when your unique identifier is called.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;MEETING MATERIALS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; To reduce costs, electronic materials are posted on the HTSB website,&lt;strong&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #444444;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #444444;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;The Board packet is available for inspection in the Board's office. For those who wish to have copies, the HTSB office will make copies of such materials at a cost of $0.25 per sheet, payable by check to HTSB.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;VIRTUAL MEETINGS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; Virtual meeting Zoom links can be found on the top of all agendas. Agendas can be found on the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/apps/pages/index.jsp?uREC_ID=4404111&amp;amp;type=d&amp;amp;pREC_ID=2643473"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;HTSB website&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;PUBLIC MEETING LOCATION:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;650 Iwilei Road, Suite 158, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;strong&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;(Dole Cannery).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;ACCOMMODATIONS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: #202020;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid, service, or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact the Board&amp;rsquo;s office at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:htsb@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;htsb@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: #202020;"&gt; or (808) 784-5580 as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible will give staff additional time to try to fulfill your request. Staff will try to fulfill all requests but cannot guarantee fulfillment.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;PARKING:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo2; background: white; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Free parking: Dole Cannery Open-Air Parking Lot &amp;ndash; Free parking is available in the parking lot directly behind the Dole Cannery and adjacent to the Costco parking lot. The lot entry is from Alakawa Street.&amp;nbsp; There is no charge for parking in this free lot (2-hour limit).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo2; background: white; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Pay parking: Dole Cannery Parking Structure &amp;ndash; Pay parking is available in the parking structure across Iwilei Road above the Regal Cinema theaters. The entrance is on Pacific Street.&amp;nbsp; You will pay for your parking when you exit the garage.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mailing List:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="http://eepurl.com/h7tW3j"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Sign-up&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt; to receive HTSB meeting agendas. Agendas are posted six calendar days in advance of the Board meetings.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 01:50:49 GMT</pubDate>

&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="text-indent: -70.05pt; line-height: 25.3pt; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; tab-stops: 288.4pt; margin: .75pt 64.45pt .0001pt 124.45pt;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;Public&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Location:&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;650&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Iwilei&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Road,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Suite&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;158,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Honolulu,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;HI&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 4.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;96817 Telephone: 808-784-5580&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;FAX: 808-586-2606&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table class="MsoTableGrid" style="border-collapse: collapse; mso-table-layout-alt: fixed; border: none; mso-border-alt: solid windowtext 3.0pt; mso-yfti-tbllook: 1184; mso-padding-alt: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; mso-border-insideh: 3.0pt solid windowtext; mso-border-insidev: 3.0pt solid windowtext;" border="1" width="695" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 0; mso-yfti-firstrow: yes; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes; height: 109.5pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 521.15pt; border: solid windowtext 3.0pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 109.5pt;" valign="top" width="695"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Century Gothic',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mission and Vision&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;The HTSB envisions a highly esteemed Hawaiʻi public education system with rigorous professional teacher standards that foster student success. Our mission is to collaboratively set high teacher licensing and credentialing standards to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Provide every child in Hawaiʻi with qualified teachers.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Promote professionalism and teaching excellence.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Build public confidence in the teaching profession.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 15.0pt; text-indent: -15.0pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;&amp;bull;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Provide more accountability to the public.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="text-indent: -70.05pt; line-height: 25.3pt; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; tab-stops: 288.4pt; margin: .75pt 64.45pt .0001pt 124.45pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 1; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes; height: 12.75pt;"&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; mso-add-space: auto; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; tab-stops: 75.5pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;a Teaching Field Programs in Early Childhood Education&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; tab-stops: 75.5pt; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Specialist Add a Teaching Field Program&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 5.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: 4.5pt; line-height: 115%; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;td style="width: 49.5pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 3.0pt; border-right: solid black 3.0pt; mso-border-top-alt: solid black .75pt; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .75pt; padding: 0in 0in 0in 0in; height: 12.75pt;" valign="top" width="66"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt; line-height: 9.55pt; mso-line-height-rule: exactly;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Gillentine&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
