&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: .4pt 0in .0001pt 0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 3.5pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-hansi-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;* &lt;u&gt;WRITTEN TESTIMONY:&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: -9pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt; text-indent: -9pt;"&gt;The Hawaiʻi Teacher Standards Board (HTSB) welcomes public testimony on agenda items. Written testimony submitted and received at least 48 hours prior to the meeting will be posted on the Board&amp;rsquo;s website. Testimony sent to any other email address or testimony submitted after the meeting start time, up to 24 hours after the meeting, will be processed as late testimony and will be posted after the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Persons interested in submitting written public testimony shall &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #222222; background: white;"&gt;submit testimony by one of the following methods:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Email to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:htsb@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: blue;"&gt;htsb@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt; as an attachment or written directly in your email message (please do not provide links to testimony)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;FAX to 808-586-2606&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Mail to HTSB, 650 Iwilei Road, Suite 268, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 0in 7.5pt 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;All testimony is permanently posted publicly on the HTSB&amp;rsquo;s website and referenced in the Board meeting minutes. Consider this when including personal information (including email addresses, phone numbers, names, and pictures) in your testimony.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;If you want your personal information redacted or omitted, submit your testimony as an attachment and include "NO PERSONAL INFORMATION" in the subject line.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 7.5pt; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Indicate the following information on written testimony:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Include "Testimony" in the subject line;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Name (or unique identifier) with position/title and organization, if applicable;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Meeting (name of committee or General Business meeting);&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Agenda item; and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Position (support, oppose, or comment)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Raleway; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; background: white;"&gt;​&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;ONLINE TESTIMONY:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide online testimony via Zoom must be logged in to Zoom using the same name they used to sign up for testimony. Testifiers shall use the Chat Box to provide their name and agenda item(s) they are testifying on. Testifiers will be called on and unmuted to give their testimony at the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;appropriate&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;time&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in the agenda. Testimony must be related to an item that is on the agenda. Each individual is allotted five minutes, or an amount of time otherwise designated by the Chairperson, to provide testimony to the Board and/or committee.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; background: white;"&gt;You may use a unique identifier (i.e., an alias) instead of your real name to maintain anonymity, but on the day of the meeting you&amp;nbsp;must&amp;nbsp;log into Zoom with the&amp;nbsp;same identifier&amp;nbsp;you used to sign up for testimony or you will not be unmuted. If you are testifying in-person, you must answer when your unique identifier is called.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;MEETING MATERIALS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; To reduce costs, electronic materials are posted on the HTSB website,&lt;strong&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #444444;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: #444444;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;The Board packet is available for inspection in the Board's office. For those who wish to have copies, the HTSB office will make copies of such materials at a cost of $0.25 per sheet, payable by check to HTSB.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;VIRTUAL MEETINGS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; Virtual meeting Zoom links can be found on the top of all agendas. Agendas can be found on the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.hawaiiteacherstandardsboard.org/apps/pages/index.jsp?uREC_ID=4404111&amp;amp;type=d&amp;amp;pREC_ID=2643473"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;HTSB website&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;PUBLIC MEETING LOCATION:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;650 Iwilei Road, Suite 158, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;strong&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;(Dole Cannery).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;ACCOMMODATIONS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: #202020;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid, service, or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact the Board&amp;rsquo;s office at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:htsb@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;htsb@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: #202020;"&gt; or (808) 784-5580 as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible will give staff additional time to try to fulfill your request. Staff will try to fulfill all requests but cannot guarantee fulfillment.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;PARKING:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo2; background: white; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Free parking: Dole Cannery Open-Air Parking Lot &amp;ndash; Free parking is available in the parking lot directly behind the Dole Cannery and adjacent to the Costco parking lot. The lot entry is from Alakawa Street.&amp;nbsp; There is no charge for parking in this free lot (2-hour limit).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ul style="margin-top: 0in;" type="disc"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo2; background: white; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Pay parking: Dole Cannery Parking Structure &amp;ndash; Pay parking is available in the parking structure across Iwilei Road above the Regal Cinema theaters. The entrance is on Pacific Street.&amp;nbsp; You will pay for your parking when you exit the garage.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ul&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mailing List:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="http://eepurl.com/h7tW3j"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt;"&gt;Sign-up&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt; to receive HTSB meeting agendas. Agendas are posted six calendar days in advance of the Board meetings.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 18 Apr 2026 01:53:39 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77039/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-18T01:53:39Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>April 24, 2026, Procurement Policy Board Meeting - Updated on 04/17/2026 03:06 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77034/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 1151 Punchbowl Street, Room 416, and Teams&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24 - 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 01:00 PM - 02:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .4pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt;"&gt;Procurement Policy Board Meeting&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Agenda&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Friday, April 24, 2026, 1:00 p.m. (HST)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;I.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Call to Order, Public Notice&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;II.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Roll Call, Quorum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;III.&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Review and Approval of &lt;a href="https://spo.hawaii.gov/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/2025_1202-Minutes_Procurement-Policy-Board_Draft-122625-1.pdf"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-weight: normal;"&gt;December 2, 2025, Meeting Minutes&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;IV.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Public Testimony &amp;ndash; Public testimony will be taken on all items as those items occur during the meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -31.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;V.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -31.5pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;strong&gt;Administrator&amp;rsquo;s Report on 2026 Legislation Related to Procurement (for information only; no decision-making)&amp;nbsp;&lt;/strong&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;The State Procurement Office provides a list of procurement-related legislation that are advancing in the 2026 Legislative session. Those bills are as follows:&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table class="MsoNormalTable" style="width: 491.0pt; border-collapse: collapse; mso-yfti-tbllook: 1184; mso-padding-alt: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" border="0" width="655" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;thead&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 0; mso-yfti-firstrow: yes; page-break-inside: avoid; height: 19.5pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 491.0pt; border-top: windowtext; border-left: windowtext; border-bottom: black; border-right: black; border-style: solid; border-width: 1.0pt; mso-border-top-alt: windowtext .5pt; mso-border-left-alt: windowtext .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: black 1.0pt; mso-border-right-alt: black .5pt; mso-border-style-alt: solid; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 19.5pt;" colspan="2" valign="bottom" nowrap="nowrap" width="655"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;PROCUREMENT AND PROCUREMENT-RELATED BILLS (Advancing as of 4/17/26)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 1; page-break-inside: avoid; height: 21.05pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: solid windowtext 1.0pt; border-bottom: solid windowtext 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-left-alt: solid windowtext .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid windowtext .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 21.05pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;Bill Number&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid windowtext 1.0pt; border-right: solid windowtext 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid windowtext .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid windowtext .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 21.05pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;Title and Description&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/thead&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 2; height: 52.5pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 52.5pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=GM&amp;amp;billnumber=773"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;GM773&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 52.5pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;Procurement Policy Board.&lt;br /&gt;Submitting for consideration and confirmation to the Procurement Policy Board, Gubernatorial Nominee, PAULA YOUNGLING, for a term to expire 06-30-2030.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 3; height: 54.4pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 54.4pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=2928"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;SB2928 SD1 HD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 54.4pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO PROCUREMENT.&lt;br /&gt;Establishes the Small Business Procurement Program and Small Business Procurement Coordinator position permanently in the State Procurement Office.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;(HD1)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 4; height: 76.5pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 76.5pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1297"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;HB1297 HD1 SD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 76.5pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO PROCUREMENT.&lt;br /&gt;Sets a time limit for submitting bid protests. Makes the seventy-five-day limit for issuing a written decision on protests apply to any contract awarded by competitive sealed bid or competitive sealed proposal. Caps the protest bond amount. (SD1)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 5; height: 111.75pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 111.75pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=2075"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;SB2075 SD1 HD2&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 111.75pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO PUBLIC PROCUREMENT.&lt;br /&gt;Requires purchasing agencies to apply a five per cent flat rate local preference in evaluating bids or proposals from qualified Hawaii bidders or offerors who submit a timely preference certification. Establishes criteria for a bid or proposal to qualify for a local preference. Establishes requirements for the qualification and certification of Hawaii bidders and offerors and consequences for failure to maintain qualification. Requires the Procurement Policy Board to adopt rules. (HD2)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 6; height: 90.75pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 90.75pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1519"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;HB1519 HD1 SD3&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 90.75pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS.&lt;br /&gt;Requires disclosure of the names of compensated officers of state and county contractors and grantees. Prohibits the compensated officers of certain state and county contractors and grantees from making, promising, or soliciting certain campaign contributions for the duration of the contract or grant.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;(SD3)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 7; height: 157.5pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 157.5pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=2530"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;SB2530 SD2 HD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 157.5pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS.&lt;br /&gt;Requires disclosure of the names of compensated officers, and their immediate family members, of state contractors with contracts exceeding the small purchase threshold established under the Hawaii Public Procurement Code and grantees with grants exceeding $250,000. Prohibits the compensated officers of state contractors, and their immediate family members, from making, promising, or soliciting certain campaign contributions for the duration of the contract exceeding the small purchase threshold. Prohibits state grantees, including compensated officers and their immediate family members, from making, promising, or soliciting certain contributions for the duration of the grant exceeding $250,000. (HD1)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 8; height: 115.15pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 115.15pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=2601"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;SB2601 SD2 HD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 115.15pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO PROCUREMENT.&lt;br style="page-break-before: always;" clear="all" /&gt;Amends criminal penalties under the Hawaii Public Procurement Code by providing that a person who intentionally violates the code is subject to prosecution for a misdemeanor in cases of egregious violations of the Code. Ensures that awarded contracts are supported by sufficient appropriations by requiring a contract amount that exceeds fifteen per cent of the amount of the appropriation or balance of an appropriation to be approved by the Chief Procurement Officer to become binding. Establishes positions within the State Procurement Office. Appropriates funds.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;(HD1)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 9; height: 75.0pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 75.0pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=2246"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;SB2246 SD1 HD2&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 75.0pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO FINANCIAL DISCLOSURES.&lt;br /&gt;Expands the scope of persons who are subject to public financial disclosure requirements. Makes technical, conforming amendments to disclosure provisions applicable to legislators.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;(HD2)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 10; height: 132.0pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 132.0pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1155"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;HB1155 HD1 SD2&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 132.0pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO PROCUREMENT.&lt;br /&gt;Prohibits all governmental bodies and public employees from procuring services for project management through non-governmental third-party contracts, except for certain procurements of independent verification and validation contracts for information technology services. Temporarily authorizes, until 6/30/2027, outside contractors who prepared specifications and work statements in the development of a Department of Transportation solicitation to bid on those projects if certain requirements are satisfied. (SD2)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 11; height: 117.0pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 117.0pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=2929"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;SB2929 SD1 HD2&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 117.0pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO PUBLIC NOTICE.&lt;br /&gt;Authorizes government agencies to satisfy public notice requirements by electronic posting on official state or county websites or electronic calendars, while preserving traditional publication as an option. Directs the Office of Enterprise Technology Services, in consultation with the Access Hawaii Committee, to adopt rules governing the implementation of electronic notice before the electronic notice authorization takes legal effect. (HD2)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 12; height: 138.55pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 138.55pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1663"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;HB1663 HD2 SD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 138.55pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO REIMBURSEMENT OF PUBLIC OFFICERS AND EMPLOYEES.&lt;br /&gt;Requires the State or a county to reimburse an officer or employee for work-related travel costs that the officer or employee loaned to the State or a county within thirty calendar days of submitting an approved statement of completed travel. Requires the State or a county to pay interest on a loan not reimbursed within thirty calendar days until the loan is fully reimbursed. Obligates an officer or employee to request a complete refund from the travel vendor for travel not taken for good cause. Entitles an officer or employee to reimbursement from the State or a county when a travel vendor offers a partial refund or no refund. (SD1)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 13; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes; height: 58.45pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 99.0pt; border: solid black 1.0pt; border-top: none; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 58.45pt;" valign="top" width="132"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=3332"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: windowtext;"&gt;SB3332 SD1 HD1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 392.0pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-bottom-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-right-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 58.45pt;" valign="top" width="523"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos Narrow',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;RELATING TO STATE-FUNDED TRAVEL.&lt;br style="page-break-before: always;" clear="all" /&gt;Requires reports on travel taken by certain state agencies and for the reports to be submitted to the money committees of the Legislature. Sunsets 6/30/2028. Effective 7/1/3000. (HD1)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;VI.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Announcements&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk194409433"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Acknowledgement and Appreciation for Chair Lisa Maruyama&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk194409433;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Next Meeting: Members will be polled on their availability for &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;the next meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal; tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;The meeting will be hybrid, on Microsoft Teams and in-person in a physical location at 1151 Punchbowl Street, Room 416.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="tab-stops: decimal .25in left .5in 40.5pt .75in; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;VII.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 23:58:42 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77034/details.html?t=1776474360776</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-17T23:58:42Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Special Meeting of the Board of Trustees of the Employees' Retirement System of the State of Hawaii - Updated on 04/17/2026 01:32 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77033/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: City Financial Tower, 201 Merchant Street, Suite 1200, Honolulu, Hawaii  96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 01:30 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;NOTICE OF SPECIAL MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;AGENCY:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Board of Trustees of the Employees&amp;rsquo; Retirement System of the State of Hawaii&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;DATE:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Friday, April 24, 2026; 1:30 p.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;PLACE:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;City Financial Tower, 201 Merchant Street, Suite 1500, Honolulu, Hawaii&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;The meeting will be conducted pursuant to HRS &amp;sect;92-3.7, under which Members of the Board of Trustees and members of the public may participate via interactive conference technology or in person at the meeting place stated above.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Members of the public may attend the meeting by teleconference, either audio or video, at the following link or phone number:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a title="https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/264423220922995?p=vxbewad33yrybuluro" href="https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/264423220922995?p=vxBEWaD33yryBULURO" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/264423220922995?p=vxBEWaD33yryBULURO&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; color: #4472c4;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Or join by entering meeting ID:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #4f81bd; mso-themecolor: accent1;"&gt;264 423 220 922 995&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #4472c4;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;Passcode:&lt;span style="color: #4472c4;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;vG9Ui99F&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Members of the public may provide testimony in person or by teleconference.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Individuals testifying at the meeting are requested to limit their testimony to three (3) minutes or an amount of time otherwise designated by the Chairperson.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Or &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="tel:+1%20808-829-4853,,509311998#" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="color: windowtext; text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt;+&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; color: #4472c4; text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt;1 808-829-4853&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt; United States, Honolulu (Toll)&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt; text-indent: -1in;"&gt;Conference ID:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt; text-indent: -1in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11pt; text-indent: -1in; color: #4f81bd;"&gt;936 468 848#&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833151;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;In the event audiovisual communication cannot be maintained with participating Trustees and quorum is lost, the meeting shall be automatically recessed for up to 30 minutes, during which time, an attempt to restore audiovisual communication will be made.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;If such attempt is unsuccessful, all Trustees, members of the public, staff and other interested individuals may continue to participate in the meeting via telephone using the above-listed telephone and conference ID numbers, whereby audio-only communication will be established for all participants and the meeting will continue.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;If reconvening the meeting is not possible because neither audiovisual nor audio-only communication can be re-established, the meeting will be terminated.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2 style="text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;QUORUM/CALL TO ORDER&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;PUBLIC COMMENT&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk43465909;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk41554810;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Members of the public may provide in-person testimony at the meeting or, alternatively, may submit written testimony in advance on these agenda items via e-mail or postal mail with receipt recommended by 4:30 p.m. on Thursday, April 23, 2026, in order to ensure it is distributed in time for consideration.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Please address written testimony if by e-mail to:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dale.kanae@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833207;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk43465909;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk41554810;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;dale.kanae@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk98833207;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk43465909;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk41554810;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt; or by postal mail to:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Employees&amp;rsquo; Retirement System of the State of Hawaii, Board of Trustees, 201 Merchant Street, Suite 1400, Honolulu, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96813.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk83651443;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106624886;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;NEW BUSINESS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk83651443;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106624886;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Discussion and Appropriate Action Regarding the Upcoming Departure of Kristin Varela, Chief Investment Officer.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk83651443;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106624886;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Discussion and Appropriate Action Regarding the New Chief Investment Officer Search Process.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk83651443;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106624886;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;Pursuant to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk83651443;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106624886;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;HRS &amp;sect;92-5(a)(2) and (4), the Board of Trustees may enter into Executive Session where matters affecting privacy will be involved, and to consult with the Board&amp;rsquo;s attorneys on questions and issues pertaining to the Board&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities with respect to these matters.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106624886;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226469119;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;EXECUTIVE SESSION&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106624886;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Executive Session, pursuant to HRS &amp;sect;92-5(a)(2) and (4), &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226469172;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;to consider the hire of a new permanent Chief Investment Officer or appointment of a temporary acting Chief Investment Officer, effective June 1, 2026, where consideration of matters affecting privacy will be involved, and to consult with the Board&amp;rsquo;s attorneys on questions and issues pertaining to the Board&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities with respect to these matters.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.5pt;"&gt;ADJOURNMENT&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;If you require auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact &lt;br /&gt;Dale Kehau Kanae at (808) 586-1706 or &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dale.kanae@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106099368;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;dale.kanae@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk106099368;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt; as soon as possible, preferably by Tuesday, April 21, 2026, and the ERS will try to obtain the auxiliary aid/service or accommodation but cannot guarantee that the request can be fulfilled.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt;"&gt;Upon request, this notice can be made available in large print.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 23:25:15 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77033/details.html?t=1776468730681</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-17T23:25:15Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Condominium Property Regime Task Force Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77019/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Virtual Videoconference Meeting:  Zoom Meeting and In-Person:  Queen Liliuokalani Conference Room, King Kalakaua Bldg, 335 Merchant Street, 1st Floor, Honolulu HI  96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 02:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt .5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;CONDOMINIUM PROPERTY REGIME TASK FORCE&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt .5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt .5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;State of Hawaii&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt .5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;a href="https://cca.hawaii.gov/"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;https://cca.hawaii.gov/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt .5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt .5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in .2in .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table class="MsoTableGrid" style="margin-left: 31.5pt; border-collapse: collapse; mso-table-layout-alt: fixed; border: none; mso-yfti-tbllook: 1184; mso-padding-alt: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; mso-border-insideh: none; mso-border-insidev: none;" border="0" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 0; mso-yfti-firstrow: yes;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 85.5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top" width="114"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Date:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 351.0pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top" width="468"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;April 24, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 1; height: 4.0pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 85.5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 4.0pt;" valign="top" width="114"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Time:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 351.0pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 4.0pt;" valign="top" width="468"&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;King Kalakaua Building&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;335 Merchant Street, 1&lt;sup&gt;st&lt;/sup&gt; Floor&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Virtual Participation:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 351.0pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top" width="468"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Zoom Meeting (use link below):&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Phone:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;td style="width: 351.0pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top" width="468"&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Meeting ID:&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLineBreakNewLine]--&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Passcode:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
