&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;849 4348 8234&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;791715&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 6; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 85.5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top" width="114"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Agenda:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 351.0pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt;" valign="top" width="468"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;The agenda was posted to the State electronic calendar as required by Hawaii Revised Statutes (&amp;ldquo;HRS&amp;rdquo;) section 92-7(b).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; text-align: center; background: white;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;PUBLIC TESTIMONY:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;If you wish to submit written testimony on any agenda item, please email your testimony to&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:cpr-taskforce@dcca.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;cpr-taskforce@dcca.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;,&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;or submit by hard copy mail to: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 6.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Attn: Condominium Property Regime Task Force&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;335 Merchant Street, Room 333&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96813. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 6.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;We kindly request submission of testimony at least 24 hours prior to the meeting to ensure that it can be distributed to T&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;ask Force &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;members.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; text-align: center; background: white;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;INTERNET ACCESS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;To view the meeting and provide live oral testimony during the meeting, please use the above link. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;You will be asked to enter your name in order to access the meeting as an attendee. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;The Task Force requests that you enter your full name, but you may use a pseudonym or other identifier if you wish to remain anonymous. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;You will also be asked for an email address. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;You may fill in this field with any entry in an email format, e.g., *****@***mail.com.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Your microphone will be automatically muted. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;When the Chairperson asks for public testimony, you may click the Raise Hand button found on your Zoom screen to indicate that you wish to testify about that agenda item.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;The Chairperson will individually enable each testifier to unmute their microphone. When recognized by the Chairperson, please unmute your microphone before speaking and mute your microphone after you finish speaking.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; text-align: center; background: white;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;PHONE ACCESS:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;If you cannot get internet access, you may get audio-only access by calling the Zoom Phone Number listed at the top on the agenda. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Upon dialing the number, you will be prompted to enter the Meeting ID which is also listed at the top of the agenda. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;After entering the Meeting ID, you will be asked to either enter your panelist number or wait to be admitted into the meeting. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;You will not have a panelist number; so, please wait until you are admitted into the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;When the Chairperson asks for public testimony, you may indicate you want to testify by entering " * " and then " 9 " on your phone&amp;rsquo;s keypad. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;After entering " * " and then " 9 ", a voice prompt will let you know that the host of the meeting has been notified. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;When recognized by the Chairperson, you may unmute yourself by pressing &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;" * " and then " 6 " on your phone. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;A voice prompt will let you know that you are unmuted. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Once you have finished speaking, please enter " * " and then " 6 " again to mute yourself.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;For both internet and phone access, when testifying, you will be asked to identify yourself and the organization, if any, that you represent. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Each testifier will be limited to five minutes of testimony per agenda item.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Instructions to attend State of Hawaii virtual board meetings may be found online at:&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;a href="https://cca.hawaii.gov/pvl/files/2020/08/State-of-Hawaii-Virtual-Board-Attendee-Instructions.pdf"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #22767c;"&gt;https://cca.hawaii.gov/pvl/files/2020/08/State-of-Hawaii-Virtual-Board-Attendee-Instructions.pdf&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; margin-left: .5in; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;If connection to the meeting is lost for more than 30 minutes, the meeting will be continued on a specified date and time.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; background: white;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Call to Order&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; background: white;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk137803738"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk55809744"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;New Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; mso-add-space: auto; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Discussion on Honolulu Police Department Response to Criminal Complaints in Condominiums&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 5.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;The Managing Director of the City and County of Honolulu will attend to provide information and answer questions regarding Honolulu Police Department practices when responding to requests for assistance within condominium associations. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;The Task Force will discuss concerns raised by condominium unit owners and consider possible areas for clarification or improvement.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1; background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Discussion Topic &amp;ndash; Condominium Ombudsmen&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="mso-add-space: auto; background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 6.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white; margin: 0in 16.2pt .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;The Task Force may move into Executive Session to consult with the Task Force&amp;rsquo;s attorney on questions and issues pertaining to the Task Force&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities in accordance with section 92-5(a)(4), HRS.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.55pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Next Meeting&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;May 8, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.55pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 4;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;1:00 p.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 5.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; margin: 0in 4.5pt .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Queen Liliuokalani Conference Room&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; margin: 0in 4.5pt .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;King Kalakaua Building&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 4.5pt .0001pt 2.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;335 Merchant Street, 1&lt;sup&gt;st&lt;/sup&gt; Floor&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; margin: 0in 4.5pt .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 6.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in; margin: 0in 4.5pt .0001pt 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;And&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 4.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 6.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-right: 16.2pt; background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;4.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="background: white;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk144111990"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact&amp;nbsp;Kedin Kleinhans at 1-844-808-DCCA (3222) ext. #1, then #8, or at&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt; &lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:cpr-taskforce@dcca.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk144111990;"&gt;cpr-taskforce@dcca.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk144111990;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; color: #212529;"&gt;,&amp;nbsp;preferably by two business days prior to the scheduled meeting, or as soon as possible.&amp;nbsp; Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled.&amp;nbsp; Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>

    <item>
      <title>HTSB General Business Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77041/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 650 Iwilei Road, Suite 158, Honolulu, HI 96817 and Zoom Virtual Meeting (See Agenda)&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/24&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 02:45 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong style="color: #e03e2d;"&gt;**Character limit reached. See attached PDF for full meeting agenda.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table class="MsoTableGrid" style="margin-left: -6.75pt; border-image: initial; border: medium none currentcolor;" border="1" width="708" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 531.25pt; border-width: 4.5pt 4.5pt medium; border-style: solid solid none; border-color: windowtext windowtext currentcolor; padding: 0in 5.4pt;" colspan="3" valign="top" width="708"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="margin: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-no-proof: yes;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="margin: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Hawaiʻi&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Teacher Standards Board&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="Informal1" style="margin: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center; tab-stops: 44.4pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;2:45 PM&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="Informal1" style="margin: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="Informal1" style="margin: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Public Meeting Location:&amp;nbsp; 650 Iwilei Road, Suite 158, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; margin-top: 0in; mso-margin-bottom-alt: 10.0pt; mso-margin-top-alt: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Telephone: 808-784-5580&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; FAX: 808-586-2606&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table class="MsoTableGrid" style="border-image: initial; border: medium none currentcolor;" border="1" width="687" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 0; mso-yfti-firstrow: yes; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes; height: 106.8pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 515.1pt; border-width: 3pt; border-color: windowtext; padding: 0in 5.4pt; height: 106.8pt;" valign="top" width="687"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;HTSB&amp;rsquo;s Mission and Vision&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;The HTSB envisions a highly esteemed Hawaiʻi public education system with rigorous professional teacher standards that foster student success. Our mission is to collaboratively set high teacher licensing and credentialing standards to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -15.0pt; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in 15.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;bull;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Provide every child in Hawaiʻi with qualified teachers.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -15.0pt; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in 15.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;bull;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Promote professionalism and teaching excellence.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -15.0pt; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in 15.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;bull;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Build public confidence in the teaching profession.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -15.0pt; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in 15.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;bull;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; Provide more accountability to the public.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; margin-top: 0in; mso-margin-bottom-alt: 10.0pt; mso-margin-top-alt: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; margin-top: 0in; mso-margin-bottom-alt: 10.0pt; mso-margin-top-alt: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 1; mso-yfti-lastrow: yes; height: 61.5pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 0.75in; border-width: 1.5pt 1.5pt 4.5pt 4.5pt; border-color: windowtext; padding: 0in 5.4pt; height: 61.5pt;" valign="top" width="72"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 10.0pt; mso-margin-bottom-alt: 10.0pt; mso-margin-top-alt: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;2:45 PM &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 427.5pt; border-top: solid windowtext 1.5pt; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid windowtext 4.5pt; border-right: solid windowtext 1.5pt; mso-border-left-alt: solid windowtext 1.5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 61.5pt;" valign="top" width="570"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="margin: 0in; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;I. Call to Order of General Business Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l8 level1 lfo1; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Roll Call to Establish Quorum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l8 level1 lfo1; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Public Testimony*&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l8 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 324.8pt; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Announcements&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal; tab-stops: 75.5pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;II. Executive Session&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="margin: 0in; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; background: white;"&gt;This portion of the meeting is a closed meeting under Section 92‑4 and Section 92‑5 (a)(1)(2) and (4), Hawaii Revised Statutes.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in 0in 35.35pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Approval of Executive Session Meeting Minutes from January 16, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in 0in 35.35pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Personnel Update: Executive Director Villalobos&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 26.5pt 0in 35.35pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;Consultation with Deputy Attorney General on questions and issues pertaining to the Board's powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 26.5pt 0in 35.3pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;D.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;The purpose of this agenda item is to discuss the appropriate disciplinary action to take on NBI 25-33; Case No. 25-03 pursuant to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://acrobat.adobe.com/id/urn:aaid:sc:va6c2:a1cb0fb1-8bfe-4314-b90d-af0c514f6cdc"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;HRS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt; &amp;sect;92-5(a)(1). The educator falsified a document required for licensure.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 26.5pt 0in 35.3pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;E.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;The purpose of this agenda item is to discuss the appropriate action to be taken on NBI 25-34; Case No. 24-05 pursuant to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://acrobat.adobe.com/id/urn:aaid:sc:va6c2:a1cb0fb1-8bfe-4314-b90d-af0c514f6cdc"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;HRS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt; &amp;sect;92-5(a)(1). This is a status update to determine whether this educator should receive an extension of the CTE permit for another year.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 3.0pt 0in 0in 35.25pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;F.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;The purpose of this agenda item is to discuss &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;the appropriate action to take on NBI 25-35; Case No. 25-07 pursuant to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://acrobat.adobe.com/id/urn:aaid:sc:va6c2:a1cb0fb1-8bfe-4314-b90d-af0c514f6cdc"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Hawaii Administrative Rules&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt; &amp;sect;8-54-16 Suspension of the rules.&amp;nbsp; The educator is seeking to have the Board suspend the rules pertaining to the criteria needed to be issued a Fourth Emergency Hire Permit due to extenuating circumstances caused by the educator preparation program.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 3.0pt 0in 0in 35.25pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;G.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;The purpose of this agenda item is to discuss the appropriate action to take on NBI 25-50; Case No. 25-08, pursuant to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://acrobat.adobe.com/id/urn:aaid:sc:va6c2:a1cb0fb1-8bfe-4314-b90d-af0c514f6cdc"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Hawaii Revised Statutes&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt; &amp;sect;92-5(a)(1), regarding the request by the educator to be issued a fourth Emergency Hire Permit and to suspend the Board&amp;rsquo;s administrative rules based on extenuating circumstances caused by family tragedy, a tragedy at educator&amp;rsquo;s school, and constraints in course scheduling.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 3.0pt 0in 0in 35.25pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;H.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;The purpose of this agenda item is to discuss the appropriate action to take on NBI 25-51; Case No. 25-09, pursuant to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://acrobat.adobe.com/id/urn:aaid:sc:va6c2:a1cb0fb1-8bfe-4314-b90d-af0c514f6cdc"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Hawaii Revised Statutes &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;sect;92-5(a)(1), regarding this educator&amp;rsquo;s application for renewal of the educator&amp;rsquo;s Standard License. In this case, the educator was terminated for noncompliance of the Hawaiʻi Department of Education&amp;rsquo;s COVID-19 Testing Attestation Mandate and did not file a grievance with the educator&amp;rsquo;s union regarding the termination. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin: 3.0pt 0in 0in 0in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;III. Public Testimony on General Business Meeting Agenda Items&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l9 level1 lfo9; margin: 3.0pt 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt; &amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;Announcements &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l9 level1 lfo9; tab-stops: 35.3pt 324.8pt; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Approval of Meeting Minutes &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l10 level2 lfo10; tab-stops: 35.3pt 324.8pt; margin: 0in 0in 0in 89.25pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/4787dd04/80eb260a/d8acee3271b7438fb5d7378d8186f247?_=01-16-26_General%20Business_Unapproved%20Minutes.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;January 16, 2026 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l9 level1 lfo9; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Educational Testing Services-&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/3913c945/ca654661/2d8283de90ac4b73b51371caf34e6119?_=ETS-Praxis%20HTSB%20Presentation%20March%202026.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Praxis Presentation &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;L.&lt;span style="font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="text-indent: -0.25in;" href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/4787dd04/9858500c/b0dac5beb60148e680726aa9fdf93959?_=NBI%2025-36%20%20License%20Affirmation%20for%2004-24-2026.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;NBI 25-36&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt; License Affirmation (February 2026 and March 2026)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;M.&lt;span style="font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="text-indent: -0.25in;" href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/3ad35a61/6230d491/813d1d53c87d42e298d21b34b6a745f0?_=NBI%2025-27%20CTE%20Standard%20Limited%20License.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;NBI 25-27&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;Standard Limited CTE Licensure Criteria to Meet Act 151&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;N.&lt;span style="font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="text-indent: -0.25in;" href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/a48ebab4/ba3081a1/fd308bf5e4da4ccfafc5c17b9880e094?_=NBI%2025-22%20Revised%20Policy%20on%20Hawaiian%20Permit%20FINAL%20Edited.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;NBI 25-22 Revised&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;Policy on Hawaiian Permit Requirements, Program Responsibilities,&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;and &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"&gt;Review&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;O.&lt;span style="font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="text-indent: -0.25in;" href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/3ad35a61/4350d497/b4685b54e97548f0a52bba6f8dc8b68d?_=NBI%2025-43%20Adoption%20Elem%20Ed%20Math%20Spec%20K-6%20Lic%20Field.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;NBI 25-43&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: red;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;Adoption of Elementary Education: Math Specialist K-6 Licensure Field&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in 0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;P.&lt;span style="font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="text-indent: -0.25in;" href="https://media.edlio.net/e045d0de/ef2857e6/3e3a0c5d/22cfc06e8cb04e50b1afa7f564b998f7?_=NBI%2025-44%20Adoption%20Elem%20Ed%20Math%20Spec%20Praxis.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;NBI 25-44&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong style="text-indent: -0.25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; color: red;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="text-indent: -0.25in; font-size: 9pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;Adoption of Praxis Licensure Exam for Elementary Education: Math Specialist &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 9pt;"&gt;(5037)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; margin: 0in 0in 0in .25in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Teacher Education Committee: Dr. Gillentine&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Informal1" style="margin: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -1.05pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="color: #e03e2d;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif;"&gt;**Agenda items cut off due to character limit on this website.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 49.75pt; border-top: solid windowtext 1.5pt; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid windowtext 4.5pt; border-right: solid windowtext 4.5pt; mso-border-left-alt: solid windowtext 1.5pt; padding: 0in 5.4pt 0in 5.4pt; height: 61.5pt;" valign="top" width="66"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; margin-top: 0in; mso-margin-bottom-alt: 10.0pt; mso-margin-top-alt: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Miyamae&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/table&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong style="color: #e03e2d;"&gt;**Character limit reached. See attached PDF for full meeting agenda.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
