    <item>
      <title>Hawaii Medical Education Council (HMEC) - Updated on 04/13/2026 11:18 AM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77000/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Via Zoom &amp; John A. Burns, School of Medicine, 651 Ilalo Street, MEB 202, Honolulu, Hawaii 96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/27 - 2026/04/27&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 07:30 AM - 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt; text-align: left;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: italic; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Items not addressed during this meeting will be discussed on another day and time, to be announced at the conclusion of the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.8; text-align: left;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Call Meeting to Order &amp;amp; Review / Approval of Previous Meeting Minutes (HMEC Chair)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Public Comment Period - will be held at the beginning of the meeting and welcome before each agenda item (HMEC Chair)&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;John A. Burns School of Medicine (JABSOM) Legislative Budget Considerations 2026 (Dean Shomaker) - &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; -webkit-text-decoration-skip: none; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Refer to links below for full titles and descriptions&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="list-style-type: lower-alpha;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;a style="text-decoration: none;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1574&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #1155cc; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; -webkit-text-decoration-skip: none; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;HB 1574&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #222222; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; - &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #212529; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Healthcare Education Loan Repayment Program&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;a style="text-decoration: none;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1591&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #1155cc; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; -webkit-text-decoration-skip: none; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;HB 1591&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #222222; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; - &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #212529; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Healthcare Preceptor Tax Credit&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;a style="text-decoration: none;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=1800&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #1155cc; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; -webkit-text-decoration-skip: none; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;HB 1800&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #222222; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; - HD1, SD1 State Budget Bills&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;a style="text-decoration: none;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=HB&amp;amp;billnumber=2159&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #1155cc; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; -webkit-text-decoration-skip: none; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;HB 2159&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #222222; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; - UH Health Science and Healthcare Workforce Interdisciplinary Initiatives&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;a style="text-decoration: none;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=2657&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #1155cc; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; -webkit-text-decoration-skip: none; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;SB 2657&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #222222; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; - Alzheimers and Dementia Research Center&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;a style="text-decoration: none;" href="https://www.capitol.hawaii.gov/session/measure_indiv.aspx?billtype=SB&amp;amp;billnumber=2921&amp;amp;year=2026"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #1155cc; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; -webkit-text-decoration-skip: none; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;SB 2921&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #222222; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; - Sweeps&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; excess money in the&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #ee0000; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #222222; background-color: #ffffff; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Special Funds, including JABSOM Special Fund&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Monitoring &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="text-decoration: none;" href="https://www.hawaii.edu/govrel/docs/reports/2026/hrs304a-1704_2026_hawaii-medical-education-council_annual-report_508.pdf"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #1155cc; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline; -webkit-text-decoration-skip: none; text-decoration-skip-ink: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Annual HMEC Report Recommendations&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; to the Legislature (reference page 3)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Physician Workforce Updates &amp;amp; Synergies&lt;/span&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="list-style-type: lower-alpha;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Rural Health Transformation Program&lt;/span&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="list-style-type: lower-roman;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Workforce Development Updates - Drs. Lee Buenconsejo-Lum &amp;amp; Kelley Withy&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Physician Workforce Report and Recruiting Efforts - Dr. Kelley Withy&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Hawaii Healthcare Education Loan Program (HELP) - Dr. Kelley Withy&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Update on New / Proposed Residency &amp;amp; Fellowship Programs - Dr. Holly Olson&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.2;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Open Forum: Public Comment&amp;nbsp; Period &amp;amp; Proposed Future Agenda Items&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.8;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Next HMEC Meeting &amp;ndash; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: bold; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Monday, July 27, 2026 @ 7:30 am&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt; in-person and via Zoom&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.8;" role="presentation"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: Calibri,sans-serif; color: #000000; background-color: transparent; font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: baseline; white-space: pre-wrap;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 13 Apr 2026 21:16:44 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77000/details.html?t=1776115122719</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-13T21:16:44Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Oahu Workforce Development Full Board Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77042/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Zoom or 1122 Māpunapuna Street, Māpunapuna ‘Ōlelo Community Media Center, Honolulu, HI 96819&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/27 - 2026/04/27&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM - 10:30 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;OAHU WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;FULL BOARD MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Monday, April 27, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;9:00 am to 10:30 am&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Remote Meeting: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;This meeting will be held remotely by Zoom interactive conference technology. Board members, staff, and members of the public may participate in the remote meeting by using the Zoom link:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;https://us06web.zoom.us/j/85775573092?pwd=JoQIhUDeOIawlF5JSX67mczANfQMk0.1&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;If you do not have the technology or ability to join the remote meeting via Zoom, please dial&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;+1 (669) 444-9171 on the telephone to participate in the remote meeting. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Meeting ID: 857 7557 3092 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Passcode: 964475&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Physical Meeting:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;A physical meeting location will be open to the public and will have an audiovisual connection, which will allow individuals at the physical meeting location to participate in the remote meeting. The address of the physical meeting location is as follows:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; background: white;"&gt;Māpunapuna &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="background: white;"&gt;&amp;lsquo;Ōlelo&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; &lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="background: white;"&gt;Community Media Center&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; background: white;"&gt;1122 Māpunapuna Street&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; background: white;"&gt;Honolulu, HI 96819&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Written and Oral Testimony:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Individuals may submit written testimony by U.S. mail or hand delivery at 715 S King Street, Suite 211, Honolulu, HI 96813 or by email at &lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:OahuWDB@honolulu.gov"&gt;OahuWDB@honolulu.gov&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;. It is requested that written testimony be received at least 24 hours prior to the meeting. Individuals may provide remote oral testimony during the remote meeting at the Zoom link listed above. Individuals participating at the physical meeting location may also&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;provide&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;oral&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;during&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;the remote meeting. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Equal Opportunity Employer/Program: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact Board Staff at (808) 768-5889 or email &lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:OahuWDB@honolulu.gov"&gt;OahuWDB@honolulu.gov&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt; as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible will allow adequate time to fulfill your request. Upon request, this notice is available in alternative formats. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Meeting materials are available at: &lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;https://oahuwdb.com/minutes-agendas-2026/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Note: Per the State Office of Information Practices (OIP), members of the public may contact &lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:OahuWDB@honolulu.gov"&gt;OahuWDB@honolulu.gov&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt; to be added to a mailing list for future meeting announcements.&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;I.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Call to Order&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;Chair Christopher Lum Lee&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;II.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;OWDB Member Roll Call&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; line-height: 106%; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;(Note: Per the State OIP, a quorum of members must be visible throughout the public portion of the meeting, but so long as that requirement is met, Oahu Workforce Development Board (OWDB) members are allowed to attend board meetings on audio only. Their votes will still count, and their attendance will also count toward quorum. However, board members must state their names clearly during introductions and before all of their comments during the meeting.)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Public Testimony relating to Agenda Items&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Approval of January 22, 2026 Meeting Minutes&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;V.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Proposed Bylaw Amendments&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Article III, Section 2(D); Amend to read, &amp;ldquo;Local Board members and their designees are also required to complete City Ordinance mandated trainings including Ethics, Prevention of Sexual Harassment (PoSH), and Anti-Bias &amp;amp; Inclusion each biennium. &amp;hellip;&amp;rdquo; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Article III, Section 8; Addition of item C to read, &amp;ldquo;The Executive Director shall be appointed by the Local Board.&amp;rdquo; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;c.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Article III, Section 8; Addition of item D to read, &amp;ldquo;The Executive Director shall have the sole authority over staffing decisions.&amp;rdquo; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;d.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Article IV, Section 2(A); Amend to read, &amp;ldquo;The OWDB members are expected to attend a majority of the full board meetings &lt;s&gt;and committee meetings&lt;/s&gt; of the Local Board.&amp;rdquo; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;e.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Article IV, Section 2(B); Amend to read, &amp;ldquo;The OWDB members who do not provide a minimum of two (2) days advance notice for multiple absences or are absent for a majority of the full board meetings &lt;s&gt;and committee meetings&lt;/s&gt; of the OWDB in the twelve (12) month period following their appointment may be asked to tender their resignation.&amp;rdquo; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;f.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Article IV, Section 2(D); Amend to read, &amp;ldquo;&amp;hellip; in accordance with WIOA Section 679.110(d)(4). &lt;s&gt;The designee is subject to the same membership requirements as an OWDB member.&lt;/s&gt; Each OWDB member shall address his or her&amp;hellip;&amp;rdquo; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VI.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Equipment Inventory listing for return or reimbursement&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Request for return or reimbursement for three televisions from the Inventory Equipment List.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Youth Workforce Training, LLC dba Pathway to Success Program&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;d.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Sector Strategies and Career Pathways.&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;Chair Andrew Rosen&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;e.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Performance Measures and Accountability..&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;Chair Suzie Schulberg&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;f.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Employer Engagement.&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;Chair Sarah Guay&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;XIII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;State Mandated Partner Updates&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Institute for Higher Education, UH System..&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;&amp;hellip;Dr. Lui Hokoana, Interim Vice President for Community Colleges, University of Hawaii Community College System&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;XIV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Announcements&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;The next OWDB Full Board meeting is tentatively scheduled for July 23, 2026 from 8:00 am to 9:30 am, location to be determined.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;XV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-left: .75in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

    <item>
      <title>Public Hearing on Proposed Amendments to Title 4, Chapter 66 of the Hawaii Administrative Rules (Pesticides Branch)</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76648/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity, Conference Room, 1428 S. King. St., Honolulu and via video conferencing via Zoom&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/27 - 2026/04/27&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 01:00 PM - 03:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Public Hearing notice and proposed rule amendents available at: &lt;a href="https://dab.hawaii.gov/blog/main/proposed-administrative-rules/"&gt;https://dab.hawaii.gov/blog/main/proposed-administrative-rules/&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;a href="https://dab.hawaii.gov/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/HAR-Title-4-Chp-66-RAMSEYER-PUBLIC-HEARING.pdf"&gt;https://dab.hawaii.gov/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/HAR-Title-4-Chp-66-RAMSEYER-PUBLIC-HEARING.pdf&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>

    <item>
      <title>OahuMPO Policy Board Meeting - Monday, April 27, 1:00PM - Updated on 04/20/2026 08:40 AM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77044/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 707 Richards Street, Suite 200, Honolulu, HI 96813 and via Zoom&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/27 - 2026/04/27&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 01:00 PM - 02:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-left: -.5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: 4.85pt 8.4pt .0001pt -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;NOTICE&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;OF&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; tab-stops: 435.0pt; margin: .2pt 74.0pt .0001pt 22.5pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Notice&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;is&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;hereby&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;given&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;that&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;a&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;of&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; tab-stops: 435.0pt; margin: .2pt 74.0pt .0001pt 22.5pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt; mso-font-width: 105%;"&gt;O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt; mso-font-width: 105%;"&gt;AHU&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.15pt; mso-font-width: 105%;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt; mso-font-width: 105%;"&gt;METROPOLITAN PLANNING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.3pt; mso-font-width: 105%;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt; mso-font-width: 105%;"&gt;ORGANIZATION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .4pt 0in .0001pt -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoTitle" style="margin-left: -0.5in; text-align: center;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;POLICY&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.7pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;BOARD&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: 0in 8.3pt .0001pt -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;will&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;held&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt;on&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; margin: 0in 8.4pt .0001pt -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Monday, April 27&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt;, 2026, at 1:00PM &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: .45pt 0in .0001pt -.5in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;This meeting will be held remotely via Zoom, with an optional in-person &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;video conferencing location. Written testimony and virtual oral &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;testimony will be accepted. Instructions for submitting testimony, requesting &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;language interpretation and accessibility resources can be found &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;at the end of this agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;To join virtually,&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: -.5in; text-align: center; background: white; mso-background-themecolor: background1;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Univers, sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;a href="https://us06web.zoom.us/j/83707179031?pwd=bUE3Szh5N1JEQjg3OUZncUxPd29rQT09"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="color: #0070c0; background: #F3F2F1; text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt;Click here &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: -.5in; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: -22.5pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Univers, sans-serif; background: whitesmoke;"&gt;Dial in # (audio only): +1 346 248 7799 US (Houston) +1 669 900 6833 US (San Jose)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: -22.5pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;Meeting ID: 837 0717 9031&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: -22.5pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;Passcode: O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Calibri; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;ahuMPO&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; margin: 0in -22.5pt .0001pt -22.5pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Univers, sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -22.5pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;Or join us in our in-person public video-conferencing meeting location at:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -22.5pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;ahuMPO Office: Large Conference Room &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -22.5pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;707 Richards Street, Suite 200 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Default" style="text-align: center; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in -22.5pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;Honolulu, Hawai&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;i 96813&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-top: 4.85pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;AGENDA:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .25pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .25pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Call&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Order&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;by&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.7pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.7pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Chair&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .25pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -23.0pt; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 41.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;I.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Introduction/Roll&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 1.85pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;Call&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .35pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -26.3pt; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 41.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;II.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Approval&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;of&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; March 30&lt;/span&gt;, 2026,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Minutes&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .35pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -29.05pt; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 41.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;III.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt; mso-font-width: 105%;"&gt;Reports&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-right: 41.0pt; text-align: right; text-indent: 0in; tab-stops: 41.0pt;" align="right"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="mso-list: l3 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 58.95pt; margin: 0in 41.0pt .0001pt 58.95pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.05pt; mso-font-width: 98%;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Executive&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Director&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;rsquo;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;s&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Report &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: 0in; margin: 0in 41.0pt .0001pt 58.95pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;For Information Only. Executive Director Mark Garrity will provide a summary of current activities at the O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;ahuMPO, an update on the status of federal funding and programs affecting the MPO and will recap the most recent Citizen Advisory Committee and Technical Advisory Committee meetings.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: 0in; margin: 0in 41.0pt .0001pt 58.95pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -29.05pt; line-height: 13.85pt; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 41.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;Old&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Business &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="Style1" style="margin-left: 41.0pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: 0in; mso-list: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Univers, sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-right: 41.0pt; text-indent: -29.75pt; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 41.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;V.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;New Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-right: 41.0pt; text-indent: 0in; tab-stops: 41.0pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 59.0pt; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l3 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.05pt; mso-font-width: 98%;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;TIP FFYs 2025 &amp;ndash; 2028 Revision 7 Amendment &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;The Transportation Improvement Program (TIP) is a fiscally constrained, short-range program that identifies all federally funded and regionally significant surface transportation projects on the island of O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;ahu, as well as projects requiring action by federal transportation agencies.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;TIP FFYs 2025-2028 Revision 7 is an amendment involving major changes to 3 existing projects, the removal of 4 existing projects, and the addition of 9 new projects from the O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;ahu Regional Transportation Plan (ORTP). No other projects in the TIP will be affected by the proposed amendments. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;The Hawai&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;i Department of Transportation (HDOT) is seeking approval to amend 3 projects in the TIP FFYs 2025-2028:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l5 level1 lfo3; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;OS01 Bridge and Pavement Improvement Program. Revision 7 federalizes funds and increases estimated total project cost from $203M to $252.5M. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l5 level1 lfo3; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;OS-23-71 Interstate Route H-1, McCully Street Separation Bridge Repair and Painting, Phase 1. Revision 7 defers project by 4 years from FFY 2025 to FFY 2029. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l5 level1 lfo3; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;OS-23-72 Interstate Route H-3, Safety Improvements, Harano Tunnel North Portal to Kionaole Road Overpass. Revision 7 defers project by 4 years from FFY 2026 to FFY 2030. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;HDOT is seeking approval to remove 4 projects from the TIP FFYs 2025-2028:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo4; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;OS-25-03 Interstate Route H-1, Drainage Improvements, Vicinity of Radford Drive.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo4; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;OS-25-04 Interstate Route H-3, Safety Improvements, Kionaole Road Overpass to Kaneohe Marine Corp Air Station Main Gate.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo4; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;OS-25-08 Likelike Highway (Route 63), Rockfall Protection at Wilson Tunnel, Kaneohe Side. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo4; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;4.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;OS-25-09 Moanalua Freeway (Route H-201), Rockfall Protection, Vicinity of Middle Street.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;HDOT is seeking approval to add 8 new projects to the TIP FFYs 2025-2028 from the ORTP:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 58.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-pagination: widow-orphan; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo6; text-autospace: ideograph-numeric ideograph-other;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;OS-26-01 Bicycle Program and Pedestrian Program, O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;ahu.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
