&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-right: 41.0pt; text-indent: -29.75pt; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 41.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;VIII.&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Univers; mso-bidi-font-family: Univers; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;PUBLIC&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;TESTIMONY&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.85pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-font-width: 110%;"&gt;will&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.75pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;accepted&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;on&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;any&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Policy&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Board&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;agenda&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;item.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;The testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;may&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;oral&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;or&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;written.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Written&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;is&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;strongly&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;encouraged&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;as&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;primary means of submitting testimony.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Oral&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Oral&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;will&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;accepted&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;at&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Anyone&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;wishing&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testify&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;orally&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;is &lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;encouraged&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;to&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;please&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;sign&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;up&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;in&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;advance&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;by&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;emailing&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:OahuMPO@OahuMPO.org"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;OahuMPO@OahuMPO.org&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;You&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;may &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;also&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;advise&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;us&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;at&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;if&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;you&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;would&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;like&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testify&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;orally.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;To&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;accommodate&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;all&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;possible testifiers, oral testimony will be limited to 2 minutes. Please note that you may submit written testimony. See below.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-font-width: 110%;"&gt;Written&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;To&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;aid&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Committee&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;distribution&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;of&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;written&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;members,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Committee requests that written testimony be submitted 24 hours in advance (for Friday meetings, please submit written testimony to the O&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;ahuMPO office by the prior Thursday morning). Your&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;cooperation&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;is&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.75pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;greatly&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.6pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;appreciated.&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Written&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;may&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;be&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;sent&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;to&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;O`ahuMPO&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;via&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;e-mail&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;at&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:OahuMPO@OahuMPO.org"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;OahuMPO@OahuMPO.org&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; color: #0462c1; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;or&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;to&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;our &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;office at:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;O`ahuMPO&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;707&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Richards&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Street,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Suite&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt;200&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Honolulu,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Hawai`i&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;Note&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;:&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Any&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;personal&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;information&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;(such&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;as&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;home&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;addresses,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;home&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;phone&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;numbers,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;cell &lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;phone&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;numbers,&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;etc.)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;included&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;in&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;the&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;written&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;will&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;become&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;public&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;information.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;Policy&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;Board&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;packets&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;are&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;available&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;for&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;inspection&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;in&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;ahuMPO&amp;rsquo;s&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;office.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;EXECUTIVE SESSION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;If the need arises with respect to any item on this agenda and pursuant to Hawai&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;i&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="haw" style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-ansi-language: #0475;"&gt; Revised Statutes Sections 92-4 and 92-5(a)(4), the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Policy Board&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="haw" style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-ansi-language: #0475;"&gt; may consult in a closed meeting with its attorneys in executive session on questions and issues pertaining to the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Policy Board&amp;rsquo;s&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="haw" style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial; mso-ansi-language: #0475;"&gt; powers, duties, privileges, immunities and/or liabilities relating to that item.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt; mso-font-width: 110%;"&gt;ACCESSIBILITY&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;ahuMPO is committed to making our documents accessible to all audiences.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accessibility accommodation, please contact &lt;strong&gt;Danelle Miyahara at 808-586-2326 AND at danelle.miyahara@OahuMPO.org&lt;/strong&gt; as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. Visit &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://oahumpo.org/ada-compliance/"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;https://OahuMPO.org/ada-compliance/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt; for more information. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Avenir Next LT Pro';"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt;The O&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: Arial;"&gt;ah&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt;uMPO is a government agency responsible for coordinating transportation &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Univers',sans-serif;"&gt;planning&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;on&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;O&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;`&lt;/span&gt;ahu.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 20 Apr 2026 16:43:48 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77044/details.html?t=1776710435070</guid>

    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 9 a.m. - Updated on 04/07/2026 04:16 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76964/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and ‘Ōlelo Community Television&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/28&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration-line: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;TUESDAY, APRIL 28, 2026 &amp;ndash; 9:00 A.M.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;NO. SCCQ-25-0000822&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;LAURIE BOLOS, et al., on behalf of herself and all others similarly situated, Plaintiffs, vs. WALDORF=ASTORIA MANAGEMENT LLC operating as Grand Wailea, a Waldorf Astoria Resort, et al., Defendants.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;br /&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;br /&gt;417 South King Street&lt;br /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 20 Feb 2026 23:08:28 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76964/details.html?t=1775614603000</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-02-20T23:08:28Z</dc:date>
    </item>

    <item>
      <title>Notice of Meeting of the Board of Trustees - Hawaii Employer-Union Health Benefits Trust Fund (EUTF)</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77055/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: EUTF, City FInancial Tower, 201 Merchant Street, Suite 1700, Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/28&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;April 22, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;NOTICE OF MEETING OF THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;HAWAII EMPLOYER-UNION HEALTH BENEFITS TRUST FUND&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoHeader" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IX.&lt;span style="font-family: Times New Roman; font-size: xx-small;"&gt; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact Ms.&amp;nbsp;Desiree Yamauchi at (808) 587-5434 or &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:eutfadmin@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;eutfadmin@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;, as soon as possible, preferably at least 3 business days prior to the meeting.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk37668146"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;Testimony may be submitted prior to the meeting via email to &lt;a href="mailto:eutfadmin@hawaii.gov"&gt;eutfadmin@hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt;, or mailed or delivered in person to: Hawaii Employer-Union Health Benefits Trust Fund, Attn:&amp;nbsp; Board Meeting-Testimony, 201 Merchant Street, Suite 1700, Honolulu, HI&amp;nbsp; 96813.&amp;nbsp; Please include the word &amp;ldquo;testimony&amp;rdquo;, the agenda item number, and subject matter following the address line.&amp;nbsp; There is no deadline for submission of testimony, however, the EUTF requests that all written testimony be received no later than 9:00 a.m., one (1) business day prior to the meeting date in order to afford Board members adequate time to review materials.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;To view the meeting and provide live oral testimony during the meeting, following are the Microsoft Teams Meeting details:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;  &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 1.0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l2 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: #252424;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;sect;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: #252424;"&gt;Passcode:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #242424;"&gt;GC32SW7S&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: #252424;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;o&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: #252424;"&gt;For instructions to turn on live captions in Microsoft Teams, &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/use-live-captions-in-a-teams-meeting-4be2d304-f675-4b57-8347-cbd000a21260"&gt;please click here.&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="text-indent: -0.25in; line-height: normal; padding-left: 40px;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: #252424;"&gt;Dial-in number: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="tel:+18088294853,,498167092"&gt;+1 808-829-4853&lt;/a&gt; &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #252424;"&gt;United States, Honolulu (Toll)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1; margin: 0in 0in 0in 49.5pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;o&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: normal;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: #252424;"&gt;Phone Conference ID:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="color: #242424;"&gt;498 167 092#&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;A listing of all documents included in the Board packet will be available at the EUTF website (&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://eutf.hawaii.gov/"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;eutf.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;) through the Events Calendar three (3) business days prior to the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;The Board packet can be accessed at the EUTF website (&lt;a href="https://eutf.hawaii.gov/"&gt;eutf.hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt;) through the Events Calendar three (3) business days prior to the meeting.&amp;nbsp; A copy of the packet will also be available for public inspection in the EUTF office at that time.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Please contact Ms. Desiree Yamauchi at (808) 587‑5434 or &lt;a href="mailto:eutfadmin@hawaii.gov"&gt;eutfadmin@hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt; if you have any questions.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Upon request, an electronic copy of this notice can be provided.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 19:50:05 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77055/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-22T19:50:05Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Board of Agriculture and Biosecurity Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77057/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Virtual Videoconference Meeting - ZOOM Webinar &amp; In-person Dept. of Agriculture and Biosecurity/Plant Quarantine, 1849 Auiki Street, Honolulu, HI 96819&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/28&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;div class="WordSection1"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="tab-stops: 1.75in;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 style="tab-stops: 1.75in;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt; tab-stops: 1.75in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;BOARD OF AGRICULTURE AND BIOSECURITY (BAB) MEETING&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 12.0pt; tab-stops: 1.75in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Date:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;April 28, 2026&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Time:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;9:00 a.m.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 6;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Place:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;In person access - &lt;a name="_Hlk124421303"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity&lt;br /&gt;Plant Quarantine Branch&lt;br /&gt;1849 Auiki Street &lt;br /&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96819-3100&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;and &lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;Please click the link below to join the webinar:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://us02web.zoom.us/j/86320553662"&gt;https://us02web.zoom.us/j/86320553662&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="color: red;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="color: red;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;Phone one-tap:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+13462487799,,86320553662# US (Houston)&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+16694449171,,86320553662# US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;Join via audio:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;div class="WordSection2"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 346 248 7799 US (Houston)&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 669 444 9171 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 669 900 6833 US (San Jose)&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 719 359 4580 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 253 205 0468 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 253 215 8782 US (Tacoma)&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 689 278 1000 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 929 205 6099 US (New York)&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 301 715 8592 US (Washington DC)&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 305 224 1968 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 309 205 3325 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 312 626 6799 US (Chicago)&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 360 209 5623 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 386 347 5053 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 507 473 4847 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 564 217 2000 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;+1 646 931 3860 US&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;Webinar ID: 863 2055 3662&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;International numbers available: https://us02web.zoom.us/u/kdsYfvuack&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk140154453"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;em&gt;Members of the public may submit written testimony via e-mail to: &lt;/em&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk124424987"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:DAB.BOARD.TESTIMONY@HAWAII.GOV"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk124424987;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;DAB.BOARD.TESTIMONY@HAWAII.GOV&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;em&gt; , via postal mail to the&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; tab-stops: 1.75in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;BAB Chairperson&amp;rsquo;s Office at 1428 S. King Street, Honolulu, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96814-2512;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; tab-stops: 1.75in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;or via fax to the BAB Chairperson at (808)973-9613.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Please include the word &amp;ldquo;testimony&amp;rdquo; and the subject matter following the address line.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; color: blue;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;We request submission of testimony at least 24 hours prior to the meeting to ensure that it can be distributed to the Board members.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;Copies of the Board Packet will be available for on-line review at:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="http://dab.hawaii.gov/meetings-reports/"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;http://dab.hawaii.gov/meetings-reports/&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk140154453;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;. Copies of the board packet are also available for inspection at the Hawaii Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity at 1428 South King Street, Honolulu, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96814.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-align: center; text-indent: -1.0in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;INTERNET ACCESS:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -1.0in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; tab-stops: 1.0in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;To view the meeting and provide live oral testimony during the meeting, please use the above link.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;You will be asked to enter your name in order to access the meeting as an attendee.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;The Board requests that you enter your full name, but you may use a pseudonym or other identifier if you wish to remain anonymous.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;You will also be asked for an email address.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;You may fill in this field with any entry in an email format, e.g., *****@***mail.com.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; tab-stops: 1.0in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;As an attendee, your microphone will be automatically muted during the meeting unless you are providing testimony.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;For each agenda item you wish to testify on, please click the Raise Hand button found on your Zoom screen.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Board staff will individually enable each testifier to unmute their microphone.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;When recognized by the Chair, please unmute your microphone before speaking and mute your microphone after you finish speaking in order to prevent audio feedback.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;When testifying, you will be asked to identify yourself and the organization, if any, that you represent.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Each testifier will be limited to two minutes of testimony per agenda item.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;PHONE ACCESS:&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;If you cannot get internet access, you may get audio-only access by calling&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;the Zoom Phone Number listed at the top on the agenda.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;Upon dialing the number, you will be prompted to enter the Meeting ID which &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;is also listed at the top of the agenda.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;After entering the Meeting ID, you will be asked &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;to either enter your panelist number or wait to be admitted into the meeting.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;You will &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;not have a panelist number.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;So, please wait until you are admitted into the meeting.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;When the Chairperson asks for public testimony, you may indicate you want to testify &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;by entering &amp;ldquo;*&amp;rdquo; and then &amp;ldquo;9&amp;rdquo; on your phone&amp;rsquo;s keypad.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;After entering &amp;ldquo;*&amp;rdquo; and then &amp;ldquo;9&amp;rdquo;,&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;a voice prompt will let you know that the host of the meeting has been notified.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;When recognized by the Chairperson, you may unmute yourself by pressing &amp;ldquo;*&amp;rdquo; &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;and then &amp;ldquo;6&amp;rdquo; on your phone.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;A voice prompt will let you know that you are unmuted. &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Once you are finished speaking, please enter &amp;ldquo;*&amp;rdquo; and then &amp;ldquo;6&amp;rdquo; again to mute yourself.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;In the event that connectivity is lost, and attempts to repair the connection exceed thirty minutes, the meeting may be terminated or continued to another date and time.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;Consult the webpage for updated information.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -1.5in; margin: 0in 9.55pt .0001pt 1.5in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;IN-PERSON ACCESS:&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLineBreakNewLine]--&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;em&gt;There will also be one meeting location, open to the public, which will have an&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;audio-visual connection. That meeting will be held at: &lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLineBreakNewLine]--&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;State of Hawaii, Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity&lt;br /&gt;Plant Quarantine Branch&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;1849 Auiki Street &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; line-height: 12.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96819-3100&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br /&gt;For internet, telephone, and in-person access, when testifying, you will be asked to identify yourself and the organization, if any, that you represent. Each testifier will be limited to two minutes of testimony per agenda item.&lt;br /&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLineBreakNewLine]--&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 12.0pt;"&gt;I.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;CALL TO ORDER&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 12.0pt; tab-stops: 1.75in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 12.0pt;"&gt;II.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;APPROVAL OF MINUTES FROM 3/24/26 MEETING&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyTextIndent" style="tab-stops: list .5in left 1.75in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; color: windowtext; layout-grid-mode: both;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyTextIndent" style="margin-left: 27.0pt; text-indent: -27.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; text-transform: uppercase;"&gt;III. &lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;INTRODUCTIONS&lt;br /&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyTextIndent" style="margin-left: 63.0pt; text-indent: -63.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in 63.0pt left 1.75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: windowtext; text-transform: uppercase;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; color: windowtext; text-transform: uppercase;"&gt;COMMUNICATIONS FROM DIVISIONS AND ADMINISTRATION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

(3) 2-2-056:039, (3) 2-2-056:054, (3) 2-4-049:022, 026, 027, 028, and 029; South Hilo, Island of Hawaiʻi, Hawaiʻi&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-left: 58.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -22.5pt; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;PLANT INDUSTRY DIVISION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLineBreakNewLine]--&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 58.5pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Plant Quarantine Branch&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLineBreakNewLine]--&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l4 level4 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Request to: (1) Allow the Importation and Possession of Twenty-seven (27) Plains Bison, &lt;em&gt;Bison bison&lt;/em&gt;, an Animal on the List of Restricted Animals (Part B), by Permit, for Breeding and Commercial Meat Production, by Aloha Bison, LLC; and (2) Update Permit Conditions for the Importation and Possession of Plains Bison, &lt;em&gt;Bison bison&lt;/em&gt;, an Animal on the List of Restricted Animals (Part B), by Permit, for Breeding and Commercial Meat Production, by Aloha Bison, LLC.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l4 level4 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Resubmittal of Request for: Review and Approval of the Petition From Nancy Holman, Kalaupapa National Historic Park, to Initiate Administrative Rulemaking to Amend Plant Quarantine Interim Rule 25-1, to Allow Gravel to be Moved From Any Other Area in the State to the Island of Molokai if it Has Been Subjected to an Approved Treatment Prior to Movement.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l4 level4 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Request to: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 99.0pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -17.65pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;(1) Approve Proposed Chapter 4-69, Hawaii Administrative Rules, Entitled &amp;ldquo;Plant and Non-Domestic Animal Quarantine Pest Designation Rules&amp;rdquo; to Proceed to Public Hearing, Provided that the Advisory Committee on Plants and Animals Subsequently Reviews and Does not Recommend Substantive Changes to the Proposed Rules; and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 99.0pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -17.65pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;(2) Authorize the Chairperson to Schedule Public Hearings and Appoint One or More Hearings Officers in Connection With the Adoption of Chapter 4-69, Hawaii Administrative Rules.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-left: 81.0pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;(See attachment 1 for a summary of the specific proposed changes and locations for viewing)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-left: 76.5pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 27.0pt; text-indent: -27.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 27.0pt; text-indent: -27.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;V.&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;OLD BUSINESS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 27.0pt; text-indent: -27.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;None&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -27.0pt; margin: 0in 5.05pt .0001pt 27.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="color: red;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 45.0pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo4;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: red;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="color: red; display: none; mso-hide: all;"&gt;1, , =&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 27.0pt; text-indent: -27.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;VI.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;NEW BUSINESS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 27.0pt; text-indent: -27.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; color: red; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="margin-left: 44.4pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo5;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;NON-ACTION ITEM: Discussion Regarding the Information Provided by the Department at the April 15, 2026, Joint Informational Briefing Before the Senate Committees on Commerce and Consumer Protection and Agriculture and Environment, Related to Biosecurity Activities Covered Under Hawaii Revised Statutes Chapter 150A.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-left: 44.4pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText2" style="margin-left: 4.5pt; text-align: center; text-indent: -9.0pt; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText2" style="margin-left: 4.5pt; text-align: center; text-indent: -9.0pt; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;*The Board may go into Executive Session pursuant to exceptions provided under Section 92-5, Hawai&amp;lsquo;i &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Revised Statutes (HRS), including to consult with the Board's attorney on questions and issues pertaining to the Board's powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities, pursuant to Section 92-5(4), HRS.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLineBreakNewLine]--&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;The Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, sex, national origin, age, or disability, or any other class as protected under applicable federal or state law, in administration of its programs, or activities, and the Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity does not intimidate or retaliate against any individual or group because they have exercised their rights to participate in actions protected, or oppose action prohibited, by 40 C.F.R. Parts 5 and 7, or for the purpose of interfering with such rights.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 107%;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;If you have any questions about this notice or any of the Department&amp;rsquo;s non-discrimination programs, policies, or procedures, you may contact:&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;Rae Gee, Non-Discrimination Coordinator&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity, 1428 S. King Street, Honolulu, Hawaii 96814, (808) 973-9591, &lt;/em&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dab.titlevi@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;em&gt;dab.titlevi@hawaii.gov&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLineBreakNewLine]--&gt;&lt;br style="mso-special-character: line-break;" /&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 8.0pt; text-align: center; line-height: 107%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;If you believe that you have been discriminated against with respect to a &lt;br /&gt;Department of Agriculture and Biosecurity program or activity, you may contact the &lt;br /&gt;Non-Discrimination Coordinator identified above.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;To request language interpretation for this document, please contact: Language Access Coordinator located at 1428 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 (Phone: 808-973-9496) Email: &lt;/em&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dab.hr@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;em&gt;dab.hr@hawaii.gov&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;em&gt;). Individuals may request oral interpretation services to request a written translation of this document.&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-latin; color: black;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact Rae Gee at (808) 973-9591 or&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/em&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dab.titlevi@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;em&gt;dab.titlevi@hawaii.gov&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="MsoHyperlink"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-latin; color: black;"&gt;as soon as possible. Include a description of the accommodation you will need and tell us how to contact you if we need more information. Make your request as early as possible. Last-minute requests will be accepted, but may be impossible to fill. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-latin; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-latin; color: black;"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-latin; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 107%;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-fareast-theme-font: minor-latin; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 20:45:34 GMT</pubDate>
