      <dc:date>2026-04-22T20:45:34Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Hawaii Service Area Board on Mental Health and Substance Abuse - April 28, 2026</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77054/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Hybrid meeting via Zoom AND In-person at 355 Kino'ole Street, Suite 102, Hilo, Hawaii 96720&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/28 - 2026/04/28&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 09:30 AM - 10:45 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Please see attached for the April 2026 meeting notice and agenda.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;If you have questions or concerns regarding this meeting, are unable to open the attached meeting notice and agenda, or would like to receive meeting handouts via e-mail, please contact Maria Pagala, phone number 808-933-0487 or email mariajemma.pagala@doh.hawaii.gov.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Mahalo!&amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 18:41:40 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77054/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-22T18:41:40Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Hawai'i Civil Rights Commission Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77056/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Interactive videoconference&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/28&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 11:30 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; margin: 2.2pt 9.35pt .0001pt 8.25pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 16.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos',sans-serif; mso-ascii-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .2pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Aptos',sans-serif; mso-ascii-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-hansi-theme-font: minor-latin; mso-bidi-font-family: Aptos; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-latin;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-right: 1.0pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;April 28, 2026 at 11:30am Meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be Held&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Remotely&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;via&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Zoom.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .55pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .05pt 9.5pt .0001pt 8.15pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Remote&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Link&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;for April 28, 2026 Meeting at 11:30am:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .05pt 9.5pt .0001pt 0in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Join Zoom Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .05pt 9.5pt .0001pt 0in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;a href="https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4349599058?pwd=VlpKZDVmZ3MzYit5clJQTE1VekhOdz09&amp;amp;omn=89828929331" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;https://us02web.zoom.us/j/4349599058?pwd=VlpKZDVmZ3MzYit5clJQTE1VekhOdz09&amp;amp;omn=89828929331&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .05pt 9.5pt .0001pt 0in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .05pt 9.5pt .0001pt 0in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Meeting ID: 434 959 9058&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .05pt 9.5pt .0001pt 0in;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Passcode: dER5Xy&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: .05pt 9.5pt .0001pt 0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; margin: .15pt 9.5pt .0001pt 8.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;Physical&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: .15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Location:&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; margin: .15pt 9.5pt .0001pt 8.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Princess&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Ruth Keʻelikōlani&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.75pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Building&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; margin: .15pt 9.5pt .0001pt 8.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;830&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Punchbowl&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Street,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Room&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;411&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .15pt 77.1pt .0001pt 75.9pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;No&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;board&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;members&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.5pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;will&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;present.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .55pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="text-align: center; margin: .05pt 9.5pt .0001pt 8.2pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;Upon&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;request,&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;a&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;testifier&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.75pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt;can&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.45pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;made&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;visible&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Board&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;members&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;and&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;other&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.65pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;participants&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -2.55pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;using&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;either&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: .05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;remote&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;link&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;above&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;or&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;at&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;physical meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;location.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .05pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; margin: 2.8pt 9.5pt .0001pt 5.9pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; letter-spacing: -.15pt; background: yellow;"&gt;Instructions&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; letter-spacing: -.2pt; background: yellow;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext; letter-spacing: -.1pt; background: yellow;"&gt;to&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; &lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; margin: 6.0pt 0in 12.0pt 119.75pt;"&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; margin: 6.0pt 0in 12.0pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;c.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;MARCUS L. KAWATACHI, Executive Director, on behalf of the complaint filed by FABIOLA DIAS v. EVAN YUTAKA K. MASUNAGA and KRISTIN YURI MASUNAGA, &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/em&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Dkt. No. 25-004-H-S-RET&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; margin: 6.0pt 0in 12.0pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -17.8pt; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 38.75pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;5.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;2026 Legislative Session Updates, 2026 Bills relating to civil rights (Senate Bills (&amp;ldquo;SB&amp;rdquo;) and House Bills (&amp;ldquo;HB&amp;rdquo;) Senate Concurrent Resolution (&amp;ldquo;SCR&amp;rdquo;) Senate Resolution (&amp;ldquo;SR&amp;rdquo;) House Concurrent Resolution (&amp;ldquo;HCR&amp;rdquo;)) &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;SCR 184/HCR192/SR165&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;: Hawaiʻi Civil Rights Commission; Civil Rights; Anti-Discrimination; Algorithmic Decision Making; Automated Decision Making; Report. Requesting the Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Civil Rights Commission to examine the applicability of existing state anti-discrimination laws to algorithmic and automated decision systems.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -119.75pt; mso-text-indent-alt: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level3 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 119.75pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;i.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Staff recommendation&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;:&lt;strong&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;Support (see board packet for staff comments and resolution)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;SCR 11:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Federal Equality Act; Sex; Sexual Orientation and Gender Identity. Requesting that the federal Civil Rights Law be amended to include protections for sex, sexual orientation, and gender identity in employment, housing, and public accommodations.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -119.75pt; mso-text-indent-alt: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level3 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 119.75pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;i.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Staff recommendation&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;: Support (see board packet for staff comments and resolution)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;c.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;SB2727&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;: Hawaiʻi Civil Rights Commission; Anti-discrimination; Statute of Limitations. Lengthens the statute of limitations to file a complaint of discrimination with the Hawaiʻi Civil Rights Commission to one year.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;d.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;SB2438:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt; Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Constitutional Civil Rights Protection Act.&lt;span style="color: #212529;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Establishes a civil cause of action for interference with constitutional and statutory rights through threats, intimidation, or coercion. Authorizes private rights of action. Authorizes actions to be brought by the Attorney General, County Corporation Counsel, or County Attorney.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;e.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;SB2386:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt; Required posting of salary ranges in job listings to clarify definition of covered employee and removes exemption for employers with under 50 employees &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;f.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;HB1878:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt; Prohibits discrimination based on: (1) The perception that a person possesses certain characteristics; (2) The perception that a person is associated with a person who possesses, or is perceived to possess, certain characteristics; or (3) The intersection or combination of two or more specified characteristics in relation to a person.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;g.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;SB2852:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt; Discrimination in Public Accommodations; Persons with Disabilities; Discriminatory Practices; Places of Public Accommodation. Establishes it as an unlawful discriminatory practice for a place of public accommodation to deny a person with a disability full and equal enjoyment of information related to their services, facilities, privileges, advantages, or accommodations by requiring use of information and communication technology that is not accessible to the person. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -17.8pt; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 38.75pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;6.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Recruitment for Deputy Executive Director Position&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Status of recruitment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Questions and staff answers about recruitment and selection&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -17.8pt; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 38.75pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;7.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Hawaiʻi Civil Rights Commission (HCRC) General Discussion&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 0in 8.65pt .0001pt 74.9pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Structure, Function, and Duties of HCRC&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 0in 8.65pt .0001pt 74.9pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Frequently Asked Questions and Staff Responses&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -17.8pt; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 75.05pt; margin: 6.0pt 8.45pt .0001pt 38.75pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;8.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Announcement&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;s&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 38.8pt; margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;Farewell to Commissioner Nichols and many thanks and appreciation for his work on the Commission&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: 38.8pt; margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt 75.0pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-style: italic;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 13.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;Next Commission Meeting Dates (May Meeting TBD)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-align: center; tab-stops: 38.8pt; margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt 75.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact Constance Yonashiro at (808) 586-8642 or &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:constance.m.yonashiro@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;constance.m.yonashiro@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Requests made as early as possible will allow more time to fulfill your request if possible.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Testimony can be submitted via e-mail to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:DLIR.HCRC.INFOR@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;DLIR.HCRC.INFOR@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;TESTIMONY in the title, or mailed to Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Civil Rights Commission, 830 Punchbowl Street, Room 411, Honolulu, HI 96813. Oral testimony will also be accepted.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;Board packets, if prepared, will be available pursuant to H.R.S. &amp;sect; 92-7.5 and posted to the HCRC website under commission agendas.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;If the remote connection (via Zoom) is lost, the meeting will be recessed for up to thirty (30) minutes to restore communication. If the connection is lost, we will attempt to restart the meeting again with the same link. If the Commission can reestablish audio communication only, the meeting will be reconvened and continue. If the Commission is unable to reconvene the meeting because neither audiovisual communication nor audio communication can be reestablished within thirty minutes, the meeting will be automatically terminated.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14.0pt; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif;"&gt;If you have trouble entering the meeting, please contact Sandy at (808) 586-8659.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 20:17:51 GMT</pubDate>

    <item>
      <title>Regular Board Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77027/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Entrepreneurs Sandbox - 2nd Floor Conference Room, 643 Ilalo St., Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;br/&gt;

Time: 01:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 108%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 18.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Regular Board Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: 108%;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 14.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
