&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="color: black; margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo1; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;HTDC &amp;ndash; Executive Director&amp;rsquo;s Report&lt;/span&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 108%; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Financials Update&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; line-height: 108%; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black;"&gt;Manufac&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;turing Extension &lt;span style="color: black;"&gt;Partnersh&lt;/span&gt;ip (MEP)&lt;span style="color: black;"&gt; Update&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="8" type="1"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="color: black; margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo1; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Announcements&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="9" type="1"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="color: black; margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo1; border: none; mso-padding-alt: 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt 31.0pt; mso-border-shadow: yes;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;HOW TO TESTIFY&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Written testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt; can be submitted by email to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:testimony@htdc.org"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: #0563c1;"&gt;testimony@htdc.org&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt; or mailed/delivered in person to: Hawaii Technology Development Corporation, 521 Ala Moana Blvd., Suite 255, Honolulu, HI 96813.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Please include the word &amp;ldquo;testimony&amp;rdquo; following the address line.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Oral testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt; will be accepted in person at the physical meeting location as listed on page 1.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;HOW TO REQUEST ACCOMMODATION&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability; contact Karlton Tomomitsu at (808) 539-3794 and &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:ada@htdc.org"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: #0563c1;"&gt;ada@htdc.org&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt; as soon as possible, preferably three (3) working days prior to the meeting so arrangements can be made. Requests received less than three (3) working days before the meeting will be accepted but may not be possible to accommodate. Please include a description of the accommodation you will need and tell us how to contact you if we need more information.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; page-break-after: avoid;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 107%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;MEETING MATERIAL AND OTHER INFORMATION:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; page-break-after: avoid;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;The board packet will be posted on the Board&amp;rsquo;s website at:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.htdc.org/"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: #0563c1;"&gt;https://www.htdc.org/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt; at least three (3) business days before the meeting.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Written testimony will also be posted on the Board&amp;rsquo;s website as it is received.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;You can also find links to minutes, agendas, and meeting materials for the Board&amp;rsquo;s past meetings on the website.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;On any of the above items, the Board may convene in Executive Session pursuant to HRS &amp;sect; 92-4 to consult with the Board&amp;rsquo;s attorney on questions and issues pertaining to the Board&amp;rsquo;s powers, duties, privileges, immunities, and liabilities pursuant to HRS &amp;sect; 92-5(a)(4), or to deliberate or make a decision upon a matter that requires the consideration of information that must be kept confidential pursuant to a state or federal law or court order pursuant to HRS &amp;sect; 92-5(a)(8), 206M-21(b), 206M-67.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;The Board may enter Executive Session pursuant to HRS &amp;sect; 92-5(a)(2) to consider the hire, evaluation, dismissal, or discipline of an officer or employee, or of charges brought against the officer or employee, where consideration of matters affecting privacy will be involved; provided that if the individual concerned requests an open meeting, an open meeting shall be held.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;In the event a location loses its audiovisual connection, the meeting will be automatically recessed to restore communications as described in section 92-3.7(c HRS.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Internet Access:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;To view the meeting and provide live oral testimony during the meeting, please use the link shown on page 1 of this agenda. You will be asked to enter your name in order to access the meeting as an attendee. We request that you enter your full name, but you may use a pseudonym or other identifier if you wish to remain anonymous. You will also be asked for an email address. You may fill in this field with any entry in an email format, e.g., &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:*****@mail.com"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: #0563c1;"&gt;*****@mail.com&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;As an attendee, your microphone will be automatically muted during the meeting unless you are providing testimony. For each agenda item you wish to testify on, please click the &amp;ldquo;Raise Hand&amp;rdquo; button found on your Zoom screen. Board staff will individually enable each testifier to unmute their microphone. When recognized by the Board Chair, please unmute your microphone before speaking and mute your microphone after you finish speaking in order to prevent audio feedback. When testifying, you will be asked to identify yourself and the organization, if any that you represent.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Telephone Access:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;If you cannot get internet access, you may get audio-only access by calling the Zoom telephone number listed on page 1 of this agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;Upon dialing the number, you will be prompted to enter the Meeting ID which is also listed on Page 1 of this agenda. After entering the Meeting ID, you will be asked to either enter your panelist number or wait to be admitted into the meeting. You will not have a panelist number, so please wait until you are admitted into the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: 108%;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 108%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;When the Board Chair asks for public testimony, you may indicate you want to testify by entering &amp;ldquo;*&amp;rdquo; and then &amp;ldquo;9&amp;rdquo; on your telephone&amp;rsquo;s keypad. After entering &amp;ldquo;*&amp;rdquo; and then &amp;ldquo;9&amp;rdquo;, a voice prompt will let you know that the host of the meeting has been notified. When recognized by the Board Chair, you may unmute yourself by pressing &amp;ldquo;*&amp;rdquo; and then &amp;ldquo;6&amp;rdquo; on your telephone. A voice prompt will let you know that you are unmuted. Once you are finished speaking, please enter &amp;ldquo;*&amp;rdquo; again to mute yourself.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 03:36:18 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77027/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-17T03:36:18Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Safe Routes to School Advisory Committee April 28 meeting - Updated on 04/21/2026 05:28 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77052/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 869 Punchbowl Street, 5th floor conference room&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/28 - 2026/04/28&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 03:00 PM - 04:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;NOTICE OF MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Date: Tuesday, April 28, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Time:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; 3&lt;/span&gt;:00 - 4:00 p.m.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;The Safe Routes to Schools (SRTS) Advisory Committee will be meeting remotely using &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;interactive video conference technology via Microsoft Teams&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;(the public may participate in the meeting in-person at the below address)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 5.0pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 5.0pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;To join virtually, click on the link below:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;&lt;a href="https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_MTg2NWY2ZmEtZDFjZS00Nzk5LWIyNDQtNDAyZjQ0YTNjOWM4%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%223847dec6-63b2-43f9-a6d0-58a40aaa1a10%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%2266970139-0388-43d5-8c25-30b27ef8f2b9%22%7d"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 16.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; color: #8e7cc3;"&gt;Join the meeting now&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Meeting ID: 297 927 206 169 94&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Passcode: XD3d2BN9&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Dial in # (audio only option):&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;+1 808-829-4853&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; background: white;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; color: black; mso-color-alt: windowtext;"&gt;Phone Conference ID: 938 643 850#&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Or join us in our in-person public video-conferencing meeting location at:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;869 Punchbowl Street, 5&lt;sup&gt;th&lt;/sup&gt; Floor Conference Room&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Written testimony and virtual oral testimony will be accepted. Instructions for submitting testimony, requesting language interpretation, and accessibility resources can be found at the end of this agenda. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="1" type="I"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 10.0pt; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo5;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Call to Order, Roll Call&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="2" type="I"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="margin-top: 10.0pt; mso-list: l5 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Old Business &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="1" type="a"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Action to approve draft meeting minutes&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="1" type="i"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="https://hidot.hawaii.gov/highways/files/2026/03/SRTSAC-1-27-2025-Minutes_Draft.docx.pdf"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;January 27, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="https://hidot.hawaii.gov/highways/files/2026/03/SRTSAC-2-24-2026-Minutes_draft.pdf"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;February 24, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;Action to approve, &lt;em&gt;in part&lt;/em&gt;, the Hawaiʻi Department of Transportation (HDOT) &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="https://hidot.hawaii.gov/administration/files/2025/10/SRTSAC-10-28-25_HDOT-Staff-Funding-Request.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: #1155cc;"&gt;funding request&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt; dated October 6th, 2025, (see &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="https://hidot.hawaii.gov/highways/files/2025/12/HDOT-response-to-SRTS-request-to-expend-funds.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: #1155cc;"&gt;additional details &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;provided on November 3, 2025). &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;The Committee approves the dispersal Safe Routes to School (SRTS) Special Fund monies to cover costs for the HDOT SRTS Coordinator and other HDOT staff related to the SRTS program, not to exceed $500,000 from FY 2025&amp;ndash;26 to FY 2028&amp;ndash;29.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Approval of funding shall be on a conditional basis, subject to terms outlined in the agenda and suggested changes here underlined: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="1" type="i"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;Monthly Reporting. The HDOT SRTS Coordinator shall provide verbal monthly meeting updates to the SRTS Advisory Committee on program activities and use of Special Fund monies. These updates shall include relevant activities identified in the HDOT SRTS Coordinator scope of work, including but not limited to: participation in walk audits, development of SRTS plans on state-owned facilities, and assistance provided to counties and communities&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;Legislative Report. HDOT will facilitate and coordinate the submission of the final report to Legislature in accordance with legislative deadlines and requirements, serving as a conduit between the consultant, counties and the Advisory Committee. At HDOT&amp;rsquo;s behest, the report shall be drafted by the consultant and provided to the SRTS Advisory Committee for review no fewer than thirty (30) days prior to the statutory transmittal deadline.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;Committee Minutes. The HDOT SRTS Coordinator, in coordination with and support from other HDOT staff and consultants, shall draft and finalize minutes for all monthly SRTS Advisory Committee meetings.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;Undertaking Committee Actions. The HDOT SRTS Coordinator, in coordination with and support from other HDOT staff and consultants, shall take steps to ensure that actions approved by the SRTS Advisory Committee are undertaken within three (3) months of approval, unless otherwise directed by the Committee.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;Supplemental Use of Funds. As in line with Act 244 (2023), it is preferred that SRTS Special Fund monies may be used only if funds are unavailable or insufficient, and shall supplement, not supplant, other funding sources.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l5 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;Update on the SRTS Special Fund Status, &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; color: black;"&gt;including collection and depositing of $5 registration fee (under Act 212).&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="3" type="I"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level1 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;New Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="1" type="a"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level2 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Action to pre-approve registration fee requests from counties.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt; The Committee recommends transferring up to $80,000 ($20,000 per county) for the four counties to update their department of motor vehicle systems to be able to charge and collect the $5 SRTS vehicle registration fee. The counties must still submit official funding requests to the Advisory Committee when ready, but if under $20,000, the committee recommends that HDOT transfer the amounts requested by countiesto move forward as needed. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level2 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Plan and program update &amp;ndash; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="1" type="i"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level3 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-ascii-theme-font: major-latin; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-hansi-theme-font: major-latin; mso-bidi-theme-font: major-latin;"&gt;Action to amend the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="https://hidot.hawaii.gov/administration/files/2025/04/SRTS-Scope-of-Work-Draft-v5.pdf"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-ascii-theme-font: major-latin; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-hansi-theme-font: major-latin; mso-bidi-theme-font: major-latin;"&gt;scope of work approved April 22, 2025&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-ascii-theme-font: major-latin; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-hansi-theme-font: major-latin; mso-bidi-theme-font: major-latin;"&gt;. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-ascii-theme-font: major-latin; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-hansi-theme-font: major-latin; mso-bidi-theme-font: major-latin; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-ascii-theme-font: major-latin; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-hansi-theme-font: major-latin; mso-bidi-theme-font: major-latin; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;The Committee approves the includes of two Committee support tasks for the consultant scope - 1) providing monthly meeting support such as speaker logistics, agendas, minutes, etc. as needed; and 2) drafting and finalizing the Annual Report to legislature - and that these will be provided through the HDOT contract, once finalized. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level3 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-ascii-theme-font: major-latin; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; mso-hansi-theme-font: major-latin; mso-bidi-theme-font: major-latin;"&gt;Other updates&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level2 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Staff update&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level2 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Projects update &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level2 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Update on relevant 2026 state legislative bills&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="mso-list: l4 level2 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Upcoming speakers&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.5pt; font-family: 'Helvetica',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.5pt; font-family: 'Helvetica',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 10.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow; mso-ansi-language: EN-US;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="4" type="I"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 10.0pt; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Presentation: Designing Streets for Kids by Jashwanth Tej Kasala with the Global Designing Cities Initiative&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 10.0pt; mso-list: l3 level1 lfo2;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Open Forum: Invitation to interested members of the public to be heard on matters not included on the agenda&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="6" type="I"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 10.0pt; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo6;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Announcements&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="7" type="I"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="margin-top: 10.0pt; margin-bottom: 12.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo4;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;TESTIMONY&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Public testimony will be accepted on any agenda item. Testimony may be oral or written. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Written testimony is strongly encouraged as the primary means of submitting testimony. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Oral testimony will be accepted at the meeting. Anyone wishing to testify orally is encouraged to please sign up in advance by emailing &lt;span style="color: blue;"&gt;SRTScommittee@gmail.com&lt;/span&gt;. You may also advise us at the meeting if you would like to testify orally. To accommodate all possible testifiers, oral testimony will be limited to 3 minutes. Please note that you may submit written testimony. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Written testimony will be accepted up to 24 hours in advance of the meeting. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Written testimony may be sent via e-mail to &lt;span style="color: blue;"&gt;SRTScommittee@gmail.com&lt;/span&gt; or delivered via mail to 999 Bishop St., Suite 1202, Honolulu, HI 96813. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Note: Any personal information (such as home addresses, home phone numbers, cell phone&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;numbers, etc.) included in the written testimony will become public information. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;COMMITTEE PACKETS&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;Committee packets are available for inspection &lt;span style="color: #191c1f;"&gt;and can be requested by emailing&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; color: blue;"&gt;SRTScommittee@gmail.com&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt; &lt;span style="color: #191c1f;"&gt;or at the SRTS Advisory Committee website &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN"&gt;&lt;a href="https://hidot.hawaii.gov/highways/safe-routes-to-school-advisory-committee/"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;https://hidot.hawaii.gov/highways/safe-routes-to-school-advisory-committee/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri; color: blue;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;ACCESSIBILITY&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span lang="EN" style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Calibri;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact Abbey Seitz at #808-897-1221 or by email at &lt;span style="color: #103cc0;"&gt;SRTScommittee@gmail.com&lt;/span&gt; as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. Upon request, this notice is available in alternate formats. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 03:23:21 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77052/details.html?t=1776828518000</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-22T03:23:21Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Hawaii Chiropractic Board Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77050/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Virtual Videoconference Meeting: Zoom Webinar and In-Person Location: PVL Exam Room 330, King Kalakaua Building, 335 Merchant Street, 3rd Floor, Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/29&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Please see attached agenda.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 00:19:46 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77050/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-22T00:19:46Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>OHA Investments and Land Management Committee</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77060/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Virtual Meeting and at Nā Lama Kukui 560 N. Nimitz Hwy, Honolulu, HI 96817&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/29&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 11:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;DATE&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt; Wednesday,&amp;nbsp;April 29, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;TIME&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt; 11:00AM or immediately following the conclusion of the &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;OHA Budget and Finance (BF) Committee Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;a name="02052026_AS_AMENDED_BOT_Agenda"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;This meeting will be held virtually and may be viewed live via OHA&amp;rsquo;s website at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;a href="http://www.oha.org/livestream"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;www.oha.org/livestream&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt; or listened to by phone by dialing (213) 338-8477 and entering Webinar ID: 944 1043 1677. Additionally, this meeting can be viewed live on &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo Community Media &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;a href="https://olelo.org/"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;https://olelo.org/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;. A physical meeting location will be open to the public for those who wish to provide oral testimony or observe the meeting in person at: Office of Hawaiian Affairs, 560 N. Nimitz Hwy., Suite 200, Honolulu, HI 96817.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="1" type="I"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Call to Order&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;ol style="margin-top: 0in;" start="2" type="I"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;li class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Approval of Minutes from the Committee on Investment and Land Management&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/ol&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpFirst" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk191464176"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;April 1, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk191464176;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-bottom: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk191464176;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;New Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-bottom: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk191464176;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;A. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk191464176;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Presentation by Richard Pezzulo, Executive Director, Hiʻipaka LLC &amp;ndash; Hiʻilei Aloha LLC Hiʻipaka LLC Annual Report (December 31, 2025) &amp;ndash; 2025 activity highlights and financials of Hiʻilei Aloha LLC and Hiʻipaka LLC, including Waimea Valley operations.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk191464176;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk191464176;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;B.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk191464176;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt; &lt;strong&gt;Action Item ILM #26-05:&lt;/strong&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt;Reappointment of Greg Charles Pietsch as a Non-OHA Limited Liability Company Manager for Hi&amp;lsquo;ilei Aloha LLC for a 3-Year Term from May 10, 2026 to May 9, 2029&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: .5in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;C.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-font-kerning: 0pt; mso-ligatures: none;"&gt; Presentation by Administration - Response to implementation of outstanding audit recommendations from Report no. 23-04, Audit of the Office of Hawaiian Affairs by the State Auditor, relating to OHA real property&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, please contact Keola Fong at (808) 626-5484 or by email at keolaf@oha.org as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;In the event that the livestream public broadcast is interrupted and cannot be restored, the meeting may continue as audio-only through the phone number and Webinar ID provided at the beginning of this agenda. Meeting recordings will be made available on OHA&amp;rsquo;s website https://www.oha.org/about/leadership/board-of-trustees/ as soon as practicable after the meeting.&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Public Testimony will be called for each agenda item and &lt;u&gt;must be limited&lt;/u&gt; to matters listed on the meeting agenda. Community Concerns and Celebrations &lt;u&gt;is not limited&lt;/u&gt; to matters listed on the meeting agenda. Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Revised Statutes, Chapter 92, prohibits Board members from discussing or taking action on matters not listed on the meeting agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;The board packet will be available for the public to inspect at OHA&amp;rsquo;s main office located at 560 N. Nimitz Hwy., Suite 200, Honolulu, HI 96817, no later than three full business days before the meeting. The board packet will also be made available on OHAʻs website, &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://www.oha.org/ilm"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;https://www.oha.org/ilm&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt; as soon as practicable thereafter.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Testimony can be provided to the Board of Trustees either as: (1) &lt;strong&gt;&lt;em&gt;written testimony&lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt; or (2) live, oral testimony online, by telephone, or at the physical meeting location during the remote meeting.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo3; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;(1)&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;!-- [if gte vml 1]&gt;&lt;v:rect id="Rectangle_x0020_2"&#xD;

bGlwYm9hcmQvdGhlbWUvdGhlbWUxLnhtbFBLAQItABQABgAIAAAAIQCcZkZBuwAAACQBAAAqAAAA&#xD;
AAAAAAAAAAAAAIAMAABjbGlwYm9hcmQvZHJhd2luZ3MvX3JlbHMvZHJhd2luZzEueG1sLnJlbHNQ&#xD;
SwUGAAAAAAUABQBnAQAAgw0AAAAA&#xD;
" fillcolor="#06f" stroked="f"&gt;&#xD;
 &lt;w:wrap anchorx="page"/&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/v:rect&gt;&lt;![endif]--&gt;&lt;!-- [if !vml]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-ignore: vglayout; position: absolute; z-index: -1895823360; left: 0px; margin-left: 552px; margin-top: 40px; width: 4px; height: 1px;"&gt;&lt;img src="file:///C:/Users/KauiR/AppData/Local/Temp/msohtmlclip1/01/clip_image001.png" width="4" height="1" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide &lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;written testimony &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;on items listed on the agenda should submit testimony via &lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt;&lt;em style="mso-bidi-font-style: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;email&lt;/u&gt; &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;to &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:botmeetings@oha.org"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;botmeetings@oha.org&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt; or via &lt;strong&gt;&lt;em&gt;&lt;u&gt;postal mail&lt;/u&gt; &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;to Office of Hawaiian Affairs, Attn: Board of Trustees Meeting Testimony, 560 N. Nimitz Hwy., Suite 200, Honolulu, HI 96817.&lt;strong style="mso-bidi-font-weight: normal;"&gt; &lt;/strong&gt;Testimony is requested to be received at least twenty-four hours prior to the scheduled meeting to allow board members with sufficient time to review the testimony before the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;All written testimony will be posted on OHA&amp;rsquo;s meeting website. Please omit or redact any personal information (e.g., name, email address, phone number, home address, or materials) that you do not want to be disclosed publicly online.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in .25in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;(2)&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Persons wishing to provide &lt;strong&gt;&lt;em&gt;oral testimony online &lt;/em&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;during the remote meeting, please use the link below:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://zoom.us/j/94410431677"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt;"&gt;https://zoom.us/j/94410431677&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-bottom: 0in; mso-add-space: auto; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;To provide oral testimony online, you will need:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;(1) a computer or mobile device to connect to the remote meeting;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;(2) internet access; and &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;(3) a microphone to provide oral testimony. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide oral testimony by telephone during the remote meeting may dial the phone number listed at the beginning of this agenda and enter the corresponding Webinar ID. Telephone participants will be able to provide oral testimony during the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Persons wishing to provide oral testimony at the physical meeting location can sign up the day of the meeting at the physical meeting location.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;If you willfully disrupt the meeting, support staff will remove you from the Zoom meeting. You can continue to view the remainder of the meeting on the livestream or by telephone, as provided at the beginning of this agenda.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: justify; mso-layout-grid-align: none; text-autospace: none;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-family: 'Times New Roman',serif;"&gt;Oral testimony online, by telephone or at a physical meeting location will be limited to five (5) minutes.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 21:28:01 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77060/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-22T21:28:01Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Communication Access Committee Meeting</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77059/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Kamamalu Building 1010 Richards Street, Room 111A and 111B Honolulu, HI 96813 &amp; VIA Zoom Meeting&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/30&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 11:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;NOTICE OF MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Disability and Communication Access Board&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Standing Committee on Communication Access Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;April 30, 2026 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;11:00 a.m. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;The public is welcome to participate as follows:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Physical Meeting Location&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Kamamalu Building&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;1010 Richards Street, &lt;a name="_Hlk218084117"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;Room 111A and 111B&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk218084117;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Participate Virtually via Zoom&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Click on the link below or copy and paste it into your browser window:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;a href="https://us02web.zoom.us/j/89805645643"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;https://us02web.zoom.us/j/89805645643&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt; and enter Meeting ID:&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;898 0564 5643&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;To join by phone&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Dial 1 669 900 6833 and enter Meeting ID: 898 0564 5643&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;One tap mobile: +12532050468,,89805645643# US.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;HOW TO TESTIFY:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: none;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Written testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt; &amp;ndash; There is no deadline for submission of testimony, however, to ensure the public as well as Committee members are able to review testimony prior to the meeting, we request written testimony be submitted be submitted no later than 9:00 a.m. one business day prior to the scheduled meeting date and time. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;To Submit by Email: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;Email the Standing Committee on Communication Access at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dcab@doh.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;dcab@doh.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;.&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt; Please include TESTIMONY in the subject line. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; color: black; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;To Submit by U.S. Postal Mail or Hand-Delivery: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Attention: Standing Committee on Communication Access &amp;ndash; Testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Disability and Communication Access Board&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;1010 Richards Street, Room 118&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii, 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; margin: 0in 0in 0in .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo3;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol; color: black;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;To Submit via facsimile:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt; (808) 586-8129.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Oral testimony&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt; will be accepted via the remote testimony link or in-person at 1010 Richards Street, Room 111A and 111B, Honolulu, Hawaii, 96813.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;Testimony or comments presented by members of the public during the Committee meetings shall be limited to three minutes per agenda item. In compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA), a reasonable amount of additional time shall be afforded to persons with a communication disability to present testimony or comments, if needed. Any person who needs additional time to present testimony or comments is encouraged to contact the DCAB office in advance of the meeting. This rule shall be placed at the beginning of all Committee meeting agendas.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&lt;br /&gt;Members of the public may present comment or testimony during Committee meetings on each agenda item. Public comment or testimony, if any, shall be presented on each agenda item before the Committee deliberates on the item. After all public comment or testimony is presented, the Committee shall deliberate on the agenda item without further comment or testimony from the public unless further public comment or testimony is requested by the Committee. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
