&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; text-align: center; line-height: normal;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: black;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;I.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Call to Order&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .5in; text-indent: 0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Review Remote Meeting Procedures&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;This meeting is being recorded.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;A quorum of Committee members is required to visible on screen.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;If quorum is not achieved at the beginning of the meeting, the meeting will be cancelled within fifteen (15) minutes after the scheduled start time and update any posted notices or calendar accordingly. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;If a Committee member leaves the meeting permanently at any time, the Committee member shall notify the Chairperson. If this results a lack of quorum, the meeting will adjourn at that time.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; line-height: normal; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;If a Committee member leaves the meeting temporarily, the Committee member shall notify the Chairperson. If this results in a lack of quorum, the Chair shall call a recess. If the Committee member does not return within 10 minutes, the meeting will be adjourned. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Raise hand to speak unless called upon.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Identify yourself before speaking however public testifiers may use an alias to maintain anonymity.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;II.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Roll Call/Introductions&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Statement from Public and Written Testimonies Submitted&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Approval of Meeting Minutes of January 8, 2026.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;V.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Old Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Continuing discussion on the Continuing Education Unit (CEU) Workshop Funding Application Form, including next steps related to a recent sponsor request.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Continuing discussion and planning for the 2026 Communication Access Conference.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;C.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Review and Establish a Disability and Communication Access Board Guiding Principles on Communication Access &amp;ndash; Draft.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VI.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;New Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Staff Speaking Engagement Report on the following activities: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 1.5in; text-indent: -1.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l1 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;i.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;February 11, 2026, John A. Burns School of Medicine.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 1.5in; text-indent: -1.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l1 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;ii.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;April 13, 2026, University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 1.5in; text-indent: -1.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l1 level3 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;iii.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;April 21, 2026, University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Report on the outcome of an applicant for the Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Quality Assurance System (HQAS) test.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Open Forum: Public comment on issues not on the agenda for consideration for the Board&amp;rsquo;s agenda at the next meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;VIII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Next Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.5in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;IX.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;HOW TO REQUEST ACCOMMODATION:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to disability, contact Cindy Omura or Scott Castor at (808) 586-8121 or &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dcab@doh.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;dcab@doh.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt; &lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate/accessible formats. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;MEETING MATERIALS AND OTHER INFORMATION:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;The agenda and meeting materials for this meeting are available for inspection at DCAB&amp;rsquo;s office located at 1010 Richards Street, Room 118, Honolulu, Hawaii 96813 and on DCAB&amp;lsquo;s website at: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://health.hawaii.gov/dcab/dcab-agendas-and-minutes/"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;https://health.hawaii.gov/dcab/dcab-agendas-and-minutes/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0in; line-height: normal;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 107%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;If the remote connection (via Zoom) is lost, the meeting will be recessed for up to thirty (30) minutes to restore communication. If the connection is lost, we will attempt to restart the meeting again with the same link. If the Committee is unable to reconvene the meeting because neither audiovisual communication nor audio communication can be reestablished within thirty minutes, the meeting will be automatically terminated. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 107%; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;If you have trouble entering the meeting, please contact Cindy Omura or Scott Castor at (808) 586-8121.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 21:09:55 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77059/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-22T21:09:55Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Board of Directors Meeting - Updated on 04/21/2026 04:12 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77046/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: 250 S Hotel Street, #436 and Video Conference&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/04/30&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 03:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: center; vertical-align: baseline;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;HAWAII GREEN INFRASTRUCTURE AUTHORITY&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 16.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: center; vertical-align: baseline;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;NOTICE OF MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 16.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: center; vertical-align: baseline;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;BOARD OF DIRECTORS MEETING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 16.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: center; vertical-align: baseline;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: .5in; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;DATE:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="tabchar"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;April 30, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: .5in; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;TIME:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="tabchar"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;3:00 p.m&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="tabchar"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: .5in; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.5in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;PLACE:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;250 S Hotel Street, #436&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: .5in; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 2.5in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Honolulu, &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="contextualspellingandgrammarerror"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Hawai&amp;lsquo;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;i 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-indent: 3.0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;And Video Conference&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-indent: 3.0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Segoe UI',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: center; vertical-align: baseline;" align="center"&gt;&lt;a title="Meeting join" href="https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/23967476830138?p=zQ3Dn8Zq9BJrT9jrYM" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Segoe UI',sans-serif;"&gt;https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/23967476830138?p=zQ3Dn8Zq9BJrT9jrYM&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: center; vertical-align: baseline;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -99.0pt; margin: 0in 0in 0in 99.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Call in Number: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="tel:+18088294853,,622072156" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;+1 808-829-4853,,622072156#&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -99.0pt; margin: 0in 0in 0in 99.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Meeting ID: 239 674 768 301 38&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-align: center; text-indent: -99.0pt; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 99.0pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Passcode: Yh3ai6t6&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: -99.0pt; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 99.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 9.0pt; font-family: 'Segoe UI',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.5pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;The Teams link may be used by the public to observe the meeting and provide remote oral testimony. Please note that the Teams link will not be activated until 2:55 p.m. on April 30, 2026.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;The public is welcome to participate by attending the meeting virtually or in person and/or by submitting written testimony to the Hawaii Green Infrastructure Authority (&amp;ldquo;HGIA&amp;rdquo;) by one of the methods listed below.&amp;nbsp; Testimony will be accepted only for items listed on the agenda. Please check our website for the upcoming meeting at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="http://gems.hawaii.gov/learn-more/about-us/"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;http://gems.hawaii.gov/learn-more/about-us/.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: .5in; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;By mail to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="tabchar"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Hawaii Green Infrastructure Authority&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: 2.0in; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;PO Box 2359, Honolulu, HI 96804&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: .5in; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;By e-mail to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="tabchar"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 2;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dbedt.greenbank@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;dbedt.greenbank@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;HGIA requests that written testimony be submitted by 12:00 noon on the business day prior to the board meeting. Testimony received after this deadline will still be accepted but may not reach board members for review before the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Should you have any questions or concerns, please call us at (808) 587-3868.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: center; vertical-align: baseline;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;AGENDA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;I.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="tabchar"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Calibri',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;CALL TO ORDER/ROLL CALL&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;II.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;APPROVAL OF MINUTES&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo3; vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;Regular Meeting &amp;ndash; March 30, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="vertical-align: baseline; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;III.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Program Updates&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo1; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Report on program updates in the Residential Loan Portfolio for the&amp;nbsp;quarter&amp;nbsp;ended&amp;nbsp;March 31, 2026.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin-left: 1.25in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Data on program activities, including new applications, approved applications, and funded projects; and&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin-left: 1.25in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Portfolio performance. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Report on the program updates in the Commercial Loan Portfolio for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin-left: 1.25in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Data on program activities including new applications, approved applications, and funded projects; and&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin-left: 1.25in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;b.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Portfolio performance &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Report on Solar Hui Program for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin-left: 1.25in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo1;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;a.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Update on the status of the Solar Hui Program rules, including progress and expected timeline. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;IV.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;DISCUSSION AND/OR DECISION MAKING&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Approval of HGIA&amp;rsquo;s Quarterly Report to the Public Utilities Commission (PUC) for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Approval of a Resolution for the HGIA Executive Director to execute documents related to the $20.0 million Reimbursable General Obligation Bond repayment schedule, pursuant to Act 296, Session Laws of Hawaii (SLH) 2025, Financing for Condominiums.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo2; margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial; color: black; mso-themecolor: text1;"&gt;Approval of the addition of Embodied Carbon (greenhouse gas emissions associated with building materials and construction) as a Qualifying Energy Efficiency Improvement for the Hawaii Commercial Property Assessed Clean Energy and Resilience (HI C-PACER) financing program. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in 0in 0in .75in;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: Arial;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;V.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;ADJOURNMENT&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: justify;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;HGIA shall make the full board packet available at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://gems.hawaii.gov/about-us/"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;http://gems.hawaii.gov/learn-more/about-us/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt; &lt;a name="_Int_uwHSwnRP"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;at least three business days prior to the meeting.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: justify; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;If any person requires auxiliary aid or accommodation due to a disability, please call Latrisha Nakasone at (808) 460-7986 or email her at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:dbedt.greenbank@hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;dbedt.greenbank@hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt; as soon as possible preferably by close of business, three business days prior to meeting date.&amp;nbsp; Please note that requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled.&amp;nbsp; If a response is received after 3 business days prior to meeting date HGIA will try to obtain the auxiliary aid/service or accommodation, but HGIA cannot guarantee that the request will be fulfilled.&amp;nbsp; In some cases, due to the limited number of communication access providers, a requested auxiliary aid/service or accommodation may not be obtained for the event even if a request is made prior to the reply by date.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: justify; vertical-align: baseline;"&gt;&lt;span class="eop"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="paragraph" style="margin: 0in; text-align: justify;"&gt;&lt;span class="normaltextrun"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-fareast-theme-font: major-fareast;"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate formats such as large print, Braille or electronic copy.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 20 Apr 2026 21:33:54 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77046/details.html?t=1776823920618</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-20T21:33:54Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Ethnic &amp; Cultural Diversity Sub Committee Meeting FFY:2025-26</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77058/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Join Zoom Meeting:https://us06web.zoom.us/j/86588667595?pwd=a5ZKhbeFfe6uLftvYSVR24XHWt0YPQ.1, Meeting ID: 865 8866 7595, Passcode: 640152 PHYSICAL LOCATION: Princess Victoria Kamamalu Building , 1010 Richards Street, 3rd Floor , Conference Room 303, Honolulu, Hawaii, 96813&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/05/06 - 2026/05/06&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 0.65pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;JUVENILE JUSTICE STATE ADVISORY COUNCIL (JJSAC) ETHNIC &amp;amp; CULTURAL DIVERSITY SUB-COMMITTEE&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 0.65pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;DATE: Wednesday, May 6, 2026&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 0.65pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;TIME: 11:00 A.M. &amp;ndash; 12:00 P.M&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 0.65pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;The public may attend the meeting at any of the locations specified below&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 0.65pt; text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;MAIN SITE: Virtual via Zoom&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 13.8pt 6.9pt .0001pt 0in;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk164665634"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;To join from your telephone please use one of the following toll phone numbers* below and type in&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;ID&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;and&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;passcode.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;*Standard&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Long-Distance&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;charges&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;may&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;apply.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Please&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;check&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;with your phone service provider.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a name="&amp;bull;_+1_213_338_8477_US_(Los_Angeles)"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;+16027530140,,86588667595#,,,,*640152# US (Phoenix)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;+16692192599,,86588667595#,,,,*640152# US (San Jose)&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 align="left"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk180998974"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 14pt;"&gt;PUBLIC&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;TESTIMONY:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin: 0in 8.15pt .0001pt 5.6pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="color: #202429;"&gt;Written Testimony -To ensure the public as well as its board members receive such testimony in a timely manner, written testimony should be submitted 24 hours prior to the scheduled meeting date and time.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Any written testimony submitted after such time cannot be guaranteed to be distributed&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;time&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;for&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;meeting.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Written&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;testimony&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;may&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;be&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;submitted&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;by&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;one&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;the&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;methods&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;listed &lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;below:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: .25pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; color: #202429;"&gt;●&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; color: #202429;"&gt;By&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;email&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to:&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:nmachida@dhs.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; color: #202429; letter-spacing: -.1pt; text-decoration: none; text-underline: none;"&gt;nmachida@dhs.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; color: #202429;"&gt;●&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; color: #202429;"&gt;By&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;U.S. Postal&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;Mail:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="line-height: 111%; margin: 0in 6.9pt .0001pt 53.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="color: #202429;"&gt;Norene&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Machida,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Office&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;of&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Youth&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Services,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;1010&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Richards&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Street,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Room&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;314,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="line-height: 12.65pt; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: 52.05pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; color: #202429;"&gt;●&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; color: #202429;"&gt;By&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;facsimile&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to:&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;(808)&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;587-&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;5734&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: 2.25pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 5.6pt; line-height: 11.45pt; mso-line-height-rule: exactly;"&gt;&lt;a name="NOTE:_THIS_MEETING_WILL_BE_RECORDED"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;NOTE:&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;THIS&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;MEETING&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;WILL&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;BE&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.4pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;RECORDED&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 6.9pt .0001pt 23.55pt;"&gt;&lt;a name="THE_COUNCIL_WILL_TRY_TO_ADDRESS_EVERY_IT"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;THE COUNCIL WILL TRY TO ADDRESS EVERY ITEM ON THE AGENDA, BUT NO GUARANTEE IS INTENDED.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;PRIORITIES,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;SUCH&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;AS&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;REQUIREMENTS&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;OF&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;SUNSHINE&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;LAW,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;MAY&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;PRECLUDE&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;ADDRESSING EVERY OR ANY ITEM. THE COUNCIL RESERVSES THE RIGHT TO ADJUST THE AGENDA SEQUENCE (AND ANY SCHEDULED TIMES IF INDICATED) AS NECESSARY TO EFFICIENTLY CONDUCT THE MEETINGS. ANYONE WHO WISHES TO PRESENT AT THE MEETING MUST BE ON THE AGENDA.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoBodyText" style="margin-top: 11.5pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;a name="NOTICE"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -0.1pt;"&gt;NOTICE&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1 align="left"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;If&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;you&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;need&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;an&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;auxiliary&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;aid/service&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;or&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;other&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;accommodation&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;due&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;a&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.15pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;disability,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;contact Shannessy Ahu at (808) 587-5725 or &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:sahu@dhs.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; color: blue; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;sahu@dhs.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt; color: blue;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12pt;"&gt;as soon as possible, preferably by &lt;span style="color: red;"&gt;April 29, 2026&lt;/span&gt;.&lt;span style="letter-spacing: 2.0pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled.&lt;a name="Upon_request,_this_notice_is_available_i"&gt;&lt;/a&gt; Upon&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;request,&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;this&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;notice&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;is&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;available&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;in&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;alternate/accessible&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.05pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table class="MsoNormalTable" style="margin-left: 6.05pt; border-image: initial; border: medium none currentcolor;" border="1" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 0; mso-yfti-firstrow: yes; height: 27.7pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 32.15pt; border-width: 1pt; border-color: black; padding: 0in; height: 27.7pt;" valign="top" width="43"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="text-align: center; margin: .1pt .15pt .0001pt .6pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt;NO.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 277.05pt; border-width: 1pt 1pt 1pt medium; border-style: solid solid solid none; border-color: black black black currentcolor; padding: 0in; height: 27.7pt;" valign="top" width="369"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="text-align: center; margin: .1pt 0in .0001pt .4pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;ITEM&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 1.5in; border-width: 1pt 1pt 1pt medium; border-style: solid solid solid none; border-color: black black black currentcolor; padding: 0in; height: 27.7pt;" valign="top" width="144"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt; text-indent: 9.6pt; line-height: 13.5pt;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;PERSON(S) RESPONSIBLE&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 100.6pt; border-width: 1pt 1pt 1pt medium; border-style: solid solid solid none; border-color: black black black currentcolor; padding: 0in; height: 27.7pt;" valign="top" width="134"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="text-align: center; margin: .1pt .15pt .0001pt .7pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 11.0pt; letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt;TIME&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr style="mso-yfti-irow: 1; height: 44.1pt;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 32.15pt; border-width: medium 1pt 1pt; border-style: none solid solid; border-color: currentcolor black black; padding: 0in; height: 44.1pt;" valign="top" width="43"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="text-align: center; margin: 0in .15pt .0001pt .6pt;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.25pt;"&gt;I.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td style="width: 277.05pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-top-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 0in 0in 0in; height: 44.1pt;" valign="top" width="369"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt;"&gt;Call&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;to&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.3pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;Order/Establishment&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.2pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;of&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.35pt;"&gt; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="letter-spacing: -.1pt;"&gt;Quorum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;td style="width: 277.05pt; border-top: none; border-left: none; border-bottom: solid black 1.0pt; border-right: solid black 1.0pt; mso-border-top-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-left-alt: solid black .5pt; mso-border-alt: solid black .5pt; padding: 0in 0in 0in 0in; height: 49.05pt;" valign="top" width="369"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt;"&gt;3-Year State Plan Goals &amp;amp; Objectives FFY:2024-26&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt;"&gt;Goal 4.1: Define the problem, monitor its scope, identify trouble spots in the system.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: 5.4pt;"&gt;Objective 4.1.1- Develop system for ongoing monitoring of racial and ethnic disparities in the Hawai'i juvenile justice system.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo5;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Set regular schedule for: (1) annual JJIS data review&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo5;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Request for more specific analysis tailored to racial and ethnic disparities observed in annual review&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo5;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-stretch: normal; font-size: 7pt; line-height: normal; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;Based on data review, identify action steps for committee to act on to consistently monitor and reduce racial and ethnic disparities.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="TableParagraph" style="margin-left: .75in;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
