    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 10 a.m. - Updated on 03/24/2026 09:38 AM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76860/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and ‘Ōlelo Community Television&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/05/12&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration-line: underline;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;" data-contrast="none"&gt;TUESDAY, MAY 12, 2026 &amp;ndash; 10:00 A.M.&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;" data-contrast="none"&gt;&lt;br /&gt;No.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;SCWC-22-0000690&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;STATE OF HAWAI&amp;lsquo;I, Respondent/Plaintiff-Appellee, vs. KOA KAAKIMAKA, Petitioner/Defendant-Appellant.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;417 South King Street&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov or complete the&amp;nbsp; Disability Accommodation Request Form. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Tue, 24 Mar 2026 19:35:09 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76860/details.html?t=1774381105703</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-03-24T19:35:09Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>State Traumatic Brain Injury Advisory Board - Updated on 04/08/2026 01:32 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76914/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: See Below&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/05/12 - 2026/05/12&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 01:30 PM - 04:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;div class="WordSection1"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;!-- [if gte mso 9]&gt;&lt;xml&gt;&#xD;
 &lt;o:OLEObject Type="Embed" ProgID="Word.Picture.8" ShapeID="_x0000_s1026"&#xD;
  DrawAspect="Content" ObjectID="_1837160303"&gt;&#xD;
 &lt;/o:OLEObject&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/xml&gt;&lt;![endif]--&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;JOSH GREEN, M.D.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;GOVERNOR OF HAWAI&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;I&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;KE KIA&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;ĀINA O KA MOKU&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;ĀINA &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;O HAWAI&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;I&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: right;" align="right"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;KENNETH S. FINK, M.D., MGA, MPH&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: right;" align="right"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;DIRECTOR OF HEALTH&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: right;" align="right"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;KA LUNA HO&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;OKELE&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-bidi-font-family: 'Times New Roman'; mso-ansi-language: EN-US; mso-fareast-language: EN-US; mso-bidi-language: AR-SA;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;STATE OF HAWAI&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;I&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;KA &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk121129734"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial',sans-serif;"&gt;ʻ&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;OIHANA OLAKINO&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;P. O. BOX 3378&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 10.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 8.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;HONOLULU, HI&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;96801-3378&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !mso]--&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;table width="100%" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tbody&gt;&#xD;
&lt;tr&gt;&#xD;
&lt;td&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&#xD;
&lt;div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 18.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;In reply, please refer to:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 11.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 18.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;File:&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="font-size: 6.0pt; mso-bidi-font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: 'Arial Narrow',sans-serif;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;&#xD;
&lt;!-- [if !mso]--&gt;&lt;/td&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/tr&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt; &amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk28671665"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;STATE TRAUMATIC BRAIN INJURY ADVISORY BOARD&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h1&gt;MEETING AGENDA&lt;/h1&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;May 12, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;" align="center"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;1:30 p.m. &amp;ndash; 4 p.m.&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;The State Traumatic Brain Injury Advisory Board will be meeting remotely using interactive conference technology. The public is welcome to participate as follows.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Public In-Person Meeting Location &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;3627 Kilauea Avenue, (4th floor) Conference room in Suite 411,&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96816&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Participate Virtually via Zoom &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Click on the link below or copy and paste it into your browser window: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;a href="https://zoom.us/j/575890360"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;https://zoom.us/j/575890360&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; and enter Meeting ID: 575890360&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;To join by phone &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Dial 1(346) 248-7799 and enter Meeting ID: 575890360# or&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Dial 1(669) 900-6833 and enter Meeting ID: 575890360#&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;u&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Public Testimony &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/u&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Oral Testimony &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;- Members of the public may testify on each agenda item before the State Traumatic Brain Injury Advisory Board deliberates on the same. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Written Testimony &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;- To ensure the public as well as its committee members receive such testimony in a timely manner, written testimony should be submitted 48 hours prior to the scheduled meeting date and time. Any written testimony submitted after such time will be distributed to the members and the public at the meeting. Written testimony may be submitted by one of the methods listed below: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo3; margin: 6.0pt 0in 6.0pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;By email to: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:ntrauma@doh.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;ntrauma@doh.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo3; margin: 6.0pt 0in 6.0pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;By U.S. Postal Mail: &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level2 lfo3; margin: 6.0pt 0in 6.0pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Symbol; mso-fareast-font-family: Symbol; mso-bidi-font-family: Symbol;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&amp;middot;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Developmental Disabilities Division, Community Resources Branch&lt;br /&gt;Neurotrauma Program, 3627 Kilauea Avenue #411, Honolulu, HI 96816&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l1 level1 lfo3; margin: 6.0pt 0in 6.0pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;3.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;By facsimile to: (808) 733-9841&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;h2&gt;AGENDA&lt;/h2&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;I.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Call to Order, Public Notice, Quorum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;II.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Statement from Public and Written Testimonies Submitted &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;III.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Approval of Meeting Minutes of &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;March 3, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;IV.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Old Business&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo2; tab-stops: list .75in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Update Neurotrauma Strategic Plan Fiscal Year 2025-2030 &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo4; tab-stops: list 94.5pt; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;a name="_Hlk226445086"&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Discuss potential agencies with which to partner for senior education, rural health, and brain health&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo4; tab-stops: list 94.5pt; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226445086;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;National Association of State Head Injury Administrators/Brain Injury Association of America March 2026 conference highlights&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level1 lfo4; tab-stops: list .75in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bookmark: _Hlk226445086;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;University of Hawaii College of Education &amp;ndash; status of BrainSpace contract to update videos on best practices when someone is suspected or confirmed for a concussion&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Status of Olelo update to Hawaii Concussion Awareness Management Program (HCAMP) BrainSpace concussion videos&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l2 level2 lfo2; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 1.0in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Launch date of updated HCAMP BrainSpace concussion videos&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 150%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;V.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 150%; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;New Business - none&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -36.7pt; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.35pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 36.7pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;VI.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Open Forum&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: list 1.0in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;A.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Neurotrauma news and announcements from across the state&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -22.3pt; mso-list: l0 level3 lfo1; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 76.3pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;1.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Questions and comments from people in attendance on Neurotrauma Strategic Plan Fiscal Year 2025-2030 and/or University of Hawaii College of Education &amp;ndash; status of BrainSpace contract&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -22.3pt; mso-list: l0 level3 lfo1; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt 76.3pt;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;2.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;News and announcements from people in attendance on the works of their organization, past, present, future related to neurotrauma&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraph" style="text-indent: -.25in; mso-list: l0 level2 lfo1; tab-stops: list 1.0in; margin: 12.0pt 0in .0001pt .75in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;B.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Public comment on issues not on the agenda for consideration at the next meeting. &lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpMiddle" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; mso-add-space: auto;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoListParagraphCxSpLast" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; mso-add-space: auto; text-indent: -.5in; mso-text-indent-alt: -9.0pt; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; tab-stops: list .5in;"&gt;&lt;!-- [if !supportLists]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-list: Ignore;"&gt;&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;VII.&lt;span style="font: 7.0pt 'Times New Roman';"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;!--[endif]--&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;Next State Traumatic Brain Injury Advisory Board Meeting&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Date:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;May 12, 2026&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Time:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;1:30 pm to 4:00 pm&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 6.0pt 0in .0001pt .5in;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Location:&lt;span style="mso-tab-count: 1;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;Diamond Head Health Center &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: .5in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;3627 Kilauea Avenue, (4th floor) Conference room in 411&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: .5in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;Honolulu, Hawaii 96816&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 1.0in; text-indent: .5in; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;and &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left: 67.7pt; text-indent: 40.3pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;Zoom &amp;ndash; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://zoom.us/j/575890360"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%; color: blue;"&gt;https://zoom.us/j/575890360&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 115%;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-spacerun: yes;"&gt;&amp;nbsp; &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-top: 12.0pt; text-indent: 9.0pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-font-weight: bold;"&gt;VIII. Adjournment&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: 40.3pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;If you need an auxiliary aid/service or other accommodation due to a disability, contact Michele Tong at (808) 733-2152 and &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="mailto:michele.tong@doh.hawaii.gov"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;michele.tong@doh.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; as soon as possible. Requests made as early as possible have a greater likelihood of being fulfilled. &lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;Upon request, this notice is available in alternate formats.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p class="MsoNormal"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;The board packet will be posted on the DOH Neurotrauma Program&amp;rsquo;s website at &lt;/span&gt;&lt;a href="https://health.hawaii.gov/nt/"&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt;https://health.hawaii.gov/nt/&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt;"&gt; at least three business days before the meeting. Written testimony will also be posted on the Neurotrauma Program website as it is received. You can also find links to minutes, agendas, and meeting materials for past State Traumatic Brain Injury Advisory Board meetings on the Neurotrauma Program website.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 01 Apr 2026 23:14:31 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76914/details.html?t=1775691173760</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-01T23:14:31Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 2 p.m.</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76845/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and ‘Ōlelo Community Television&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/05/12&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 02:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration-line: underline;"&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;" data-contrast="none"&gt;TUESDAY, MAY 12, 2026 &amp;ndash; 2:00 P.M.&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;" data-contrast="none"&gt;&lt;br /&gt;No. SCWC-22-0000364&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;NAVATEK CAPITAL INC, individually and derivatively on behalf of Nominal Defendant PacMar Technologies LLC, fka Martin Defense Group, LLC, fka Navatek LLC, Respondent/Plaintiff/Appellee, vs. MARTIN KAO, Petitioner/Defendant/Cross-Claim Defendant-Appellant and PACMAR TECHNOLOGIES LLC, fka Martin Defense Group, LLC, fka Navatek LLC, Respondent/Nominal Defendant/Cross-Claimant-Appellee.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;417 South King Street&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov or complete the&amp;nbsp; Disability Accommodation Request Form. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Thu, 19 Mar 2026 02:45:42 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76845/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-03-19T02:45:42Z</dc:date>
    </item>

    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 10 a.m.</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76884/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and ‘Ōlelo Community Television&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/05/14&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;div class="event-body" style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px; background-color: #ffffff;"&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; text-decoration-line: underline;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;" data-contrast="none"&gt;THURSDAY, MAY 14, 2026 &amp;ndash; 10:00 A.M.&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;" data-contrast="none"&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;No.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;SCAP-24-0000313&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;RAMONA RICAPOR-HALL, Plaintiff-Appellee/Cross-Appellant, vs. PHILIP MORRIS USA, INC., Defendant-Appellant/Cross-Appellee, and R.J. REYNOLD TOBACCO COMPANY, LIGGETT GROUP LLC, FOODLAND SUPER MARKET, LIMITED, Defendants-Appellees/Cross-Appellees.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;417 South King Street&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov or complete the&amp;nbsp; Disability Accommodation Request Form. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;/div&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 27 Mar 2026 21:36:38 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76884/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-03-27T21:36:38Z</dc:date>
    </item>

    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Intermediate Court of Appeals,10 a.m.</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77026/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and ‘Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/, subject to ‘Ōlelo’s programming availability.&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/05/21&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;THURSDAY, MAY 21, 2026 &amp;ndash; 10:00 A.M.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;NO. SCWC-24-0000754&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;FRIENDS OF MĀHĀ&amp;lsquo;ULEPU, a nonprofit corporation, and SAVE KŌLOA, a nonprofit corporation, Petitioners/Petitioners/Appellants-Appellants, vs. KAUA&amp;lsquo;I PLANNING COMMISSION, County of Kaua&amp;lsquo;i, 5425 PAU A LAKA, LLC, a limited liability corporation, and MERIDIAN PACIFIC, (fka Kiahuna Po&amp;lsquo;ipu Golf Resort, LLC), Respondents/Respondents/Appellees-Appellees.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;417 South King Street&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;&lt;br /&gt;&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;strong&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/, subject to &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo&amp;rsquo;s programming availability.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov or complete the&amp;nbsp; Disability Accommodation Request Form. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 17 Apr 2026 01:21:00 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77026/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-17T01:21:00Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 10 a.m.</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77014/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and ‘Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/, subject to ‘Ōlelo’s programming availability.&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/05/26&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="text-decoration-line: underline;"&gt;&lt;strong&gt;TUESDAY, MAY 26, 2026 &amp;ndash; 10:00 A.M.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;No. SCWC-23-0000701&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;MARCUS L. KAWATACHI, in his official capacity as Executive Director of the Hawai&amp;lsquo;i Civil Rights Commission, &lt;u&gt;ex relatione&lt;/u&gt;, ROBERT A. FAHN and BRENDA A. FAHN, Respondent/Plaintiff-Appellant, vs. THE PARRISH COLLECTION, LLC, THE PARRISH COLLECTION KAUAI, JONATHAN D. PARRISH, and SIMONE McCAFFREY, Petitioners/Defendants-Appellees, and LINDA EVANS, as Trustee of the LAURA P. EVANS REVOCABLE TRUST Dated May 8, 2002, Defendant-Appellee.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; font-size: 12px; line-height: 0; vertical-align: baseline; top: -0.5em;"&gt;nd&lt;/span&gt;&amp;nbsp;Floor&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;417 South King Street&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;The oral argument will also be live streamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/, subject to &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo&amp;rsquo;s programming availability.&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #467886; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; border: 0px; font: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;" title="Original URL: https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule. Click or tap if you trust this link." href="https://gcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.courts.state.hi.us%2Fcourts%2Foral_arguments%2Foral_arguments_schedule&amp;amp;data=05%7C02%7CRichard.D.Catungal%40courts.hawaii.gov%7C127497416c174db18c7e08de6b561828%7C3f369bd64c534c1596eefc84b0851f6f%7C0%7C0%7C639066214684910411%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;amp;sdata=ja7%2BaOkdjFWMiP59%2FkWjCh08AIMrIFMkw6NMlaxObDA%3D&amp;amp;reserved=0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" data-auth="NotApplicable" data-linkindex="3"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to&amp;nbsp;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #467886; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; border: 0px; font: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;" title="mailto:adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov" href="mailto:adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov" data-linkindex="4"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&amp;nbsp;or complete the &amp;nbsp;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #467886; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; border: 0px; font: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; vertical-align: baseline;" title="Original URL: https://www.courts.state.hi.us/ada-accommodation-request-form-2. Click or tap if you trust this link." href="https://gcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.courts.state.hi.us%2Fada-accommodation-request-form-2&amp;amp;data=05%7C02%7CRichard.D.Catungal%40courts.hawaii.gov%7C127497416c174db18c7e08de6b561828%7C3f369bd64c534c1596eefc84b0851f6f%7C0%7C0%7C639066214684926833%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;amp;sdata=6B1zJ7D8mZcR3GyqVAeE4xBjyzy9ASedr4TQ0DnyoEU%3D&amp;amp;reserved=0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" data-auth="NotApplicable" data-linkindex="5"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Disability Accommodation Request Form&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Wed, 15 Apr 2026 02:09:24 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77014/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-15T02:09:24Z</dc:date>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 10 a.m.</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76922/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/05/28&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 10:00 AM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;"&gt;No. SCWC-22-0000084&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;TIKI'S GRILL &amp;amp; BAR, LLC, Respondent/Plaintiff-Appellant, vs. DTRIC INSURANCE COMPANY, LIMITED, Petitioner/Defendant-Appellee.&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;span class="s2" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;"&gt;Ali&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="s1" style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&amp;lsquo;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;"&gt;iōlani Hale, 2&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="s3" style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; font-size: 12px; line-height: 0; vertical-align: baseline; top: -0.5em;"&gt;nd&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;Floor&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;"&gt;417 South King Street&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;"&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #25638d; background: transparent; transition: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: bold;" href="mailto:adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov"&gt;adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;or complete the &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #25638d; background: transparent; transition: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: bold;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/ada-accommodation-request-form-2"&gt;Disability Accommodation Request Form&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Thu, 02 Apr 2026 19:21:19 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76922/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-02T19:21:19Z</dc:date>
    </item>

BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;6&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun data-contrast="auto"&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;10&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="TextRun Underlined MacChromeBold SCXW149453043 data-contrast="auto"&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;.M.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="EOP SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;" data-ccp-props="{&amp;quot;335551550&amp;quot;:2,&amp;quot;335551620&amp;quot;:2}"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;NO. SCWC-24-0000706&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;STATE OF HAWAI&amp;lsquo;I, Respondent/Plaintiff-Appellee, vs. MARIANO GARCES, JR., Petitioner/Defendant-Appellant.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;417 South King Street&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov or complete the&amp;nbsp; Disability Accommodation Request Form. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;</description>

    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 2 p.m.</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76954/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/06/02&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 02:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; text-decoration-line: underline;"&gt;&lt;span data-contrast="auto"&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;T&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;UESDAY&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;,&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;JUNE 2&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;, 202&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;6&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;ndash;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="TextRun Underlined MacChromeBold SCXW149453043 BCX0" lang="HAW-US" style="box-sizing: border-box;" xml:lang="HAW-US" data-contrast="auto"&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;2&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="TextRun Underlined MacChromeBold SCXW149453043 BCX0" lang="EN-US" style="box-sizing: border-box;" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;:00&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="TextRun Underlined MacChromeBold SCXW149453043 BCX0" lang="HAW-US" style="box-sizing: border-box;" xml:lang="HAW-US" data-contrast="auto"&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;P&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="TextRun Underlined MacChromeBold SCXW149453043 BCX0" lang="EN-US" style="box-sizing: border-box;" xml:lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"&gt;&lt;span class="NormalTextRun SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;.M.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span class="EOP SCXW149453043 BCX0" style="box-sizing: border-box;" data-ccp-props="{&amp;quot;335551550&amp;quot;:2,&amp;quot;335551620&amp;quot;:2}"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;NO. SCWC-23-0000662&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AMERICAS AS INDENTURE TRUSTEE FOR THE REGISTERED HOLDERS OF SAXON ASSET SECURITIES TRUST 2005-1 MORTGAGE LOAN ASSET BACKED NOTES, SERIES 2005-1, Respondent/Plaintiff-Appellee, vs. YUN RU,&amp;nbsp; Petitioner/Defendant-Appellant, KAOHE RANCH SUBDIVISION HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION, KAOHE RANCH ROAD MAINTENANCE CORPORATION, MORDEHAI ASAF AND LIORA ASAF, TRUSTEES OF THE ASAF FAMILY TRUST, DATED JUNE 1, 2015, Defendants-Appellees.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;417 South King Street&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov or complete the&amp;nbsp; Disability Accommodation Request Form. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 21:09:14 GMT</pubDate>
      <guid isPermaLink="false">https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/76954/details.html</guid>
      <dc:date>2026-04-06T21:09:14Z</dc:date>
    </item>

&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;YUKI GLEASON, Petitioner/Petitioner-Appellant, vs. ADMINISTRATIVE DIRECTOR OF THE COURTS, STATE OF HAWAI&amp;lsquo;I, Respondent/Respondent-Appellee.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;br/&gt;

&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;MAUI TOMORROW FOUNDATION, Plaintiff-Appellee, vs. MAUI PLANNING COMMISSION, COUNTY OF MAUI, AND COUNTY OF MAUI, Defendants-Appellants.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

You are also welcome to send an e-mail to&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #25638d; background: transparent; transition: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: bold;" href="mailto:adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov"&gt;adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;or complete the &amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #25638d; background: transparent; transition: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; border: 0px; outline: 0px; vertical-align: baseline; font-weight: bold;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/ada-accommodation-request-form-2"&gt;Disability Accommodation Request Form&lt;/a&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box;"&gt;. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</description>
