    <item>
      <title>Oral Argument Before the Hawaiʻi Supreme Court, 2 p.m. - Updated on 04/13/2026 04:27 PM</title>
      <link>https://calendar.ehawaii.gov/calendar/meeting/77005/details.html</link>
      <description>Location: Supreme Court Courtroom, Ali‘iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor, 417 South King Street, Honolulu, HI 96813 and also livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary’s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and ‘Ōlelo Community Television&lt;br/&gt;
Date: 2026/07/07&lt;br/&gt;
Time: 02:00 PM&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;br/&gt;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; text-decoration-line: underline;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;" data-contrast="none"&gt;TUESDAY, JULY 7, 2026 &amp;ndash; 2:00 P.M.&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit;" data-contrast="none"&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;No.&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;SCWC-22-0000063&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;SIERRA CLUB, Petitioner/Plaintiff-Appellant, vs. BOARD OF LAND AND NATURAL RESOURCES, DEPARTMENT OF LAND AND NATURAL RESOURCES, DAWN N. S. CHANG, in her official capacity as Chairperson of the Board of Land and Natural Resources, ALEXANDER AND BALDWIN, INC., EAST MAUI IRRIGATION COMPANY, LLC, COUNTY OF MAUI, MAHI PONO LLC AND MAHI PONO HOLDINGS, LLC., Respondents/Defendants-Appellees.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Supreme Court Courtroom&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Ali&amp;lsquo;iōlani Hale, 2nd Floor&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;417 South King Street&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;&lt;br style="box-sizing: border-box;" /&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: bolder;"&gt;Honolulu, HI 96813&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-size: 16px; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #212529; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'; font-size: 16px;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov or complete the&amp;nbsp; Disability Accommodation Request Form. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 28 Mar 2026 01:45:08 GMT</pubDate>

    </item>

Date: 2026/07/16&lt;br/&gt;

border-box;" data-ccp-props="{&amp;quot;335551550&amp;quot;:2,&amp;quot;335551620&amp;quot;:2}"&gt;&amp;nbsp;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;NO. SCWC-23-0000336&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;STATE OF HAWAI&amp;lsquo;I, Petitioner/Plaintiff-Appellant, vs. VIHN DU CHAU, aka VIHN CHAU, aka ERIC CHAU, Respondent/Defendant-Appellee.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;The above-captioned case has been set for oral argument on the merits at:&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;

&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;The oral argument will also be livestreamed for public viewing via the Judiciary&amp;rsquo;s YouTube channel at YouTube.com/hawaiicourts and &amp;lsquo;Ōlelo at olelo.org/tv-schedule/.&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; font-family: -apple-system, 'system-ui', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Noto Sans', sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji';"&gt;&lt;a style="box-sizing: border-box; color: #22767c; text-decoration-line: none; background-color: transparent; transition: 0.5s; font-weight: bolder;" href="https://www.courts.state.hi.us/courts/oral_arguments/oral_arguments_schedule"&gt;&lt;span style="box-sizing: border-box; font-variant-numeric: normal; font-variant-east-asian: normal; font-variant-alternates: normal; font-variant-position: normal; vertical-align: baseline; white-space-collapse: preserve;"&gt;Click Here for COVID-19 Protocols and Case Details&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;Accommodation for a Disability&lt;/p&gt;&#xD;
&lt;p style="box-sizing: border-box; margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.7;"&gt;If you need an accommodation for a disability when participating in a court program, service, or activity, please contact the ADA Coordinator at the Supreme Court at phone number 539-4700 as far in advance as possible to allow time to provide an accommodation. You are also welcome to send an e-mail to adarequest@courts.hawaii.gov or complete the&amp;nbsp; Disability Accommodation Request Form. The Disability Accommodations Coordinator will try to provide, but cannot guarantee, the requested auxiliary aid, service, or accommodation.&lt;/p&gt;</description>
